verses.hebrewText: אִ֛ישׁ הָיָ֥ה בְאֶֽרֶץ־ע֖וּץ אִיֹּ֣וב שְׁמֹ֑ו וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ הָאִ֣ישׁ הַה֗וּא תָּ֧ם וְיָשָׁ֛ר וִירֵ֥א אֱלֹהִ֖ים וְסָ֥ר מֵרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: THERE was a man in the land of Uz, whose name was Job; and that man was whole-hearted and upright, and one that feared God, and shunned evil.

jps.text: THERE was a man in the land of Uz, whose name was Job; and that man was whole-hearted and upright, and one that feared God, and shunned evil.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּוָּ֥לְדוּ לֹ֛ו שִׁבְעָ֥ה בָנִ֖ים וְשָׁלֹ֥ושׁ בָּנֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: And there were born unto him seven sons and three daughters.

jps.text: And there were born unto him seven sons and three daughters.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֣י מִ֠קְנֵהוּ שִֽׁבְעַ֨ת אַלְפֵי־צֹ֜אן וּשְׁלֹ֧שֶׁת אַלְפֵ֣י גְמַלִּ֗ים וַחֲמֵ֨שׁ מֵאֹ֤ות צֶֽמֶד־בָּקָר֙ וַחֲמֵ֣שׁ מֵאֹ֣ות אֲתֹונֹ֔ות וַעֲבֻדָּ֖ה רַבָּ֣ה מְאֹ֑ד וַיְהִי֙ הָאִ֣ישׁ הַה֔וּא גָּדֹ֖ול מִכָּל־בְּנֵי־קֶֽדֶם׃
verses.englishText: His possessions also were seven thousand sheep, and three thousand camels, and five hundred yoke of oxen, and five hundred she-asses, and a very great household; so that this man was the greatest of all the children of the east.

jps.text: His possessions also were seven thousand sheep, and three thousand camels, and five hundred yoke of oxen, and five hundred she-asses, and a very great household; so that this man was the greatest of all the children of the east.

verses.hebrewText: וְהָלְכ֤וּ בָנָיו֙ וְעָשׂ֣וּ מִשְׁתֶּ֔ה בֵּ֖ית אִ֣ישׁ יֹומֹ֑ו וְשָׁלְח֗וּ וְקָרְאוּ֙ לִשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת *אַחְיֹתֵיהֶם (אַחְיֹֽותֵיהֶ֔ם) לֶאֱכֹ֥ל וְלִשְׁתֹּ֖ות עִמָּהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: And his sons used to go and hold a feast in the house of each one upon his day; and they would send and invite their three sisters to eat and to drink with them.

jps.text: And his sons used to go and hold a feast in the house of each one upon his day; and they would send and invite their three sisters to eat and to drink with them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֡י כִּ֣י הִקִּיפֽוּ֩ יְמֵ֨י הַמִּשְׁתֶּ֜ה וַיִּשְׁלַ֧ח אִיֹּ֣וב וַֽיְקַדְּשֵׁ֗ם וְהִשְׁכִּ֣ים בַּבֹּקֶר֮ וְהֶעֱלָ֣ה עֹלֹות֮ מִסְפַּ֣ר כֻּלָּם֒ כִּ֚י אָמַ֣ר אִיֹּ֔וב אוּלַי֙ חָטְא֣וּ בָנַ֔י וּבֵרֲכ֥וּ אֱלֹהִ֖ים בִּלְבָבָ֑ם כָּ֛כָה יַעֲשֶׂ֥ה אִיֹּ֖וב כָּל־הַיָּמִֽים׃ פ
verses.englishText: And it was so, when the days of their feasting were gone about, that Job sent and sanctified them, and rose up early in the morning, and offered burnt-offerings according to the number of them all; for Job said: 'It may be that my sons have sinned, and blasphemed God in their hearts.' Thus did Job continually.

jps.text: And it was so, when the days of their feasting were gone about, that Job sent and sanctified them, and rose up early in the morning, and offered burnt-offerings according to the number of them all; for Job said: 'It may be that my sons have sinned, and blasphemed God in their hearts.' Thus did Job continually.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֣י הַיֹּ֔ום וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים לְהִתְיַצֵּ֖ב עַל־יְהוָ֑ה וַיָּבֹ֥וא גַֽם־הַשָּׂטָ֖ן בְּתֹוכָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Now it fell upon a day, that the sons of God came to present themselves before the LORD, and Satan came also among them.

jps.text: Now it fell upon a day, that the sons of God came to present themselves before the LORD, and Satan came also among them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֧אמֶר יְהוָ֛ה אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֖ן מֵאַ֣יִן תָּבֹ֑א וַיַּ֨עַן הַשָּׂטָ֤ן אֶת־יְהוָה֙ וַיֹּאמַ֔ר מִשּׁ֣וּט בָּאָ֔רֶץ וּמֵֽהִתְהַלֵּ֖ךְ בָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Whence comest thou?' Then Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'From going to and fro in the earth, and from walking up and down in it.'

jps.text: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Whence comest thou?' Then Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'From going to and fro in the earth, and from walking up and down in it.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהוָה֙ אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֔ן הֲשַׂ֥מְתָּ לִבְּךָ֖ עַל־עַבְדִּ֣י אִיֹּ֑וב כִּ֣י אֵ֤ין כָּמֹ֙הוּ֙ בָּאָ֔רֶץ אִ֣ישׁ תָּ֧ם וְיָשָׁ֛ר יְרֵ֥א אֱלֹהִ֖ים וְסָ֥ר מֵרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Hast thou considered My servant Job, that there is none like him in the earth, a whole-hearted and an upright man, one that feareth God, and shunneth evil?'

jps.text: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Hast thou considered My servant Job, that there is none like him in the earth, a whole-hearted and an upright man, one that feareth God, and shunneth evil?'

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֧עַן הַשָּׂטָ֛ן אֶת־יְהוָ֖ה וַיֹּאמַ֑ר הַֽחִנָּ֔ם יָרֵ֥א אִיֹּ֖וב אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Then Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'Doth Job fear God for nought?

jps.text: Then Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'Doth Job fear God for nought?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹֽא־*אַתְּ (אַ֠תָּה) שַׂ֣כְתָּ בַעֲדֹ֧ו וּבְעַד־בֵּיתֹ֛ו וּבְעַ֥ד כָּל־אֲשֶׁר־לֹ֖ו מִסָּבִ֑יב מַעֲשֵׂ֤ה יָדָיו֙ בֵּרַ֔כְתָּ וּמִקְנֵ֖הוּ פָּרַ֥ץ בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Hast not Thou made a hedge about him, and about his house, and about all that he hath, on every side? Thou hast blessed the work of his hands, and his possessions are increased in the land.

jps.text: Hast not Thou made a hedge about him, and about his house, and about all that he hath, on every side? Thou hast blessed the work of his hands, and his possessions are increased in the land.

verses.hebrewText: וְאוּלָם֙ שְֽׁלַֽח־נָ֣א יָֽדְךָ֔ וְגַ֖ע בְּכָל־אֲשֶׁר־לֹ֑ו אִם־לֹ֥א עַל־פָּנֶ֖יךָ יְבָרֲכֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: But put forth Thy hand now, and touch all that he hath, surely he will blaspheme Thee to Thy face.'

jps.text: But put forth Thy hand now, and touch all that he hath, surely he will blaspheme Thee to Thy face.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהוָ֜ה אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֗ן הִנֵּ֤ה כָל־אֲשֶׁר־לֹו֙ בְּיָדֶ֔ךָ רַ֣ק אֵלָ֔יו אַל־תִּשְׁלַ֖ח יָדֶ֑ךָ וַיֵּצֵא֙ הַשָּׂטָ֔ן מֵעִ֖ם פְּנֵ֥י יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Behold, all that he hath is in thy power; only upon himself put not forth thy hand.' So Satan went forth from the presence of the LORD.

jps.text: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Behold, all that he hath is in thy power; only upon himself put not forth thy hand.' So Satan went forth from the presence of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֖י הַיֹּ֑ום וּבָנָ֨יו וּבְנֹתָ֤יו אֹֽכְלִים֙ וְשֹׁתִ֣ים יַ֔יִן בְּבֵ֖ית אֲחִיהֶ֥ם הַבְּכֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: And it fell on a day when his sons and his daughters were eating and drinking wine in their eldest brother's house,

jps.text: And it fell on a day when his sons and his daughters were eating and drinking wine in their eldest brother's house,

verses.hebrewText: וּמַלְאָ֛ךְ בָּ֥א אֶל־אִיֹּ֖וב וַיֹּאמַ֑ר הַבָּקָר֙ הָי֣וּ חֹֽרְשֹׁ֔ות וְהָאֲתֹנֹ֖ות רֹעֹ֥ות עַל־יְדֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: that there came a messenger unto Job, and said: 'The oxen were plowing, and the asses feeding beside them;

jps.text: that there came a messenger unto Job, and said: 'The oxen were plowing, and the asses feeding beside them;

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּפֹּ֤ל שְׁבָא֙ וַתִּקָּחֵ֔ם וְאֶת־הַנְּעָרִ֖ים הִכּ֣וּ לְפִי־חָ֑רֶב וָֽאִמָּ֨לְטָ֧ה רַק־אֲנִ֛י לְבַדִּ֖י לְהַגִּ֥יד לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: and the Sabeans made a raid, and took them away; yea, they have slain the servants with the edge of the sword; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

jps.text: and the Sabeans made a raid, and took them away; yea, they have slain the servants with the edge of the sword; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֣וד ׀ זֶ֣ה מְדַבֵּ֗ר וְזֶה֮ בָּ֣א וַיֹּאמַר֒ אֵ֣שׁ אֱלֹהִ֗ים נָֽפְלָה֙ מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וַתִּבְעַ֥ר בַּצֹּ֛אן וּבַנְּעָרִ֖ים וַתֹּאכְלֵ֑ם וָאִמָּ֨לְטָ֧ה רַק־אֲנִ֛י לְבַדִּ֖י לְהַגִּ֥יד לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: While he was yet speaking, there came also another, and said: 'A fire of God is fallen from heaven, and hath burned up the sheep, and the servants, and consumed them; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

jps.text: While he was yet speaking, there came also another, and said: 'A fire of God is fallen from heaven, and hath burned up the sheep, and the servants, and consumed them; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֣וד ׀ זֶ֣ה מְדַבֵּ֗ר וְזֶה֮ בָּ֣א וַיֹּאמַר֒ כַּשְׂדִּ֞ים שָׂ֣מוּ ׀ שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה רָאשִׁ֗ים וַֽיִּפְשְׁט֤וּ עַל־הַגְּמַלִּים֙ וַיִּקָּח֔וּם וְאֶת־הַנְּעָרִ֖ים הִכּ֣וּ לְפִי־חָ֑רֶב וָאִמָּ֨לְטָ֧ה רַק־אֲנִ֛י לְבַדִּ֖י לְהַגִּ֥יד לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: While he was yet speaking, there came also another, and said: 'The Chaldeans set themselves in three bands, and fell upon the camels, and have taken them away, yea, and slain the servants with the edge of the sword; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

jps.text: While he was yet speaking, there came also another, and said: 'The Chaldeans set themselves in three bands, and fell upon the camels, and have taken them away, yea, and slain the servants with the edge of the sword; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

verses.hebrewText: עַ֚ד זֶ֣ה מְדַבֵּ֔ר וְזֶ֖ה בָּ֣א וַיֹּאמַ֑ר בָּנֶ֨יךָ וּבְנֹותֶ֤יךָ אֹֽכְלִים֙ וְשֹׁתִ֣ים יַ֔יִן בְּבֵ֖ית אֲחִיהֶ֥ם הַבְּכֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: While he was yet speaking, there came also another, and said: 'Thy sons and thy daughters were eating and drinking wine in their eldest brother's house;

jps.text: While he was yet speaking, there came also another, and said: 'Thy sons and thy daughters were eating and drinking wine in their eldest brother's house;

verses.hebrewText: וְהִנֵּה֩ ר֨וּחַ גְּדֹולָ֜ה בָּ֣אָה ׀ מֵעֵ֣בֶר הַמִּדְבָּ֗ר וַיִּגַּע֙ בְּאַרְבַּע֙ פִּנֹּ֣ות הַבַּ֔יִת וַיִּפֹּ֥ל עַל־הַנְּעָרִ֖ים וַיָּמ֑וּתוּ וָאִמָּ֨לְטָ֧ה רַק־אֲנִ֛י לְבַדִּ֖י לְהַגִּ֥יד לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: And, behold, there came a great wind from across the wilderness, and smote the four corners of the house, and it fell upon the young people, and they are dead; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

jps.text: And, behold, there came a great wind from across the wilderness, and smote the four corners of the house, and it fell upon the young people, and they are dead; and I only am escaped alone to tell thee.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֤קָם אִיֹּוב֙ וַיִּקְרַ֣ע אֶת־מְעִלֹ֔ו וַיָּ֖גָז אֶת־רֹאשֹׁ֑ו וַיִּפֹּ֥ל אַ֖רְצָה וַיִּשְׁתָּֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: Then Job arose, and rent his mantle, and shaved his head, and fell down upon the ground, and worshipped;

jps.text: Then Job arose, and rent his mantle, and shaved his head, and fell down upon the ground, and worshipped;

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּאמֶר֩ עָרֹ֨ם *יָצָתִי (יָצָ֜אתִי) מִבֶּ֣טֶן אִמִּ֗י וְעָרֹם֙ אָשׁ֣וּב שָׁ֔מָה יְהוָ֣ה נָתַ֔ן וַיהוָ֖ה לָקָ֑ח יְהִ֛י שֵׁ֥ם יְהוָ֖ה מְבֹרָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: And he said; naked came I out of my mother's womb, and naked shall I return thither; the LORD gave, and the LORD hath taken away; blessed be the name of the LORD.

jps.text: And he said; naked came I out of my mother's womb, and naked shall I return thither; the LORD gave, and the LORD hath taken away; blessed be the name of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־זֹ֖את לֹא־חָטָ֣א אִיֹּ֑וב וְלֹא־נָתַ֥ן תִּפְלָ֖ה לֵאלֹהִֽים׃ פ
verses.englishText: For all this Job sinned not, nor ascribed aught unseemly to God.

jps.text: For all this Job sinned not, nor ascribed aught unseemly to God.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֣י הַיֹּ֔ום וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י הָֽאֱלֹהִ֔ים לְהִתְיַצֵּ֖ב עַל־יְהוָ֑ה וַיָּבֹ֤וא גַֽם־הַשָּׂטָן֙ בְּתֹכָ֔ם לְהִתְיַצֵּ֖ב עַל־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Again it fell upon a day, that the sons of God came to present themselves before the LORD, and Satan came also among them to present himself before the LORD.

jps.text: Again it fell upon a day, that the sons of God came to present themselves before the LORD, and Satan came also among them to present himself before the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהוָה֙ אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֔ן אֵ֥י מִזֶּ֖ה תָּבֹ֑א וַיַּ֨עַן הַשָּׂטָ֤ן אֶת־יְהוָה֙ וַיֹּאמַ֔ר מִשֻּׁ֣ט בָּאָ֔רֶץ וּמֵהִתְהַלֵּ֖ךְ בָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'From whence comest thou?' And Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'From going to and fro in the earth, and from walking up and down in it.'

jps.text: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'From whence comest thou?' And Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'From going to and fro in the earth, and from walking up and down in it.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהוָ֜ה אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֗ן הֲשַׂ֣מְתָּ לִבְּךָ֮ אֶל־עַבְדִּ֣י אִיֹּוב֒ כִּי֩ אֵ֨ין כָּמֹ֜הוּ בָּאָ֗רֶץ אִ֣ישׁ תָּ֧ם וְיָשָׁ֛ר יְרֵ֥א אֱלֹהִ֖ים וְסָ֣ר מֵרָ֑ע וְעֹדֶ֙נּוּ֙ מַחֲזִ֣יק בְּתֻמָּתֹ֔ו וַתְּסִיתֵ֥נִי בֹ֖ו לְבַלְּעֹ֥ו חִנָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Hast thou considered my servant Job, that there is none like him in the earth, a whole-hearted and an upright man, one that feareth God, and shunneth evil? and he still holdeth fast his integrity, although thou didst move Me against him, to destroy him without cause.'

jps.text: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Hast thou considered my servant Job, that there is none like him in the earth, a whole-hearted and an upright man, one that feareth God, and shunneth evil? and he still holdeth fast his integrity, although thou didst move Me against him, to destroy him without cause.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֧עַן הַשָּׂטָ֛ן אֶת־יְהוָ֖ה וַיֹּאמַ֑ר עֹ֣ור בְּעַד־עֹ֗ור וְכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָאִ֔ישׁ יִתֵּ֖ן בְּעַ֥ד נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: And Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'Skin for skin, yea, all that a man hath will he give for his life.

jps.text: And Satan answered the LORD, and said: 'Skin for skin, yea, all that a man hath will he give for his life.

verses.hebrewText: אוּלָם֙ שְֽׁלַֽח־נָ֣א יָֽדְךָ֔ וְגַ֥ע אֶל־עַצְמֹ֖ו וְאֶל־בְּשָׂרֹ֑ו אִם־לֹ֥א אֶל־פָּנֶ֖יךָ יְבָרֲכֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: But put forth Thy hand now, and touch his bone and his flesh, surely he will blaspheme Thee to Thy face.'

jps.text: But put forth Thy hand now, and touch his bone and his flesh, surely he will blaspheme Thee to Thy face.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֧אמֶר יְהוָ֛ה אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֖ן הִנֹּ֣ו בְיָדֶ֑ךָ אַ֖ךְ אֶת־נַפְשֹׁ֥ו שְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Behold, he is in thy hand; only spare his life.'

jps.text: And the LORD said unto Satan: 'Behold, he is in thy hand; only spare his life.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּצֵא֙ הַשָּׂטָ֔ן מֵאֵ֖ת פְּנֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה וַיַּ֤ךְ אֶת־אִיֹּוב֙ בִּשְׁחִ֣ין רָ֔ע מִכַּ֥ף רַגְלֹ֖ו *עַד (וְעַ֥ד) קָדְקֳדֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: So Satan went forth from the presence of the LORD, and smote Job with sore boils from the sole of his foot even unto his crown.

jps.text: So Satan went forth from the presence of the LORD, and smote Job with sore boils from the sole of his foot even unto his crown.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּֽקַּֽח־לֹ֣ו חֶ֔רֶשׂ לְהִתְגָּרֵ֖ד בֹּ֑ו וְה֖וּא יֹשֵׁ֥ב בְּתֹוךְ־הָאֵֽפֶר׃
verses.englishText: And he took him a potsherd to scrape himself therewith; and he sat among the ashes.

jps.text: And he took him a potsherd to scrape himself therewith; and he sat among the ashes.

verses.hebrewText: וַתֹּ֤אמֶר לֹו֙ אִשְׁתֹּ֔ו עֹדְךָ֖ מַחֲזִ֣יק בְּתֻמָּתֶ֑ךָ בָּרֵ֥ךְ אֱלֹהִ֖ים וָמֻֽת׃
verses.englishText: Then said his wife unto him: 'Dost thou still hold fast thine integrity? blaspheme God, and die.'

jps.text: Then said his wife unto him: 'Dost thou still hold fast thine integrity? blaspheme God, and die.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלֶ֗יהָ כְּדַבֵּ֞ר אַחַ֤ת הַנְּבָלֹות֙ תְּדַבֵּ֔רִי גַּ֣ם אֶת־הַטֹּ֗וב נְקַבֵּל֙ מֵאֵ֣ת הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים וְאֶת־הָרָ֖ע לֹ֣א נְקַבֵּ֑ל בְּכָל־זֹ֛את לֹא־חָטָ֥א אִיֹּ֖וב בִּשְׂפָתָֽיו׃ פ
verses.englishText: But he said unto her: 'Thou speakest as one of the impious women speaketh. What? shall we receive good at the hand of God, and shall we not receive evil?' For all this did not Job sin with his lips.

jps.text: But he said unto her: 'Thou speakest as one of the impious women speaketh. What? shall we receive good at the hand of God, and shall we not receive evil?' For all this did not Job sin with his lips.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיִּשְׁמְע֞וּ שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת ׀ רֵעֵ֣י אִיֹּ֗וב אֵ֣ת כָּל־הָרָעָ֣ה הַזֹּאת֮ הַבָּ֣אָה עָלָיו֒ וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ אִ֣ישׁ מִמְּקֹמֹ֔ו אֱלִיפַ֤ז הַתֵּימָנִי֙ וּבִלְדַּ֣ד הַשּׁוּחִ֔י וְצֹופַ֖ר הַנַּֽעֲמָתִ֑י וַיִּוָּעֲד֣וּ יַחְדָּ֔ו לָבֹ֥וא לָנֽוּד־לֹ֖ו וּֽלְנַחֲמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Now when Job's three friends heard of all this evil that was come upon him, they came every one from his own place, Eliphaz the Temanite, and Bildad the Shuhite, and Zophar the Naamathite; and they made an appointment together to come to bemoan him and to comfort him.

jps.text: Now when Job's three friends heard of all this evil that was come upon him, they came every one from his own place, Eliphaz the Temanite, and Bildad the Shuhite, and Zophar the Naamathite; and they made an appointment together to come to bemoan him and to comfort him.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּשְׂא֨וּ אֶת־עֵינֵיהֶ֤ם מֵרָחֹוק֙ וְלֹ֣א הִכִּירֻ֔הוּ וַיִּשְׂא֥וּ קֹולָ֖ם וַיִּבְכּ֑וּ וַֽיִּקְרְעוּ֙ אִ֣ישׁ מְעִלֹ֔ו וַיִּזְרְק֥וּ עָפָ֛ר עַל־רָאשֵׁיהֶ֖ם הַשָּׁמָֽיְמָה׃
verses.englishText: And when they lifted up their eyes afar off, and knew him not, they lifted up their voice, and wept; and they rent every one his mantle, and threw dust upon their heads toward heaven.

jps.text: And when they lifted up their eyes afar off, and knew him not, they lifted up their voice, and wept; and they rent every one his mantle, and threw dust upon their heads toward heaven.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּשְׁב֤וּ אִתֹּו֙ לָאָ֔רֶץ שִׁבְעַ֥ת יָמִ֖ים וְשִׁבְעַ֣ת לֵילֹ֑ות וְאֵין־דֹּבֵ֤ר אֵלָיו֙ דָּבָ֔ר כִּ֣י רָא֔וּ כִּֽי־גָדַ֥ל הַכְּאֵ֖ב מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: So they sat down with him upon the ground seven days and seven nights, and none spoke a word unto him; for they saw that his grief was very great.

jps.text: So they sat down with him upon the ground seven days and seven nights, and none spoke a word unto him; for they saw that his grief was very great.

verses.hebrewText: אַחֲרֵי־כֵ֗ן פָּתַ֤ח אִיֹּוב֙ אֶת־פִּ֔יהוּ וַיְקַלֵּ֖ל אֶת־יֹומֹֽו׃ פ
verses.englishText: After this opened Job his mouth, and cursed his day.

jps.text: After this opened Job his mouth, and cursed his day.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: And Job spoke, and said:

jps.text: And Job spoke, and said:

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֣אבַד יֹ֖ום אִוָּ֣לֶד בֹּ֑ו וְהַלַּ֥יְלָה אָ֝מַ֗ר הֹ֣רָה גָֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: Let the day perish wherein I was born, and the night wherein it was said: 'A man-child is brought forth.'

jps.text: Let the day perish wherein I was born, and the night wherein it was said: 'A man-child is brought forth.'

verses.hebrewText: הַיֹּ֥ום הַה֗וּא יְֽהִ֫י חֹ֥שֶׁךְ אַֽל־יִדְרְשֵׁ֣הוּ אֱלֹ֣והַּ מִמָּ֑עַל וְאַל־תֹּופַ֖ע עָלָ֣יו נְהָרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let that day be darkness; let not God inquire after it from above, neither let the light shine upon it.

jps.text: Let that day be darkness; let not God inquire after it from above, neither let the light shine upon it.

verses.hebrewText: יִגְאָלֻ֡הוּ חֹ֣שֶׁךְ וְ֭צַלְמָוֶת תִּשְׁכָּן־עָלָ֣יו עֲנָנָ֑ה יְ֝בַעֲתֻ֗הוּ כִּֽמְרִ֥ירֵי יֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: Let darkness and the shadow of death claim it for their own; let a cloud dwell upon it; let all that maketh black the day terrify it.

jps.text: Let darkness and the shadow of death claim it for their own; let a cloud dwell upon it; let all that maketh black the day terrify it.

verses.hebrewText: הַלַּ֥יְלָה הַהוּא֮ יִקָּחֵ֪ה֫וּ אֹ֥פֶל אַל־יִ֭חַדְּ בִּימֵ֣י שָׁנָ֑ה בְּמִסְפַּ֥ר יְ֝רָחִ֗ים אַל־יָבֹֽא׃
verses.englishText: As for that night, let thick darkness seize upon it; let it not rejoice among the days of the year; let it not come into the number of the months.

jps.text: As for that night, let thick darkness seize upon it; let it not rejoice among the days of the year; let it not come into the number of the months.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֤ה הַלַּ֣יְלָה הַ֭הוּא יְהִ֣י גַלְמ֑וּד אַל־תָּבֹ֖א רְנָנָ֣ה בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Lo, let that night be desolate; let no joyful voice come therein.

jps.text: Lo, let that night be desolate; let no joyful voice come therein.

verses.hebrewText: יִקְּבֻ֥הוּ אֹרְרֵי־יֹ֑ום הָ֝עֲתִידִ֗ים עֹרֵ֥ר לִוְיָתָֽן׃
verses.englishText: Let them curse it that curse the day, who are ready to rouse up leviathan.

jps.text: Let them curse it that curse the day, who are ready to rouse up leviathan.

verses.hebrewText: יֶחְשְׁכוּ֮ כֹּוכְבֵ֪י נִ֫שְׁפֹּ֥ו יְקַו־לְאֹ֥ור וָאַ֑יִן וְאַל־יִ֝רְאֶ֗ה בְּעַפְעַפֵּי־שָֽׁחַר׃
verses.englishText: Let the stars of the twilight thereof be dark; let it look for light, but have none; neither let it behold the eyelids of the morning;

jps.text: Let the stars of the twilight thereof be dark; let it look for light, but have none; neither let it behold the eyelids of the morning;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א סָ֭גַר דַּלְתֵ֣י בִטְנִ֑י וַיַּסְתֵּ֥ר עָ֝מָ֗ל מֵעֵינָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Because it shut not up the doors of my mother's womb, nor hid trouble from mine eyes.

jps.text: Because it shut not up the doors of my mother's womb, nor hid trouble from mine eyes.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֤מָּה לֹּ֣א מֵרֶ֣חֶם אָמ֑וּת מִבֶּ֖טֶן יָצָ֣אתִי וְאֶגְוָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Why died I not from the womb? Why did I not perish at birth?

jps.text: Why died I not from the womb? Why did I not perish at birth?

verses.hebrewText: מַ֭דּוּעַ קִדְּמ֣וּנִי בִרְכָּ֑יִם וּמַה־שָּׁ֝דַ֗יִם כִּ֣י אִינָֽק׃
verses.englishText: Why did the knees receive me? And wherefore the breasts, that I should suck?

jps.text: Why did the knees receive me? And wherefore the breasts, that I should suck?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עַ֭תָּה שָׁכַ֣בְתִּי וְאֶשְׁקֹ֑וט יָ֝שַׁ֗נְתִּי אָ֤ז ׀ יָנ֬וּחַֽ לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: For now should I have lain still and been quiet; I should have slept; then had I been at rest —

jps.text: For now should I have lain still and been quiet; I should have slept; then had I been at rest —

verses.hebrewText: עִם־מְ֭לָכִים וְיֹ֣עֲצֵי אָ֑רֶץ הַבֹּנִ֖ים חֳרָבֹ֣ות לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: With kings and counsellors of the earth, who built up waste places for themselves;

jps.text: With kings and counsellors of the earth, who built up waste places for themselves;

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣ו עִם־שָׂ֭רִים זָהָ֣ב לָהֶ֑ם הַֽמְמַלְאִ֖ים בָּתֵּיהֶ֣ם כָּֽסֶף׃
verses.englishText: Or with princes that had gold, who filled their houses with silver;

jps.text: Or with princes that had gold, who filled their houses with silver;

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֤ו כְנֵ֣פֶל טָ֭מוּן לֹ֣א אֶהְיֶ֑ה כְּ֝עֹלְלִ֗ים לֹא־רָ֥אוּ אֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Or as a hidden untimely birth I had not been; as infants that never saw light.

jps.text: Or as a hidden untimely birth I had not been; as infants that never saw light.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֣ם רְ֭שָׁעִים חָ֣דְלוּ רֹ֑גֶז וְשָׁ֥ם יָ֝נ֗וּחוּ יְגִ֣יעֵי כֹֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: There the wicked cease from troubling; and there the weary are at rest.

jps.text: There the wicked cease from troubling; and there the weary are at rest.

verses.hebrewText: יַ֭חַד אֲסִירִ֣ים שַׁאֲנָ֑נוּ לֹ֥א שָׁ֝מְע֗וּ קֹ֣ול נֹגֵֽשׂ׃
verses.englishText: There the prisoners are at ease together; they hear not the voice of the taskmaster.

jps.text: There the prisoners are at ease together; they hear not the voice of the taskmaster.

verses.hebrewText: קָטֹ֣ן וְ֭גָדֹול שָׁ֣ם ה֑וּא וְ֝עֶ֗בֶד חָפְשִׁ֥י מֵאֲדֹנָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The small and great are there alike; and the servant is free from his master.

jps.text: The small and great are there alike; and the servant is free from his master.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֤מָּה יִתֵּ֣ן לְעָמֵ֣ל אֹ֑ור וְ֝חַיִּ֗ים לְמָ֣רֵי נָֽפֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Wherewith is light given to him that is in misery, and life unto the bitter in soul —

jps.text: Wherewith is light given to him that is in misery, and life unto the bitter in soul —

verses.hebrewText: הַֽמְחַכִּ֣ים לַמָּ֣וֶת וְאֵינֶ֑נּוּ וַֽ֝יַּחְפְּרֻ֗הוּ מִמַּטְמֹונִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Who long for death, but it cometh not; and dig for it more than for hid treasures;

jps.text: Who long for death, but it cometh not; and dig for it more than for hid treasures;

verses.hebrewText: הַשְּׂמֵחִ֥ים אֱלֵי־גִ֑יל יָ֝שִׂ֗ישׂוּ כִּ֣י יִמְצְאוּ־קָֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: Who rejoice unto exultation, and are glad, when they can find the grave? —

jps.text: Who rejoice unto exultation, and are glad, when they can find the grave? —

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭גֶבֶר אֲשֶׁר־דַּרְכֹּ֣ו נִסְתָּ֑רָה וַיָּ֖סֶךְ אֱלֹ֣והַּ בַּעֲדֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: To a man whose way is hid, and whom God hath hedged in?

jps.text: To a man whose way is hid, and whom God hath hedged in?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־לִפְנֵ֣י לַ֭חְמִי אַנְחָתִ֣י תָבֹ֑א וַֽיִּתְּכ֥וּ כַ֝מַּ֗יִם שַׁאֲגֹתָֽי׃
verses.englishText: For my sighing cometh instead of my food, and my roarings are poured out like water.

jps.text: For my sighing cometh instead of my food, and my roarings are poured out like water.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י פַ֣חַד פָּ֭חַדְתִּי וַיֶּאֱתָיֵ֑נִי וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר יָ֝גֹ֗רְתִּי יָ֣בֹא לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: For the thing which I did fear is come upon me, and that which I was afraid of hath overtaken me.

jps.text: For the thing which I did fear is come upon me, and that which I was afraid of hath overtaken me.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֤א שָׁלַ֨וְתִּי ׀ וְלֹ֖א שָׁקַ֥טְתִּי וְֽלֹא־נָ֗חְתִּי וַיָּ֥בֹא רֹֽגֶז׃ פ
verses.englishText: I was not at ease, neither was I quiet, neither had I rest; but trouble came.

jps.text: I was not at ease, neither was I quiet, neither had I rest; but trouble came.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן אֱלִיפַ֥ז הַֽתֵּימָנִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: הֲנִסָּ֬ה דָבָ֣ר אֵלֶ֣יךָ תִּלְאֶ֑ה וַעְצֹ֥ר בְּ֝מִלִּ֗ין מִ֣י יוּכָֽל׃
verses.englishText: If one venture a word unto thee, wilt thou be weary? But who can withhold himself from speaking?

jps.text: If one venture a word unto thee, wilt thou be weary? But who can withhold himself from speaking?

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭נֵּה יִסַּ֣רְתָּ רַבִּ֑ים וְיָדַ֖יִם רָפֹ֣ות תְּחַזֵּֽק׃
verses.englishText: Behold, thou hast instructed many, and thou hast strengthened the weak hands.

jps.text: Behold, thou hast instructed many, and thou hast strengthened the weak hands.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֖ושֵׁל יְקִימ֣וּן מִלֶּ֑יךָ וּבִרְכַּ֖יִם כֹּרְעֹ֣ות תְּאַמֵּֽץ׃
verses.englishText: Thy words have upholden him that was falling, and thou hast strengthened the feeble knees.

jps.text: Thy words have upholden him that was falling, and thou hast strengthened the feeble knees.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י עַתָּ֨ה ׀ תָּבֹ֣וא אֵלֶ֣יךָ וַתֵּ֑לֶא תִּגַּ֥ע עָ֝דֶ֗יךָ וַתִּבָּהֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: But now it is come upon thee, and thou art weary; it toucheth thee, and thou art affrighted.

jps.text: But now it is come upon thee, and thou art weary; it toucheth thee, and thou art affrighted.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֣א יִ֭רְאָתְךָ כִּסְלָתֶ֑ךָ תִּ֝קְוָתְךָ֗ וְתֹ֣ם דְּרָכֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Is not thy fear of God thy confidence, and thy hope the integrity of thy ways?

jps.text: Is not thy fear of God thy confidence, and thy hope the integrity of thy ways?

verses.hebrewText: זְכָר־נָ֗א מִ֤י ה֣וּא נָקִ֣י אָבָ֑ד וְ֝אֵיפֹ֗ה יְשָׁרִ֥ים נִכְחָֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: Remember, I pray thee, who ever perished, being innocent? Or where were the upright cut off?

jps.text: Remember, I pray thee, who ever perished, being innocent? Or where were the upright cut off?

verses.hebrewText: כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר רָ֭אִיתִי חֹ֣רְשֵׁי אָ֑וֶן וְזֹרְעֵ֖י עָמָ֣ל יִקְצְרֻֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: According as I have seen, they that plow iniquity, and sow mischief, reap the same.

jps.text: According as I have seen, they that plow iniquity, and sow mischief, reap the same.

verses.hebrewText: מִנִּשְׁמַ֣ת אֱלֹ֣והַ יֹאבֵ֑דוּ וּמֵר֖וּחַ אַפֹּ֣ו יִכְלֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: By the breath of God they perish, and by the blast of His anger are they consumed.

jps.text: By the breath of God they perish, and by the blast of His anger are they consumed.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁאֲגַ֣ת אַ֭רְיֵה וְקֹ֣ול שָׁ֑חַל וְשִׁנֵּ֖י כְפִירִ֣ים נִתָּֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: The lion roareth, and the fierce lion howleth — yet the teeth of the young lions are broken.

jps.text: The lion roareth, and the fierce lion howleth — yet the teeth of the young lions are broken.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭יִשׁ אֹבֵ֣ד מִבְּלִי־טָ֑רֶף וּבְנֵ֥י לָ֝בִ֗יא יִתְפָּרָֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: The old lion perisheth for lack of prey, and the whelps of the lioness are scattered abroad.

jps.text: The old lion perisheth for lack of prey, and the whelps of the lioness are scattered abroad.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אֵלַי דָּבָ֣ר יְגֻנָּ֑ב וַתִּקַּ֥ח אָ֝זְנִ֗י שֵׁ֣מֶץ מֽ͏ֶנְהֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: Now a word was secretly brought to me, and mine ear received a whisper thereof.

jps.text: Now a word was secretly brought to me, and mine ear received a whisper thereof.

verses.hebrewText: בִּ֭שְׂעִפִּים מֵחֶזְיֹנֹ֣ות לָ֑יְלָה בִּנְפֹ֥ל תַּ֝רְדֵּמָ֗ה עַל־אֲנָשִֽׁים׃
verses.englishText: In thoughts from the visions of the night, when deep sleep falleth on men,

jps.text: In thoughts from the visions of the night, when deep sleep falleth on men,

verses.hebrewText: פַּ֣חַד קְ֭רָאַנִי וּרְעָדָ֑ה וְרֹ֖ב עַצְמֹותַ֣י הִפְחִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: Fear came upon me, and trembling, and all my bones were made to shake.

jps.text: Fear came upon me, and trembling, and all my bones were made to shake.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭רוּחַ עַל־פָּנַ֣י יַחֲלֹ֑ף תְּ֝סַמֵּ֗ר שַֽׂעֲרַ֥ת בְּשָׂרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Then a spirit passed before my face, that made the hair of my flesh to stand up.

jps.text: Then a spirit passed before my face, that made the hair of my flesh to stand up.

verses.hebrewText: יַעֲמֹ֤ד ׀ וְֽלֹא־אַכִּ֬יר מַרְאֵ֗הוּ תְּ֭מוּנָה לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָ֑י דְּמָמָ֖ה וָקֹ֣ול אֶשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.englishText: It stood still, but I could not discern the appearance thereof; a form was before mine eyes; I heard a still voice:

jps.text: It stood still, but I could not discern the appearance thereof; a form was before mine eyes; I heard a still voice:

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭אֱנֹושׁ מֵאֱלֹ֣והַ יִצְדָּ֑ק אִ֥ם מֵ֝עֹשֵׂ֗הוּ יִטְהַר־גָּֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: 'Shall mortal man be just before God? Shall a man be pure before his Maker?

jps.text: 'Shall mortal man be just before God? Shall a man be pure before his Maker?

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן בַּ֭עֲבָדָיו לֹ֣א יַאֲמִ֑ין וּ֝בְמַלְאָכָ֗יו יָשִׂ֥ים תָּהֳלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He putteth no trust in His servants, and His angels He chargeth with folly;

jps.text: Behold, He putteth no trust in His servants, and His angels He chargeth with folly;

verses.hebrewText: אַ֤ף ׀ שֹׁכְנֵ֬י בָֽתֵּי־חֹ֗מֶר אֲשֶׁר־בֶּעָפָ֥ר יְסֹודָ֑ם יְ֝דַכְּא֗וּם לִפְנֵי־עָֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: How much more them that dwell in houses of clay, whose foundation is in the dust, who are crushed before the moth!

jps.text: How much more them that dwell in houses of clay, whose foundation is in the dust, who are crushed before the moth!

verses.hebrewText: מִבֹּ֣קֶר לָעֶ֣רֶב יֻכַּ֑תּוּ מִבְּלִ֥י מֵ֝שִׂ֗ים לָנֶ֥צַח יֹאבֵֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: Betwixt morning and evening they are shattered; they perish for ever without any regarding it.

jps.text: Betwixt morning and evening they are shattered; they perish for ever without any regarding it.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹא־נִסַּ֣ע יִתְרָ֣ם בָּ֑ם יָ֝מ֗וּתוּ וְלֹ֣א בְחָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Is not their tent-cord plucked up within them? They die, and that without wisdom.'

jps.text: Is not their tent-cord plucked up within them? They die, and that without wisdom.'

verses.hebrewText: קְֽרָא־נָ֭א הֲיֵ֣שׁ עֹונֶ֑ךָּ וְאֶל־מִ֖י מִקְּדֹשִׁ֣ים תִּפְנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Call now; is there any that will answer thee? And to which of the holy ones wilt thou turn?

jps.text: Call now; is there any that will answer thee? And to which of the holy ones wilt thou turn?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־לֶֽ֭אֱוִיל יַהֲרָג־כָּ֑עַשׂ וּ֝פֹתֶ֗ה תָּמִ֥ית קִנְאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For anger killeth the foolish man, and envy slayeth the silly one.

jps.text: For anger killeth the foolish man, and envy slayeth the silly one.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ‍ֽנִי־רָ֭אִיתִי אֱוִ֣יל מַשְׁרִ֑ישׁ וָאֶקֹּ֖וב נָוֵ֣הוּ פִתְאֹֽם׃
verses.englishText: I have seen the foolish taking root; but suddenly I beheld his habitation cursed.

jps.text: I have seen the foolish taking root; but suddenly I beheld his habitation cursed.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְחֲק֣וּ בָנָ֣יו מִיֶּ֑שַׁע וְיִֽדַּכְּא֥וּ בַ֝שַּׁ֗עַר וְאֵ֣ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: His children are far from safety, and are crushed in the gate, with none to deliver them.

jps.text: His children are far from safety, and are crushed in the gate, with none to deliver them.

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר קְצִירֹ֨ו ׀ רָ֘עֵ֤ב יֹאכֵ֗ל וְאֶֽל־מִצִּנִּ֥ים יִקָּחֵ֑הוּ וְשָׁאַ֖ף צַמִּ֣ים חֵילָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Whose harvest the hungry eateth up, and taketh it even out of the thorns, and the snare gapeth for their substance.

jps.text: Whose harvest the hungry eateth up, and taketh it even out of the thorns, and the snare gapeth for their substance.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־יֵצֵ֣א מֵעָפָ֣ר אָ֑וֶן וּ֝מֵאֲדָמָ֗ה לֹא־יִצְמַ֥ח עָמָֽל׃
verses.englishText: For affliction cometh not forth from the dust, neither doth trouble spring out of the ground;

jps.text: For affliction cometh not forth from the dust, neither doth trouble spring out of the ground;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָ֭דָם לְעָמָ֣ל יוּלָּ֑ד וּבְנֵי־רֶ֝֗שֶׁף יַגְבִּ֥יהוּ עֽוּף׃
verses.englishText: But man is born unto trouble, as the sparks fly upward.

jps.text: But man is born unto trouble, as the sparks fly upward.

verses.hebrewText: אוּלָ֗ם אֲ֭נִי אֶדְרֹ֣שׁ אֶל־אֵ֑ל וְאֶל־אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים אָשִׂ֥ים דִּבְרָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I would seek unto God, and unto God would I commit my cause;

jps.text: But as for me, I would seek unto God, and unto God would I commit my cause;

verses.hebrewText: עֹשֶׂ֣ה גְ֭דֹלֹות וְאֵ֣ין חֵ֑קֶר נִ֝פְלָאֹ֗ות עַד־אֵ֥ין מִסְפָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Who doeth great things and unsearchable, marvellous things without number;

jps.text: Who doeth great things and unsearchable, marvellous things without number;

verses.hebrewText: הַנֹּתֵ֣ן מָ֭טָר עַל־פְּנֵי־אָ֑רֶץ וְשֹׁ֥לֵֽחַ מַ֝יִם עַל־פְּנֵ֥י חוּצֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Who giveth rain upon the earth, and sendeth waters upon the fields;

jps.text: Who giveth rain upon the earth, and sendeth waters upon the fields;

verses.hebrewText: לָשׂ֣וּם שְׁפָלִ֣ים לְמָרֹ֑ום וְ֝קֹדְרִ֗ים שָׂ֣גְבוּ יֶֽשַׁע׃
verses.englishText: So that He setteth up on high those that are low, and those that mourn are exalted to safety.

jps.text: So that He setteth up on high those that are low, and those that mourn are exalted to safety.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֭פֵר מַחְשְׁבֹ֣ות עֲרוּמִ֑ים וְֽלֹא־תַעֲשֶׂ֥ינָה יְ֝דֵיהֶ֗ם תּוּשִׁיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He frustrateth the devices of the crafty, so that their hands can perform nothing substantial.

jps.text: He frustrateth the devices of the crafty, so that their hands can perform nothing substantial.

verses.hebrewText: לֹכֵ֣ד חֲכָמִ֣ים בְּעָרְמָ֑ם וַעֲצַ֖ת נִפְתָּלִ֣ים נִמְהָֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: He taketh the wise in their own craftiness; and the counsel of the wily is carried headlong.

jps.text: He taketh the wise in their own craftiness; and the counsel of the wily is carried headlong.

verses.hebrewText: יֹומָ֥ם יְפַגְּשׁוּ־חֹ֑שֶׁךְ וְ֝כַלַּ֗יְלָה יְֽמַשְׁשׁ֥וּ בַֽצָּהֳרָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: They meet with darkness in the day-time, and grope at noonday as in the night.

jps.text: They meet with darkness in the day-time, and grope at noonday as in the night.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣שַׁע מֵ֭חֶרֶב מִפִּיהֶ֑ם וּמִיַּ֖ד חָזָ֣ק אֶבְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: But He saveth from the sword of their mouth, even the needy from the hand of the mighty.

jps.text: But He saveth from the sword of their mouth, even the needy from the hand of the mighty.

verses.hebrewText: וַתְּהִ֣י לַדַּ֣ל תִּקְוָ֑ה וְ֝עֹלָ֗תָה קָ֣פְצָה פִּֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: So the poor hath hope, and iniquity stoppeth her mouth.

jps.text: So the poor hath hope, and iniquity stoppeth her mouth.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֤ה אַשְׁרֵ֣י אֱ֭נֹושׁ יֹוכִחֶ֣נּֽוּ אֱלֹ֑והַּ וּמוּסַ֥ר שַׁ֝דַּ֗י אַל־תִּמְאָֽס׃
verses.englishText: Behold, happy is the man whom God correcteth; therefore despise not thou the chastening of the Almighty.

jps.text: Behold, happy is the man whom God correcteth; therefore despise not thou the chastening of the Almighty.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ה֣וּא יַכְאִ֣יב וְיֶחְבָּ֑שׁ יִ֝מְחַ֗ץ *וְיָדֹו (וְיָדָ֥יו) תִּרְפֶּֽינָה׃
verses.englishText: For He maketh sore, and bindeth up; He woundeth, and His hands make whole.

jps.text: For He maketh sore, and bindeth up; He woundeth, and His hands make whole.

verses.hebrewText: בְּשֵׁ֣שׁ צָ֭רֹות יַצִּילֶ֑ךָּ וּבְשֶׁ֓בַע ׀ לֹא־יִגַּ֖ע בְּךָ֣ רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: He will deliver thee in six troubles; yea, in seven there shall no evil touch thee.

jps.text: He will deliver thee in six troubles; yea, in seven there shall no evil touch thee.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭רָעָב פָּֽדְךָ֣ מִמָּ֑וֶת וּ֝בְמִלְחָמָ֗ה מִ֣ידֵי חָֽרֶב׃
verses.englishText: In famine He will redeem thee from death; and in war from the power of the sword.

jps.text: In famine He will redeem thee from death; and in war from the power of the sword.

verses.hebrewText: בְּשֹׁ֣וט לָ֭שֹׁון תֵּחָבֵ֑א וְֽלֹא־תִירָ֥א מִ֝שֹּׁ֗ד כִּ֣י יָבֹֽוא׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt be hid from the scourge of the tongue; neither shalt thou be afraid of destruction when it cometh.

jps.text: Thou shalt be hid from the scourge of the tongue; neither shalt thou be afraid of destruction when it cometh.

verses.hebrewText: לְשֹׁ֣ד וּלְכָפָ֣ן תִּשְׂחָ֑ק וּֽמֵחַיַּ֥ת הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ אַל־תִּירָֽא׃
verses.englishText: At destruction and famine thou shalt laugh; neither shalt thou be afraid of the beasts of the earth.

jps.text: At destruction and famine thou shalt laugh; neither shalt thou be afraid of the beasts of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י עִם־אַבְנֵ֣י הַשָּׂדֶ֣ה בְרִיתֶ֑ךָ וְחַיַּ֥ת הַ֝שָּׂדֶ֗ה הָשְׁלְמָה־לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For thou shalt be in league with the stones of the field; and the beasts of the field shall be at peace with thee.

jps.text: For thou shalt be in league with the stones of the field; and the beasts of the field shall be at peace with thee.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭יָדַעְתָּ כִּי־שָׁלֹ֣ום אָהֳלֶ֑ךָ וּֽפָקַדְתָּ֥ נָ֝וְךָ וְלֹ֣א תֶחֱטָֽא׃
verses.englishText: And thou shalt know that thy tent is in peace; and thou shalt visit thy habitation, and shalt miss nothing.

jps.text: And thou shalt know that thy tent is in peace; and thou shalt visit thy habitation, and shalt miss nothing.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭יָדַעְתָּ כִּי־רַ֣ב זַרְעֶ֑ךָ וְ֝צֶאֱצָאֶ֗יךָ כְּעֵ֣שֶׂב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt know also that thy seed shall be great, and thine offspring as the grass of the earth.

jps.text: Thou shalt know also that thy seed shall be great, and thine offspring as the grass of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: תָּבֹ֣וא בְכֶ֣לַח אֱלֵי־קָ֑בֶר כַּעֲלֹ֖ות גָּדִ֣ישׁ בְּעִתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt come to thy grave in a ripe age, like as a shock of corn cometh in in its season.

jps.text: Thou shalt come to thy grave in a ripe age, like as a shock of corn cometh in in its season.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּה־זֹ֭את חֲקַרְנ֥וּהָ כֶּֽן־הִ֑יא שְׁ֝מָעֶ֗נָּה וְאַתָּ֥ה דַֽע־לָֽךְ׃ פ
verses.englishText: Lo this, we have searched it, so it is; hear it, and know thou it for thy good.

jps.text: Lo this, we have searched it, so it is; hear it, and know thou it for thy good.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: ל֗וּ שָׁקֹ֣ול יִשָּׁקֵ֣ל כַּעְשִׂ֑י *וְהַיָּתִי (וְ֝הַוָּתִ֗י) בְּֽמֹאזְנַ֥יִם יִשְׂאוּ־יָֽחַד׃
verses.englishText: Oh that my vexation were but weighed, and my calamity laid in the balances altogether!

jps.text: Oh that my vexation were but weighed, and my calamity laid in the balances altogether!

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עַתָּ֗ה מֵחֹ֣ול יַמִּ֣ים יִכְבָּ֑ד עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן דְּבָרַ֥י לָֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: For now it would be heavier than the sand of the seas; therefore are my words broken.

jps.text: For now it would be heavier than the sand of the seas; therefore are my words broken.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י חִצֵּ֪י שַׁדַּ֡י עִמָּדִ֗י אֲשֶׁ֣ר חֲ֭מָתָם שֹׁתָ֣ה רוּחִ֑י בִּעוּתֵ֖י אֱלֹ֣והַּ יַֽעַרְכֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: For the arrows of the Almighty are within me, the poison whereof my spirit drinketh up; the terrors of God do set themselves in array against me.

jps.text: For the arrows of the Almighty are within me, the poison whereof my spirit drinketh up; the terrors of God do set themselves in array against me.

verses.hebrewText: הֲיִֽנְהַק־פֶּ֥רֶא עֲלֵי־דֶ֑שֶׁא אִ֥ם יִגְעֶה־שֹּׁ֝֗ור עַל־בְּלִילֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Doth the wild ass bray when he hath grass? or loweth the ox over his fodder?

jps.text: Doth the wild ass bray when he hath grass? or loweth the ox over his fodder?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיֵאָכֵ֣ל תָּ֭פֵל מִבְּלִי־מֶ֑לַח אִם־יֶשׁ־טַ֝֗עַם בְּרִ֣יר חַלָּמֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: Can that which hath no savour be eaten without salt? or is there any taste in the juice of mallows?

jps.text: Can that which hath no savour be eaten without salt? or is there any taste in the juice of mallows?

verses.hebrewText: מֵאֲנָ֣ה לִנְגֹּ֣ועַ נַפְשִׁ֑י הֵ֝֗מָּה כִּדְוֵ֥י לַחְמִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My soul refuseth to touch them; they are as the sickness of my flesh.

jps.text: My soul refuseth to touch them; they are as the sickness of my flesh.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יִ֭תֵּן תָּבֹ֣וא שֶֽׁאֱלָתִ֑י וְ֝תִקְוָתִ֗י יִתֵּ֥ן אֱלֹֽוהַּ׃
verses.englishText: Oh that I might have my request, and that God would grant me the thing that I long for!

jps.text: Oh that I might have my request, and that God would grant me the thing that I long for!

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹאֵ֣ל אֱ֭לֹוהַּ וִֽידַכְּאֵ֑נִי יַתֵּ֥ר יָ֝דֹ֗ו וִֽיבַצְּעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Even that it would please God to crush me; that He would let loose His hand, and cut me off!

jps.text: Even that it would please God to crush me; that He would let loose His hand, and cut me off!

verses.hebrewText: וּ֥תְהִי עֹ֨וד ׀ נֶ֘חָ֤מָתִ֗י וַאֲסַלְּדָ֣ה בְ֭חִילָה לֹ֣א יַחְמֹ֑ול כִּי־לֹ֥א כִ֝חַ֗דְתִּי אִמְרֵ֥י קָדֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: Then should I yet have comfort; yea, I would exult in pain, though He spare not; for I have not denied the words of the Holy One.

jps.text: Then should I yet have comfort; yea, I would exult in pain, though He spare not; for I have not denied the words of the Holy One.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־כֹּחִ֥י כִֽי־אֲיַחֵ֑ל וּמַה־קִּ֝צִּ֗י כִּֽי־אַאֲרִ֥יךְ נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: What is my strength, that I should wait? and what is mine end, that I should be patient?

jps.text: What is my strength, that I should wait? and what is mine end, that I should be patient?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־כֹּ֣חַ אֲבָנִ֣ים כֹּחִ֑י אִֽם־בְּשָׂרִ֥י נָחֽוּשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Is my strength the strength of stones? or is my flesh of brass?

jps.text: Is my strength the strength of stones? or is my flesh of brass?

verses.hebrewText: הַאִ֬ם אֵ֣ין עֶזְרָתִ֣י בִ֑י וְ֝תֻשִׁיָּ֗ה נִדְּחָ֥ה מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Is it that I have no help in me, and that sound wisdom is driven quite from me?

jps.text: Is it that I have no help in me, and that sound wisdom is driven quite from me?

verses.hebrewText: לַמָּ֣ס מֵרֵעֵ֣הוּ חָ֑סֶד וְיִרְאַ֖ת שַׁדַּ֣י יַעֲזֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: To him that is ready to faint kindness is due from his friend, even to him that forsaketh the fear of the Almighty.

jps.text: To him that is ready to faint kindness is due from his friend, even to him that forsaketh the fear of the Almighty.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭חַי בָּגְד֣וּ כְמֹו־נָ֑חַל כַּאֲפִ֖יק נְחָלִ֣ים יַעֲבֹֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: My brethren have dealt deceitfully as a brook, as the channel of brooks that overflow,

jps.text: My brethren have dealt deceitfully as a brook, as the channel of brooks that overflow,

verses.hebrewText: הַקֹּדְרִ֥ים מִנִּי־קָ֑רַח עָ֝לֵ֗ימֹו יִתְעַלֶּם־שָֽׁלֶג׃
verses.englishText: Which are black by reason of the ice, and wherein the snow hideth itself;

jps.text: Which are black by reason of the ice, and wherein the snow hideth itself;

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭עֵת יְזֹרְב֣וּ נִצְמָ֑תוּ בְּ֝חֻמֹּ֗ו נִדְעֲכ֥וּ מִמְּקֹומָֽם׃
verses.englishText: What time they wax warm, they vanish, when it is hot, they are consumed out of their place.

jps.text: What time they wax warm, they vanish, when it is hot, they are consumed out of their place.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭לָּ֣פְתוּ אָרְחֹ֣ות דַּרְכָּ֑ם יַעֲל֖וּ בַתֹּ֣הוּ וְיֹאבֵֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: The paths of their way do wind, they go up into the waste, and are lost.

jps.text: The paths of their way do wind, they go up into the waste, and are lost.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭בִּיטוּ אָרְחֹ֣ות תֵּמָ֑א הֲלִיכֹ֥ת שְׁ֝בָ֗א קִוּוּ־לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: The caravans of Tema looked, the companies of Sheba waited for them —

jps.text: The caravans of Tema looked, the companies of Sheba waited for them —

verses.hebrewText: בֹּ֥שׁוּ כִּֽי־בָטָ֑ח בָּ֥אוּ עָ֝דֶ֗יהָ וַיֶּחְפָּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: They were ashamed because they had hoped; they came thither, and were confounded.

jps.text: They were ashamed because they had hoped; they came thither, and were confounded.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עַ֭תָּה הֱיִ֣יתֶם *לֹא (לֹ֑ו) תִּֽרְא֥וּ חֲ֝תַ֗ת וַתִּירָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: For now ye are become His; ye see a terror, and are afraid.

jps.text: For now ye are become His; ye see a terror, and are afraid.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‍ֽכִי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי הָ֣בוּ לִ֑י וּ֝מִכֹּחֲכֶ֗ם שִׁחֲד֥וּ בַעֲדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Did I say: 'Give unto me'? or: 'Offer a present for me of your substance'?

jps.text: Did I say: 'Give unto me'? or: 'Offer a present for me of your substance'?

verses.hebrewText: וּמַלְּט֥וּנִי מִיַּד־צָ֑ר וּמִיַּ֖ד עָרִיצִ֣ים תִּפְדּֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: or: 'Deliver me from the adversary's hand'? or: 'Redeem me from the hand of the oppressors'?

jps.text: or: 'Deliver me from the adversary's hand'? or: 'Redeem me from the hand of the oppressors'?

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֭ורוּנִי וַאֲנִ֣י אַחֲרִ֑ישׁ וּמַה־שָּׁ֝גִ֗יתִי הָבִ֥ינוּ לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Teach me, and I will hold my peace; and cause me to understand wherein I have erred.

jps.text: Teach me, and I will hold my peace; and cause me to understand wherein I have erred.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־נִּמְרְצ֥וּ אִמְרֵי־יֹ֑שֶׁר וּמַה־יֹּוכִ֖יחַ הֹוכֵ֣חַ מִכֶּֽם׃
verses.englishText: How forcible are words of uprightness! But what doth your arguing argue?

jps.text: How forcible are words of uprightness! But what doth your arguing argue?

verses.hebrewText: הַלְהֹוכַ֣ח מִלִּ֣ים תַּחְשֹׁ֑בוּ וּ֝לְר֗וּחַ אִמְרֵ֥י נֹאָֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Do ye hold words to be an argument, but the speeches of one that is desperate to be wind?

jps.text: Do ye hold words to be an argument, but the speeches of one that is desperate to be wind?

verses.hebrewText: אַף־עַל־יָתֹ֥ום תַּפִּ֑ילוּ וְ֝תִכְר֗וּ עַל־רֵֽיעֲכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Yea, ye would cast lots upon the fatherless, and dig a pit for your friend.

jps.text: Yea, ye would cast lots upon the fatherless, and dig a pit for your friend.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭עַתָּה הֹואִ֣ילוּ פְנוּ־בִ֑י וְעַל־פְּ֝נֵיכֶ֗ם אִם־אֲכַזֵּֽב׃
verses.englishText: Now therefore be pleased to look upon me; for surely I shall not lie to your face.

jps.text: Now therefore be pleased to look upon me; for surely I shall not lie to your face.

verses.hebrewText: שֻֽׁבוּ־נָ֭א אַל־תְּהִ֣י עַוְלָ֑ה *וְשֻׁבִי (וְשׁ֥וּבוּ) עֹ֝וד צִדְקִי־בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Return, I pray you, let there be no injustice; yea, return again, my cause is righteous.

jps.text: Return, I pray you, let there be no injustice; yea, return again, my cause is righteous.

verses.hebrewText: הֲיֵשׁ־בִּלְשֹׁונִ֥י עַוְלָ֑ה אִם־חִ֝כִּ֗י לֹא־יָבִ֥ין הַוֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: Is there injustice on my tongue? Cannot my taste discern crafty devices?

jps.text: Is there injustice on my tongue? Cannot my taste discern crafty devices?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹא־צָבָ֣א לֶאֱנֹ֣ושׁ *עַל־ (עֲלֵי)־אָ֑רֶץ וְכִימֵ֖י שָׂכִ֣יר יָמָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Is there not a time of service to man upon earth? And are not his days like the days of a hireling?

jps.text: Is there not a time of service to man upon earth? And are not his days like the days of a hireling?

verses.hebrewText: כְּעֶ֥בֶד יִשְׁאַף־צֵ֑ל וּ֝כְשָׂכִ֗יר יְקַוֶּ֥ה פָעֳלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: As a servant that eagerly longeth for the shadow, and as a hireling that looketh for his wages;

jps.text: As a servant that eagerly longeth for the shadow, and as a hireling that looketh for his wages;

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֤ן הָנְחַ֣לְתִּי לִ֭י יַרְחֵי־שָׁ֑וְא וְלֵילֹ֥ות עָ֝מָ֗ל מִנּוּ־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: So am I made to possess — months of vanity, and wearisome nights are appointed to me.

jps.text: So am I made to possess — months of vanity, and wearisome nights are appointed to me.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־שָׁכַ֗בְתִּי וְאָמַ֗רְתִּי מָתַ֣י אָ֭קוּם וּמִדַּד־עָ֑רֶב וְשָׂבַ֖עְתִּי נְדֻדִ֣ים עֲדֵי־נָֽשֶׁף׃
verses.englishText: When I lie down, I say: 'When shall I arise?' But the night is long, and I am full of tossings to and fro unto the dawning of the day.

jps.text: When I lie down, I say: 'When shall I arise?' But the night is long, and I am full of tossings to and fro unto the dawning of the day.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֘בַ֤שׁ בְּשָׂרִ֣י רִ֭מָּה *וְגִישׁ (וְג֣וּשׁ) עָפָ֑ר עֹורִ֥י רָ֝גַ֗ע וַיִּמָּאֵֽס׃
verses.englishText: My flesh is clothed with worms and clods of dust; my skin closeth up and breaketh out afresh.

jps.text: My flesh is clothed with worms and clods of dust; my skin closeth up and breaketh out afresh.

verses.hebrewText: יָמַ֣י קַ֭לּוּ מִנִּי־אָ֑רֶג וַ֝יִּכְל֗וּ בְּאֶ֣פֶס תִּקְוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: My days are swifter than a weaver's shuttle, and are spent without hope.

jps.text: My days are swifter than a weaver's shuttle, and are spent without hope.

verses.hebrewText: זְ֭כֹר כִּי־ר֣וּחַ חַיָּ֑י לֹא־תָשׁ֥וּב עֵ֝ינִ֗י לִרְאֹ֥ות טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: O remember that my life is a breath; mine eye shall no more see good.

jps.text: O remember that my life is a breath; mine eye shall no more see good.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־תְ֭שׁוּרֵנִי עֵ֣ין רֹ֑אִי עֵינֶ֖יךָ בִּ֣י וְאֵינֶֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: The eye of him that seeth me shall behold me no more; while Thine eyes are upon me, I am gone.

jps.text: The eye of him that seeth me shall behold me no more; while Thine eyes are upon me, I am gone.

verses.hebrewText: כָּלָ֣ה עָ֭נָן וַיֵּלַ֑ךְ כֵּ֥ן יֹורֵ֥ד שְׁ֝אֹ֗ול לֹ֣א יַעֲלֽ͏ֶה׃
verses.englishText: As the cloud is consumed and vanisheth away, so he that goeth down to the grave shall come up no more.

jps.text: As the cloud is consumed and vanisheth away, so he that goeth down to the grave shall come up no more.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יָשׁ֣וּב עֹ֣וד לְבֵיתֹ֑ו וְלֹא־יַכִּירֶ֖נּוּ עֹ֣וד מְקֹמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He shall return no more to his house, neither shall his place know him any more.

jps.text: He shall return no more to his house, neither shall his place know him any more.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אֲנִי֮ לֹ֤א אֶחֱשָׂ֫ךְ פִּ֥י אֲ‍ֽ֭דַבְּרָה בְּצַ֣ר רוּחִ֑י אָ֝שִׂ֗יחָה בְּמַ֣ר נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Therefore I will not refrain my mouth; I will speak in the anguish of my spirit; I will complain in the bitterness of my soul.

jps.text: Therefore I will not refrain my mouth; I will speak in the anguish of my spirit; I will complain in the bitterness of my soul.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‍ֽיָם־אָ֭נִי אִם־תַּנִּ֑ין כִּֽי־תָשִׂ֖ים עָלַ֣י מִשְׁמָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Am I a sea, or a sea-monster, that Thou settest a watch over me?

jps.text: Am I a sea, or a sea-monster, that Thou settest a watch over me?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי תְּנַחֲמֵ֣נִי עַרְשִׂ֑י יִשָּׂ֥א בְ֝שִׂיחִ֗י מִשְׁכָּבִֽי׃
verses.englishText: When I say: 'My bed shall comfort me, my couch shall ease my complaint';

jps.text: When I say: 'My bed shall comfort me, my couch shall ease my complaint';

verses.hebrewText: וְחִתַּתַּ֥נִי בַחֲלֹמֹ֑ות וּֽמֵחֶזְיֹנֹ֥ות תְּבַעֲתַֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Then Thou scarest me with dreams, and terrifiest me through visions;

jps.text: Then Thou scarest me with dreams, and terrifiest me through visions;

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּבְחַ֣ר מַחֲנָ֣ק נַפְשִׁ֑י מָ֝֗וֶת מֵֽעַצְמֹותָֽי׃
verses.englishText: So that my soul chooseth strangling, and death rather than these my bones.

jps.text: So that my soul chooseth strangling, and death rather than these my bones.

verses.hebrewText: מָ֭אַסְתִּי לֹא־לְעֹלָ֣ם אֶֽחְיֶ֑ה חֲדַ֥ל מִ֝מֶּ֗נִּי כִּי־הֶ֥בֶל יָמָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I loathe it; I shall not live alway; let me alone; for my days are vanity.

jps.text: I loathe it; I shall not live alway; let me alone; for my days are vanity.

verses.hebrewText: מָֽה־אֱ֭נֹושׁ כִּ֣י תְגַדְּלֶ֑נּוּ וְכִי־תָשִׁ֖ית אֵלָ֣יו לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: What is man, that Thou shouldest magnify him, and that Thou shouldest set Thy heart upon him,

jps.text: What is man, that Thou shouldest magnify him, and that Thou shouldest set Thy heart upon him,

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּפְקְדֶ֥נּוּ לִבְקָרִ֑ים לִ֝רְגָעִ֗ים תִּבְחָנֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: And that Thou shouldest remember him every morning, and try him every moment?

jps.text: And that Thou shouldest remember him every morning, and try him every moment?

verses.hebrewText: כַּ֭מָּה לֹא־תִשְׁעֶ֣ה מִמֶּ֑נִּי לֹֽא־תַ֝רְפֵּ֗נִי עַד־בִּלְעִ֥י רֻקִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: How long wilt Thou not look away from me, nor let me alone till I swallow down my spittle?

jps.text: How long wilt Thou not look away from me, nor let me alone till I swallow down my spittle?

verses.hebrewText: חָטָ֡אתִי מָ֤ה אֶפְעַ֨ל ׀ לָךְ֮ נֹצֵ֪ר הָאָ֫דָ֥ם לָ֤מָה שַׂמְתַּ֣נִי לְמִפְגָּ֣ע לָ֑ךְ וָאֶהְיֶ֖ה עָלַ֣י לְמַשָּֽׂא׃
verses.englishText: If I have sinned, what do I unto Thee, O Thou watcher of men? Why hast Thou set me as a mark for Thee, so that I am a burden to myself?

jps.text: If I have sinned, what do I unto Thee, O Thou watcher of men? Why hast Thou set me as a mark for Thee, so that I am a burden to myself?

verses.hebrewText: וּמֶ֤ה ׀ לֹא־תִשָּׂ֣א פִשְׁעִי֮ וְתַעֲבִ֪יר אֶת־עֲוֹ֫נִ֥י כִּֽי־עַ֭תָּה לֶעָפָ֣ר אֶשְׁכָּ֑ב וְשִׁ֖חֲרְתַּ֣נִי וְאֵינֶֽנִּי׃ פ
verses.englishText: And why dost Thou not pardon my transgression, and take away mine iniquity? For now shall I lie down in the dust; and Thou wilt seek me, but I shall not be.

jps.text: And why dost Thou not pardon my transgression, and take away mine iniquity? For now shall I lie down in the dust; and Thou wilt seek me, but I shall not be.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן בִּלְדַּ֥ד הַשּׁוּחִ֗י וַיֹאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אָ֥ן תְּמַלֶּל־אֵ֑לֶּה וְר֥וּחַ כַּ֝בִּיר אִמְרֵי־פִֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: How long wilt thou speak these things, seeing that the words of thy mouth are as a mighty wind?

jps.text: How long wilt thou speak these things, seeing that the words of thy mouth are as a mighty wind?

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭אֵל יְעַוֵּ֣ת מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וְאִם־שַׁ֝דַּ֗י יְעַוֵּֽת־צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.englishText: Doth God pervert judgment? Or doth the Almighty pervert justice?

jps.text: Doth God pervert judgment? Or doth the Almighty pervert justice?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־בָּנֶ֥יךָ חָֽטְאוּ־לֹ֑ו וַֽ֝יְשַׁלְּחֵ֗ם בְּיַד־פִּשְׁעָֽם׃
verses.englishText: If thy children sinned against Him, He delivered them into the hand of their transgression.

jps.text: If thy children sinned against Him, He delivered them into the hand of their transgression.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אַ֭תָּה תְּשַׁחֵ֣ר אֶל־אֵ֑ל וְאֶל־שַׁ֝דַּ֗י תִּתְחַנָּֽן׃
verses.englishText: If thou wouldest seek earnestly unto God, and make thy supplication to the Almighty;

jps.text: If thou wouldest seek earnestly unto God, and make thy supplication to the Almighty;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־זַ֥ךְ וְיָשָׁ֗ר אָ֥תָּה כִּי־עַ֭תָּה יָעִ֣יר עָלֶ֑יךָ וְ֝שִׁלַּ֗ם נְוַ֣ת צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: If thou wert pure and upright; surely now He would awake for thee, and make the habitation of thy righteousness prosperous.

jps.text: If thou wert pure and upright; surely now He would awake for thee, and make the habitation of thy righteousness prosperous.

verses.hebrewText: וְהָיָ֣ה רֵאשִׁיתְךָ֣ מִצְעָ֑ר וְ֝אַחֲרִיתְךָ֗ יִשְׂגֶּ֥ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: And though thy beginning was small, yet thy end should greatly increase.

jps.text: And though thy beginning was small, yet thy end should greatly increase.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שְׁאַל־נָ֭א לְדֹ֣ר רִישֹׁ֑ון וְ֝כֹונֵ֗ן לְחֵ֣קֶר אֲבֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For inquire, I pray thee, of the former generation, and apply thyself to that which their fathers have searched out —

jps.text: For inquire, I pray thee, of the former generation, and apply thyself to that which their fathers have searched out —

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תְמֹ֣ול אֲ֭נַחְנוּ וְלֹ֣א נֵדָ֑ע כִּ֤י צֵ֖ל יָמֵ֣ינוּ עֲלֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: For we are but of yesterday, and know nothing, because our days upon earth are a shadow —

jps.text: For we are but of yesterday, and know nothing, because our days upon earth are a shadow —

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹא־הֵ֣ם יֹ֭ורוּךָ יֹ֣אמְרוּ לָ֑ךְ וּ֝מִלִּבָּ֗ם יֹוצִ֥אוּ מִלִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Shall not they teach thee, and tell thee, and utter words out of their heart?

jps.text: Shall not they teach thee, and tell thee, and utter words out of their heart?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיִֽגְאֶה־גֹּ֭מֶא בְּלֹ֣א בִצָּ֑ה יִשְׂגֶּה־אָ֥חוּ בְלִי־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Can the rush shoot up without mire? Can the reed-grass grow without water?

jps.text: Can the rush shoot up without mire? Can the reed-grass grow without water?

verses.hebrewText: עֹדֶ֣נּוּ בְ֭אִבֹּו לֹ֣א יִקָּטֵ֑ף וְלִפְנֵ֖י כָל־חָצִ֣יר יִיבָֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Whilst it is yet in its greenness, and not cut down, it withereth before any other herb.

jps.text: Whilst it is yet in its greenness, and not cut down, it withereth before any other herb.

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֗ן אָ֭רְחֹות כָּל־שֹׁ֣כְחֵי אֵ֑ל וְתִקְוַ֖ת חָנֵ֣ף תֹּאבֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: So are the paths of all that forget God; and the hope of the godless man shall perish;

jps.text: So are the paths of all that forget God; and the hope of the godless man shall perish;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־יָקֹ֥וט כִּסְלֹ֑ו וּבֵ֥ית עַ֝כָּבִ֗ישׁ מִבְטַחֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Whose confidence is gossamer, and whose trust is a spider's web.

jps.text: Whose confidence is gossamer, and whose trust is a spider's web.

verses.hebrewText: יִשָּׁעֵ֣ן עַל־בֵּ֭יתֹו וְלֹ֣א יַעֲמֹ֑ד יַחֲזִ֥יק בֹּ֝֗ו וְלֹ֣א יָקֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: He shall lean upon his house, but it shall not stand; he shall hold fast thereby, but it shall not endure.

jps.text: He shall lean upon his house, but it shall not stand; he shall hold fast thereby, but it shall not endure.

verses.hebrewText: רָטֹ֣ב ה֖וּא לִפְנֵי־שָׁ֑מֶשׁ וְעַ֥ל גַּ֝נָּתֹ֗ו יֹֽנַקְתֹּ֥ו תֵצֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: He is green before the sun, and his shoots go forth over his garden.

jps.text: He is green before the sun, and his shoots go forth over his garden.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־גַּ֭ל שָֽׁרָשָׁ֣יו יְסֻבָּ֑כוּ בֵּ֖ית אֲבָנִ֣ים יֶחֱזֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: His roots are wrapped about the heap, he beholdeth the place of stones.

jps.text: His roots are wrapped about the heap, he beholdeth the place of stones.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יְבַלְּעֶ֥נּוּ מִמְּקֹומֹ֑ו וְכִ֥חֶשׁ בֹּ֝֗ו לֹ֣א רְאִיתִֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: If he be destroyed from his place, then it shall deny him: 'I have not seen thee.'

jps.text: If he be destroyed from his place, then it shall deny him: 'I have not seen thee.'

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־ה֭וּא מְשֹׂ֣ושׂ דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וּ֝מֵעָפָ֗ר אַחֵ֥ר יִצְמָֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, this is the joy of his way, and out of the earth shall others spring.

jps.text: Behold, this is the joy of his way, and out of the earth shall others spring.

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־אֵ֭ל לֹ֣א יִמְאַס־תָּ֑ם וְלֹֽא־יַ֝חֲזִ֗יק בְּיַד־מְרֵעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Behold, God will not cast away an innocent man, neither will He uphold the evil-doers;

jps.text: Behold, God will not cast away an innocent man, neither will He uphold the evil-doers;

verses.hebrewText: עַד־יְמַלֵּ֣ה שְׂחֹ֣וק פִּ֑יךָ וּשְׂפָתֶ֥יךָ תְרוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Till He fill thy mouth with laughter, and thy lips with shouting.

jps.text: Till He fill thy mouth with laughter, and thy lips with shouting.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׂנְאֶ֥יךָ יִלְבְּשׁוּ־בֹ֑שֶׁת וְאֹ֖הֶל רְשָׁעִ֣ים אֵינֶֽנּוּ׃ פ
verses.englishText: They that hate thee shall be clothed with shame; and the tent of the wicked shall be no more.

jps.text: They that hate thee shall be clothed with shame; and the tent of the wicked shall be no more.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭מְנָם יָדַ֣עְתִּי כִי־כֵ֑ן וּמַה־יִּצְדַּ֖ק אֱנֹ֣ושׁ עִם־אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Of a truth I know that it is so; and how can man be just with God?

jps.text: Of a truth I know that it is so; and how can man be just with God?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יַ֭חְפֹּץ לָרִ֣יב עִמֹּ֑ו לֹֽא־יַ֝עֲנֶ֗נּוּ אַחַ֥ת מִנִּי־אָֽלֶף׃
verses.englishText: If one should desire to contend with Him, he could not answer Him one of a thousand.

jps.text: If one should desire to contend with Him, he could not answer Him one of a thousand.

verses.hebrewText: חֲכַ֣ם לֵ֭בָב וְאַמִּ֣יץ כֹּ֑חַ מִֽי־הִקְשָׁ֥ה אֵ֝לָ֗יו וַיִּשְׁלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He is wise in heart, and mighty in strength; who hath hardened himself against Him, and prospered?

jps.text: He is wise in heart, and mighty in strength; who hath hardened himself against Him, and prospered?

verses.hebrewText: הַמַּעְתִּ֣יק הָ֭רִים וְלֹ֣א יָדָ֑עוּ אֲשֶׁ֖ר הֲפָכָ֣ם בְּאַפֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Who removeth the mountains, and they know it not, when He overturneth them in His anger.

jps.text: Who removeth the mountains, and they know it not, when He overturneth them in His anger.

verses.hebrewText: הַמַּרְגִּ֣יז אֶ֭רֶץ מִמְּקֹומָ֑הּ וְ֝עַמּוּדֶ֗יהָ יִתְפַלָּצֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: Who shaketh the earth out of her place, and the pillars thereof tremble.

jps.text: Who shaketh the earth out of her place, and the pillars thereof tremble.

verses.hebrewText: הָאֹמֵ֣ר לַ֭חֶרֶס וְלֹ֣א יִזְרָ֑ח וּבְעַ֖ד כֹּוכָבִ֣ים יַחְתֹּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Who commandeth the sun, and it riseth not; and sealeth up the stars.

jps.text: Who commandeth the sun, and it riseth not; and sealeth up the stars.

verses.hebrewText: נֹטֶ֣ה שָׁמַ֣יִם לְבַדֹּ֑ו וְ֝דֹורֵ֗ךְ עַל־בָּ֥מֳתֵי יָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Who alone stretcheth out the heavens, and treadeth upon the waves of the sea.

jps.text: Who alone stretcheth out the heavens, and treadeth upon the waves of the sea.

verses.hebrewText: עֹֽשֶׂה־עָ֭שׁ כְּסִ֥יל וְכִימָ֗ה וְחַדְרֵ֥י תֵמָֽן׃
verses.englishText: Who maketh the Bear, Orion, and the Pleiades, and the chambers of the south.

jps.text: Who maketh the Bear, Orion, and the Pleiades, and the chambers of the south.

verses.hebrewText: עֹשֶׂ֣ה גְ֭דֹלֹות עַד־אֵ֣ין חֵ֑קֶר וְנִפְלָאֹ֗ות עַד־אֵ֥ין מִסְפָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Who doeth great things past finding out; yea, marvellous things without number.

jps.text: Who doeth great things past finding out; yea, marvellous things without number.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן יַעֲבֹ֣ר עָ֭לַי וְלֹ֣א אֶרְאֶ֑ה וְ֝יַחֲלֹ֗ף וְֽלֹא־אָבִ֥ין לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Lo, He goeth by me, and I see Him not. He passeth on also, but I perceive Him not.

jps.text: Lo, He goeth by me, and I see Him not. He passeth on also, but I perceive Him not.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן יַ֭חְתֹּף מִ֣י יְשִׁיבֶ֑נּוּ מִֽי־יֹאמַ֥ר אֵ֝לָ֗יו מַֽה־תַּעֲשֶֽׂה׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He snatcheth away, who can hinder Him? Who will say unto Him: 'What doest Thou?'

jps.text: Behold, He snatcheth away, who can hinder Him? Who will say unto Him: 'What doest Thou?'

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹוהַּ לֹא־יָשִׁ֣יב אַפֹּ֑ו *תַּחַתֹו (תַּחְתָּ֥יו) שָׁ֝חֲח֗וּ עֹ֣זְרֵי רָֽהַב׃
verses.englishText: God will not withdraw His anger; the helpers of Rahab did stoop under Him.

jps.text: God will not withdraw His anger; the helpers of Rahab did stoop under Him.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭ף כִּֽי־אָנֹכִ֣י אֶֽעֱנֶ֑נּוּ אֶבְחֲרָ֖ה דְבָרַ֣י עִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: How much less shall I answer Him, and choose out my arguments with Him?

jps.text: How much less shall I answer Him, and choose out my arguments with Him?

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר אִם־צָ֭דַקְתִּי לֹ֣א אֶעֱנֶ֑ה לִ֝מְשֹׁפְטִ֗י אֶתְחַנָּֽן׃
verses.englishText: Whom, though I were righteous, yet would I not answer; I would make supplication to Him that contendeth with me.

jps.text: Whom, though I were righteous, yet would I not answer; I would make supplication to Him that contendeth with me.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־קָרָ֥אתִי וַֽיַּעֲנֵ֑נִי לֹֽא־אַ֝אֲמִ֗ין כִּֽי־יַאֲזִ֥ין קֹולִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I had called, and He had answered me; yet would I not believe that He would hearken unto my voice —

jps.text: If I had called, and He had answered me; yet would I not believe that He would hearken unto my voice —

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־בִּשְׂעָרָ֥ה יְשׁוּפֵ֑נִי וְהִרְבָּ֖ה פְצָעַ֣י חִנָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: He that would break me with a tempest, and multiply my wounds without cause;

jps.text: He that would break me with a tempest, and multiply my wounds without cause;

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יִ֭תְּנֵנִי הָשֵׁ֣ב רוּחִ֑י כִּ֥י יַ֝שְׂבִּעַ֗נִי מַמְּרֹרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: That would not suffer me to take my breath, but fill me with bitterness.

jps.text: That would not suffer me to take my breath, but fill me with bitterness.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לְכֹ֣חַ אַמִּ֣יץ הִנֵּ֑ה וְאִם־לְ֝מִשְׁפָּ֗ט מִ֣י יֹועִידֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: If it be a matter of strength, lo, He is mighty! and if of justice, who will appoint me a time?

jps.text: If it be a matter of strength, lo, He is mighty! and if of justice, who will appoint me a time?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶ֭צְדָּק פִּ֣י יַרְשִׁיעֵ֑נִי תָּֽם־אָ֝֗נִי וַֽיַּעְקְשֵֽׁנִי׃
verses.englishText: Though I be righteous, mine own mouth shall condemn me; though I be innocent, He shall prove me perverse.

jps.text: Though I be righteous, mine own mouth shall condemn me; though I be innocent, He shall prove me perverse.

verses.hebrewText: תָּֽם־אָ֭נִי לֹֽא־אֵדַ֥ע נַפְשִׁ֗י אֶמְאַ֥ס חַיָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I am innocent — I regard not myself, I despise my life.

jps.text: I am innocent — I regard not myself, I despise my life.

verses.hebrewText: אַחַ֗ת הִ֥יא עַל־כֵּ֥ן אָמַ֑רְתִּי תָּ֥ם וְ֝רָשָׁ֗ע ה֣וּא מְכַלֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: It is all one — therefore I say: He destroyeth the innocent and the wicked.

jps.text: It is all one — therefore I say: He destroyeth the innocent and the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־שֹׁ֭וט יָמִ֣ית פִּתְאֹ֑ם לְמַסַּ֖ת נְקִיִּ֣ם יִלְעָֽג׃
verses.englishText: If the scourge slay suddenly, He will mock at the calamity of the guiltless.

jps.text: If the scourge slay suddenly, He will mock at the calamity of the guiltless.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֤רֶץ ׀ נִתְּנָ֬ה בְֽיַד־רָשָׁ֗ע פְּנֵֽי־שֹׁפְטֶ֥יהָ יְכַסֶּ֑ה אִם־לֹ֖א אֵפֹ֣וא מִי־הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: The earth is given into the hand of the wicked; he covereth the faces of the judges thereof; if it be not He, who then is it?

jps.text: The earth is given into the hand of the wicked; he covereth the faces of the judges thereof; if it be not He, who then is it?

verses.hebrewText: וְיָמַ֣י קַ֭לּוּ מִנִּי־רָ֑ץ בָּֽ֝רְח֗וּ לֹא־רָא֥וּ טֹובָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Now my days are swifter than a runner; they flee away, they see no good.

jps.text: Now my days are swifter than a runner; they flee away, they see no good.

verses.hebrewText: חָ֭לְפוּ עִם־אֳנִיֹּ֣ות אֵבֶ֑ה כְּ֝נֶ֗שֶׁר יָט֥וּשׂ עֲלֵי־אֹֽכֶל׃
verses.englishText: They are passed away as the swift ships; as the vulture that swoopeth on the prey.

jps.text: They are passed away as the swift ships; as the vulture that swoopeth on the prey.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אָ֭מְרִי אֶשְׁכְּחָ֣ה שִׂיחִ֑י אֶעֶזְבָ֖ה פָנַ֣י וְאַבְלִֽיגָה׃
verses.englishText: If I say: 'I will forget my complaint, I will put off my sad countenance, and be of good cheer',

jps.text: If I say: 'I will forget my complaint, I will put off my sad countenance, and be of good cheer',

verses.hebrewText: יָגֹ֥רְתִּי כָל־עַצְּבֹתָ֑י יָ֝דַ֗עְתִּי כִּי־לֹ֥א תְנַקֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I am afraid of all my pains, I know that Thou wilt not hold me guiltless.

jps.text: I am afraid of all my pains, I know that Thou wilt not hold me guiltless.

verses.hebrewText: אָנֹכִ֥י אֶרְשָׁ֑ע לָמָּה־זֶּ֝֗ה הֶ֣בֶל אִיגָֽע׃
verses.englishText: I shall be condemned; why then do I labour in vain?

jps.text: I shall be condemned; why then do I labour in vain?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־הִתְרָחַ֥צְתִּי *בְמֹו (בְמֵי)־שָׁ֑לֶג וַ֝הֲזִכֹּ֗ותִי בְּבֹ֣ר כַּפָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I wash myself with snow water, and make my hands never so clean;

jps.text: If I wash myself with snow water, and make my hands never so clean;

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭ז בַּשַּׁ֣חַת תִּטְבְּלֵ֑נִי וְ֝תִֽעֲב֗וּנִי שַׂלְמֹותָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Yet wilt Thou plunge me in the ditch, and mine own clothes shall abhor me.

jps.text: Yet wilt Thou plunge me in the ditch, and mine own clothes shall abhor me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־לֹא־אִ֣ישׁ כָּמֹ֣נִי אֶֽעֱנֶ֑נּוּ נָבֹ֥וא יַ֝חְדָּ֗ו בַּמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: For He is not a man, as I am, that I should answer Him, that we should come together in judgment.

jps.text: For He is not a man, as I am, that I should answer Him, that we should come together in judgment.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֣א יֵשׁ־בֵּינֵ֣ינוּ מֹוכִ֑יחַ יָשֵׁ֖ת יָדֹ֣ו עַל־שְׁנֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: There is no arbiter betwixt us, that might lay his hand upon us both.

jps.text: There is no arbiter betwixt us, that might lay his hand upon us both.

verses.hebrewText: יָסֵ֣ר מֵעָלַ֣י שִׁבְטֹ֑ו וְ֝אֵמָתֹ֗ו אַֽל־תְּבַעֲתַֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Let Him take His rod away from me, and let not His terror make me afraid;

jps.text: Let Him take His rod away from me, and let not His terror make me afraid;

verses.hebrewText: אַֽ֭דַבְּרָה וְלֹ֣א אִירָאֶ֑נּוּ כִּ֥י לֹא־כֵ֥ן אָ֝נֹכִ֗י עִמָּדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Then would I speak, and not fear Him; for I am not so with myself.

jps.text: Then would I speak, and not fear Him; for I am not so with myself.

verses.hebrewText: נָֽקְטָ֥ה נַפְשִׁ֗י בְּחַ֫יָּ֥י אֶֽעֶזְבָ֣ה עָלַ֣י שִׂיחִ֑י אֲ֝דַבְּרָה֗ בְּמַ֣ר נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: My soul is weary of my life; I will give free course to my complaint; I will speak in the bitterness of my soul.

jps.text: My soul is weary of my life; I will give free course to my complaint; I will speak in the bitterness of my soul.

verses.hebrewText: אֹמַ֣ר אֶל־אֱ֭לֹוהַּ אַל־תַּרְשִׁיעֵ֑נִי הֹֽ֝ודִיעֵ֗נִי עַ֣ל מַה־תְּרִיבֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I will say unto God: Do not condemn me; make me know wherefore Thou contendest with me.

jps.text: I will say unto God: Do not condemn me; make me know wherefore Thou contendest with me.

verses.hebrewText: הֲטֹ֤וב לְךָ֨ ׀ כִּֽי־תַעֲשֹׁ֗ק כִּֽי־תִ֭מְאַס יְגִ֣יעַ כַּפֶּ֑יךָ וְעַל־עֲצַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים הֹופָֽעְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: Is it good unto Thee that Thou shouldest oppress, that Thou shouldest despise the work of Thy hands, and shine upon the counsel of the wicked?

jps.text: Is it good unto Thee that Thou shouldest oppress, that Thou shouldest despise the work of Thy hands, and shine upon the counsel of the wicked?

verses.hebrewText: הַעֵינֵ֣י בָשָׂ֣ר לָ֑ךְ אִם־כִּרְאֹ֖ות אֱנֹ֣ושׁ תִּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hast Thou eyes of flesh? or seest Thou as man seeth?

jps.text: Hast Thou eyes of flesh? or seest Thou as man seeth?

verses.hebrewText: הֲכִימֵ֣י אֱנֹ֣ושׁ יָמֶ֑יךָ אִם־שְׁ֝נֹותֶ֗יךָ כִּ֣ימֵי גָֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: Are Thy days as the days of man, or Thy years as a man's days,

jps.text: Are Thy days as the days of man, or Thy years as a man's days,

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תְבַקֵּ֥שׁ לַעֲוֹנִ֑י וּ֭לְחַטָּאתִ֥י תִדְרֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: That Thou inquirest after mine iniquity, and searchest after my sin,

jps.text: That Thou inquirest after mine iniquity, and searchest after my sin,

verses.hebrewText: עַֽל־דַּ֭עְתְּךָ כִּי־לֹ֣א אֶרְשָׁ֑ע וְאֵ֖ין מִיָּדְךָ֣ מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: Although Thou knowest that I shall not be condemned; and there is none that can deliver out of Thy hand?

jps.text: Although Thou knowest that I shall not be condemned; and there is none that can deliver out of Thy hand?

verses.hebrewText: יָדֶ֣יךָ עִ֭צְּבוּנִי וַֽיַּעֲשׂ֑וּנִי יַ֥חַד סָ֝בִ֗יב וַֽתְּבַלְּעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thy hands have framed me and fashioned me together round about; yet Thou dost destroy me!

jps.text: Thy hands have framed me and fashioned me together round about; yet Thou dost destroy me!

verses.hebrewText: זְכָר־נָ֭א כִּי־כַחֹ֣מֶר עֲשִׂיתָ֑נִי וְֽאֶל־עָפָ֥ר תְּשִׁיבֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Remember, I beseech Thee, that Thou hast fashioned me as clay; and wilt Thou bring me into dust again?

jps.text: Remember, I beseech Thee, that Thou hast fashioned me as clay; and wilt Thou bring me into dust again?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֣א כֶ֭חָלָב תַּתִּיכֵ֑נִי וְ֝כַגְּבִנָּ֗ה תַּקְפִּיאֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Hast Thou not poured me out as milk, and curdled me like cheese?

jps.text: Hast Thou not poured me out as milk, and curdled me like cheese?

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֣ור וּ֭בָשָׂר תַּלְבִּישֵׁ֑נִי וּֽבַעֲצָמֹ֥ות וְ֝גִידִ֗ים תְּסֹכְכֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast clothed me with skin and flesh, and knit me together with bones and sinews.

jps.text: Thou hast clothed me with skin and flesh, and knit me together with bones and sinews.

verses.hebrewText: חַיִּ֣ים וָ֭חֶסֶד עָשִׂ֣יתָ עִמָּדִ֑י וּ֝פְקֻדָּתְךָ֗ שָֽׁמְרָ֥ה רוּחִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast granted me life and favour, and Thy providence hath preserved my spirit.

jps.text: Thou hast granted me life and favour, and Thy providence hath preserved my spirit.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אֵלֶּה צָפַ֣נְתָּ בִלְבָבֶ֑ךָ יָ֝דַ֗עְתִּי כִּי־זֹ֥את עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Yet these things Thou didst hide in Thy heart; I know that this is with Thee;

jps.text: Yet these things Thou didst hide in Thy heart; I know that this is with Thee;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־חָטָ֥אתִי וּשְׁמַרְתָּ֑נִי וּ֝מֵעֲוֹנִ֗י לֹ֣א תְנַקֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: If I sin, then Thou markest me, and Thou wilt not acquit me from mine iniquity.

jps.text: If I sin, then Thou markest me, and Thou wilt not acquit me from mine iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־רָשַׁ֡עְתִּי אַלְלַ֬י לִ֗י וְ֭צָדַקְתִּי לֹא־אֶשָּׂ֣א רֹאשִׁ֑י שְׂבַ֥ע קָ֝לֹ֗ון וּרְאֵ֥ה עָנְיֽ͏ִי׃
verses.englishText: If I be wicked, woe unto me; and if I be righteous, yet shall I not lift up my head — being filled with ignominy and looking upon mine affliction.

jps.text: If I be wicked, woe unto me; and if I be righteous, yet shall I not lift up my head — being filled with ignominy and looking upon mine affliction.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭יִגְאֶה כַּשַּׁ֣חַל תְּצוּדֵ֑נִי וְ֝תָשֹׁ֗ב תִּתְפַּלָּא־בִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And if it exalt itself, Thou huntest me as a lion; and again Thou showest Thyself marvellous upon me.

jps.text: And if it exalt itself, Thou huntest me as a lion; and again Thou showest Thyself marvellous upon me.

verses.hebrewText: תְּחַדֵּ֬שׁ עֵדֶ֨יךָ ׀ נֶגְדִּ֗י וְתֶ֣רֶב כַּֽ֭עַשְׂךָ עִמָּדִ֑י חֲלִיפֹ֖ות וְצָבָ֣א עִמִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Thou renewest Thy witnesses against me, and increasest Thine indignation upon me; host succeeding host against me.

jps.text: Thou renewest Thy witnesses against me, and increasest Thine indignation upon me; host succeeding host against me.

verses.hebrewText: וְלָ֣מָּה מֵ֭רֶחֶם הֹצֵאתָ֑נִי אֶ֝גְוַ֗ע וְעַ֣יִן לֹא־תִרְאֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore then hast Thou brought me forth out of the womb? Would that I had perished, and no eye had seen me!

jps.text: Wherefore then hast Thou brought me forth out of the womb? Would that I had perished, and no eye had seen me!

verses.hebrewText: כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־הָיִ֣יתִי אֶהְיֶ֑ה מִ֝בֶּ֗טֶן לַקֶּ֥בֶר אוּבָֽל׃
verses.englishText: I should have been as though I had not been; I should have been carried from the womb to the grave.

jps.text: I should have been as though I had not been; I should have been carried from the womb to the grave.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹא־מְעַ֣ט יָמַ֣י *יֶחְדָּל (וַחֲדָ֑ל) *יָשִׁית (וְשִׁ֥ית) מִ֝מֶּ֗נִּי וְאַבְלִ֥יגָה מְּעָֽט׃
verses.englishText: Are not my days few? Cease then, and let me alone, that I may take comfort a little,

jps.text: Are not my days few? Cease then, and let me alone, that I may take comfort a little,

verses.hebrewText: בְּטֶ֣רֶם אֵ֭לֵךְ וְלֹ֣א אָשׁ֑וּב אֶל־אֶ֖רֶץ חֹ֣שֶׁךְ וְצַלְמָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Before I go whence I shall not return, even to the land of darkness and of the shadow of death;

jps.text: Before I go whence I shall not return, even to the land of darkness and of the shadow of death;

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֤רֶץ עֵיפָ֨תָה ׀ כְּמֹ֥ו אֹ֗פֶל צַ֭לְמָוֶת וְלֹ֥א סְדָרִ֗ים וַתֹּ֥פַע כְּמֹו־אֹֽפֶל׃ פ
verses.englishText: A land of thick darkness, as darkness itself; a land of the shadow of death, without any order, and where the light is as darkness.

jps.text: A land of thick darkness, as darkness itself; a land of the shadow of death, without any order, and where the light is as darkness.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן צֹפַ֥ר הַֽנַּעֲמָתִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: הֲרֹ֣ב דְּ֭בָרִים לֹ֣א יֵעָנֶ֑ה וְאִם־אִ֖ישׁ שְׂפָתַ֣יִם יִצְדָּֽק׃
verses.englishText: Should not the multitude of words be answered? And should a man full of talk be accounted right?

jps.text: Should not the multitude of words be answered? And should a man full of talk be accounted right?

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭דֶּיךָ מְתִ֣ים יַחֲרִ֑ישׁו וַ֝תִּלְעַ֗ג וְאֵ֣ין מַכְלִֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thy boastings have made men hold their peace, and thou hast mocked, with none to make thee ashamed;

jps.text: Thy boastings have made men hold their peace, and thou hast mocked, with none to make thee ashamed;

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭תֹּאמֶר זַ֣ךְ לִקְחִ֑י וּ֝בַ֗ר הָיִ֥יתִי בְעֵינֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: And thou hast said: 'My doctrine is pure, and I am clean in Thine eyes.'

jps.text: And thou hast said: 'My doctrine is pure, and I am clean in Thine eyes.'

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאוּלָ֗ם מִֽי־יִתֵּ֣ן אֱלֹ֣והַּ דַּבֵּ֑ר וְיִפְתַּ֖ח שְׂפָתָ֣יו עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: But oh that God would speak, and open His lips against thee;

jps.text: But oh that God would speak, and open His lips against thee;

verses.hebrewText: וְיַגֶּד־לְךָ֨ ׀ תַּֽעֲלֻמֹ֣ות חָכְמָה֮ כִּֽי־כִפְלַ֪יִם לְֽת֫וּשִׁיָּ֥ה וְדַ֡ע כִּֽי־יַשֶּׁ֥ה לְךָ֥ אֱ֝לֹ֗והַ מֵעֲוֹנֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: And that He would tell thee the secrets of wisdom, that sound wisdom is manifold! Know therefore that God exacteth of thee less than thine iniquity deserveth.

jps.text: And that He would tell thee the secrets of wisdom, that sound wisdom is manifold! Know therefore that God exacteth of thee less than thine iniquity deserveth.

verses.hebrewText: הַחֵ֣קֶר אֱלֹ֣והַ תִּמְצָ֑א אִ֤ם עַד־תַּכְלִ֖ית שַׁדַּ֣י תִּמְצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou find out the deep things of God? Canst thou attain unto the purpose of the Almighty?

jps.text: Canst thou find out the deep things of God? Canst thou attain unto the purpose of the Almighty?

verses.hebrewText: גָּבְהֵ֣י שָׁ֭מַיִם מַה־תִּפְעָ֑ל עֲמֻקָּ֥ה מִ֝שְּׁאֹ֗ול מַה־תֵּדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: It is high as heaven; what canst thou do? Deeper than the nether-world; what canst thou know?
