jps.text: It is high as heaven; what canst thou do? Deeper than the nether-world; what canst thou know?

verses.hebrewText: אֲרֻכָּ֣ה מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִדָּ֑הּ וּ֝רְחָבָ֗ה מִנִּי־יָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The measure thereof is longer than the earth, and broader than the sea.

jps.text: The measure thereof is longer than the earth, and broader than the sea.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יַחֲלֹ֥ף וְיַסְגִּ֑יר וְ֝יַקְהִ֗יל וּמִ֣י יְשִׁיבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: If He pass by, and shut up, or gather in, then who can hinder Him?

jps.text: If He pass by, and shut up, or gather in, then who can hinder Him?

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־ה֭וּא יָדַ֣ע מְתֵי־שָׁ֑וְא וַיַּרְא־אָ֝֗וֶן וְלֹ֣א יִתְבֹּונָֽן׃
verses.englishText: For He knoweth base men; and when He seeth iniquity, will He not then consider it?

jps.text: For He knoweth base men; and when He seeth iniquity, will He not then consider it?

verses.hebrewText: וְאִ֣ישׁ נָ֭בוּב יִלָּבֵ֑ב וְעַ֥יִר פֶּ֝֗רֶא אָדָ֥ם יִוָּלֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: But an empty man will get understanding, when a wild ass's colt is born a man.

jps.text: But an empty man will get understanding, when a wild ass's colt is born a man.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אַ֭תָּ֗ה הֲכִינֹ֣ותָ לִבֶּ֑ךָ וּפָרַשְׂתָּ֖ אֵלָ֣יו כַּפֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: If thou set thy heart aright, and stretch out thy hands toward Him —

jps.text: If thou set thy heart aright, and stretch out thy hands toward Him —

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אָ֣וֶן בְּ֭יָדְךָ הַרְחִיקֵ֑הוּ וְאַל־תַּשְׁכֵּ֖ן בְּאֹהָלֶ֣יךָ עַוְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: If iniquity be in thy hand, put it far away, and let not unrighteousness dwell in thy tents —

jps.text: If iniquity be in thy hand, put it far away, and let not unrighteousness dwell in thy tents —

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־אָ֤ז ׀ תִּשָּׂ֣א פָנֶ֣יךָ מִמּ֑וּם וְהָיִ֥יתָ מֻ֝צָ֗ק וְלֹ֣א תִירָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Surely then shalt thou lift up thy face without spot; yea, thou shalt be stedfast, and shalt not fear;

jps.text: Surely then shalt thou lift up thy face without spot; yea, thou shalt be stedfast, and shalt not fear;

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־אַ֭תָּה עָמָ֣ל תִּשְׁכָּ֑ח כְּמַ֖יִם עָבְר֣וּ תִזְכֹּֽר׃
verses.englishText: For thou shalt forget thy misery; thou shalt remember it as waters that are passed away;

jps.text: For thou shalt forget thy misery; thou shalt remember it as waters that are passed away;

verses.hebrewText: וּֽ֭מִצָּהֳרַיִם יָק֣וּם חָ֑לֶד תָּ֝עֻ֗פָה כַּבֹּ֥קֶר תִּהְיֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: And thy life shall be clearer than the noonday; though there be darkness, it shall be as the morning.

jps.text: And thy life shall be clearer than the noonday; though there be darkness, it shall be as the morning.

verses.hebrewText: וּֽ֭בָטַחְתָּ כִּי־יֵ֣שׁ תִּקְוָ֑ה וְ֝חָפַרְתָּ֗ לָבֶ֥טַח תִּשְׁכָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: And thou shalt be secure, because there is hope; yea, thou shalt look about thee, and shalt take thy rest in safety.

jps.text: And thou shalt be secure, because there is hope; yea, thou shalt look about thee, and shalt take thy rest in safety.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭רָבַצְתָּ וְאֵ֣ין מַחֲרִ֑יד וְחִלּ֖וּ פָנֶ֣יךָ רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Also thou shalt lie down, and none shall make thee afraid; yea, many shall make suit unto thee.

jps.text: Also thou shalt lie down, and none shall make thee afraid; yea, many shall make suit unto thee.

verses.hebrewText: וְעֵינֵ֥י רְשָׁעִ֗ים תִּ֫כְלֶ֥ינָה וּ֭מָנֹוס אָבַ֣ד מִנְהֶ֑ם וְ֝תִקְוָתָ֗ם מַֽפַּח־נָֽפֶשׁ׃ פ
verses.englishText: But the eyes of the wicked shall fail, and they shall have no way to flee, and their hope shall be the drooping of the soul.

jps.text: But the eyes of the wicked shall fail, and they shall have no way to flee, and their hope shall be the drooping of the soul.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭מְנָם כִּ֣י אַתֶּם־עָ֑ם וְ֝עִמָּכֶ֗ם תָּמ֥וּת חָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: No doubt but ye are the people, and wisdom shall die with you.

jps.text: No doubt but ye are the people, and wisdom shall die with you.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־לִ֤י לֵבָ֨ב ׀ כְּֽמֹוכֶ֗ם לֹא־נֹפֵ֣ל אָנֹכִ֣י מִכֶּ֑ם וְאֶת־מִי־אֵ֥ין כְּמֹו־אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.englishText: But I have understanding as well as you; I am not inferior to you; yea, who knoweth not such things as these?

jps.text: But I have understanding as well as you; I am not inferior to you; yea, who knoweth not such things as these?

verses.hebrewText: שְׂחֹ֤ק לְרֵעֵ֨הוּ ׀ אֶֽהְיֶ֗ה קֹרֵ֣א לֶ֭אֱלֹוהַּ וַֽיַּעֲנֵ֑הוּ שְׂ֝חֹ֗וק צַדִּ֥יק תָּמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: I am as one that is a laughing-stock to his neighbour, a man that called upon God, and He answered him; the just, the innocent man is a laughing-stock,

jps.text: I am as one that is a laughing-stock to his neighbour, a man that called upon God, and He answered him; the just, the innocent man is a laughing-stock,

verses.hebrewText: לַפִּ֣יד בּ֭וּז לְעַשְׁתּ֣וּת שַׁאֲנָ֑ן נָ֝כֹ֗ון לְמֹ֣ועֲדֵי רָֽגֶל׃
verses.englishText: A contemptible brand in the thought of him that is at ease, a thing ready for them whose foot slippeth.

jps.text: A contemptible brand in the thought of him that is at ease, a thing ready for them whose foot slippeth.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁלָ֤יוּ אֹֽהָלִ֨ים ׀ לְשֹׁ֥דְדִ֗ים וּֽ֭בַטֻּחֹות לְמַרְגִּ֣יזֵי אֵ֑ל לַאֲשֶׁ֤ר הֵבִ֖יא אֱלֹ֣והַּ בְּיָדֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The tents of robbers prosper, and they that provoke God are secure, in whatsoever God bringeth into their hand.

jps.text: The tents of robbers prosper, and they that provoke God are secure, in whatsoever God bringeth into their hand.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאוּלָ֗ם שְׁאַל־נָ֣א בְהֵמֹ֣ות וְתֹרֶ֑ךָּ וְעֹ֥וף הַ֝שָּׁמַ֗יִם וְיַגֶּד־לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: But ask now the beasts, and they shall teach thee; and the fowls of the air, and they shall tell thee;

jps.text: But ask now the beasts, and they shall teach thee; and the fowls of the air, and they shall tell thee;

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֤ו שִׂ֣יחַ לָאָ֣רֶץ וְתֹרֶ֑ךָּ וִֽיסַפְּר֥וּ לְ֝ךָ֗ דְּגֵ֣י הַיָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Or speak to the earth, and it shall teach thee; and the fishes of the sea shall declare unto thee;

jps.text: Or speak to the earth, and it shall teach thee; and the fishes of the sea shall declare unto thee;

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭י לֹא־יָדַ֣ע בְּכָל־אֵ֑לֶּה כִּ֥י יַד־יְ֝הוָה עָ֣שְׂתָה זֹּֽאת׃
verses.englishText: Who knoweth not among all these, that the hand of the LORD hath wrought this?

jps.text: Who knoweth not among all these, that the hand of the LORD hath wrought this?

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּ֭יָדֹו נֶ֣פֶשׁ כָּל־חָ֑י וְ֝ר֗וּחַ כָּל־בְּשַׂר־אִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: In whose hand is the soul of every living thing, and the breath of all mankind. —

jps.text: In whose hand is the soul of every living thing, and the breath of all mankind. —

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹא־אֹ֭זֶן מִלִּ֣ין תִּבְחָ֑ן וְ֝חֵ֗ךְ אֹ֣כֶל יִטְעַם־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Doth not the ear try words, even as the palate tasteth its food?

jps.text: Doth not the ear try words, even as the palate tasteth its food?

verses.hebrewText: בִּֽישִׁישִׁ֥ים חָכְמָ֑ה וְאֹ֖רֶךְ יָמִ֣ים תְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Is wisdom with aged men, and understanding in length of days? —

jps.text: Is wisdom with aged men, and understanding in length of days? —

verses.hebrewText: עִ֭מֹּו חָכְמָ֣ה וּגְבוּרָ֑ה לֹ֝֗ו עֵצָ֥ה וּתְבוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: With Him is wisdom and might; He hath counsel and understanding.

jps.text: With Him is wisdom and might; He hath counsel and understanding.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן יַ֭הֲרֹוס וְלֹ֣א יִבָּנֶ֑ה יִסְגֹּ֥ר עַל־אִ֝֗ישׁ וְלֹ֣א יִפָּתֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He breaketh down, and it cannot be built again; He shutteth up a man, and there can be no opening.

jps.text: Behold, He breaketh down, and it cannot be built again; He shutteth up a man, and there can be no opening.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן יַעְצֹ֣ר בַּמַּ֣יִם וְיִבָ֑שׁוּ וִֽ֝ישַׁלְּחֵ֗ם וְיַ֖הַפְכוּ אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He withholdeth the waters, and they dry up; also He sendeth them out, and they overturn the earth.

jps.text: Behold, He withholdeth the waters, and they dry up; also He sendeth them out, and they overturn the earth.

verses.hebrewText: עִ֭מֹּו עֹ֣ז וְתֽוּשִׁיָּ֑ה לֹ֝֗ו שֹׁגֵ֥ג וּמַשְׁגֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: With Him is strength and sound wisdom; the deceived and the deceiver are His.

jps.text: With Him is strength and sound wisdom; the deceived and the deceiver are His.

verses.hebrewText: מֹולִ֣יךְ יֹועֲצִ֣ים שֹׁולָ֑ל וְֽשֹׁפְטִ֥ים יְהֹולֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: He leadeth counsellors away stripped, and judges maketh He fools.

jps.text: He leadeth counsellors away stripped, and judges maketh He fools.

verses.hebrewText: מוּסַ֣ר מְלָכִ֣ים פִּתֵּ֑חַ וַיֶּאְסֹ֥ר אֵ֝זֹ֗ור בְּמָתְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: He looseth the bond of kings, and bindeth their loins with a girdle.

jps.text: He looseth the bond of kings, and bindeth their loins with a girdle.

verses.hebrewText: מֹולִ֣יךְ כֹּהֲנִ֣ים שֹׁולָ֑ל וְאֵֽתָנִ֣ים יְסַלֵּֽף׃
verses.englishText: He leadeth priests away stripped, and overthroweth the mighty.

jps.text: He leadeth priests away stripped, and overthroweth the mighty.

verses.hebrewText: מֵסִ֣יר שָׂ֭פָה לְנֶאֱמָנִ֑ים וְטַ֖עַם זְקֵנִ֣ים יִקָּֽח׃
verses.englishText: He removeth the speech of men of trust, and taketh away the sense of the elders.

jps.text: He removeth the speech of men of trust, and taketh away the sense of the elders.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁופֵ֣ךְ בּ֭וּז עַל־נְדִיבִ֑ים וּמְזִ֖יחַ אֲפִיקִ֣ים רִפָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He poureth contempt upon princes, and looseth the belt of the strong.

jps.text: He poureth contempt upon princes, and looseth the belt of the strong.

verses.hebrewText: מְגַלֶּ֣ה עֲ֭מֻקֹות מִנִּי־חֹ֑שֶׁךְ וַיֹּצֵ֖א לָאֹ֣ור צַלְמָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: He uncovereth deep things out of darkness, and bringeth out to light the shadow of death.

jps.text: He uncovereth deep things out of darkness, and bringeth out to light the shadow of death.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׂגִּ֣יא לַ֭גֹּויִם וַֽיְאַבְּדֵ֑ם שֹׁטֵ֥חַ לַ֝גֹּויִ֗ם וַיַּנְחֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: He increaseth the nations, and destroyeth them; He enlargeth the nations, and leadeth them away.

jps.text: He increaseth the nations, and destroyeth them; He enlargeth the nations, and leadeth them away.

verses.hebrewText: מֵסִ֗יר לֵ֭ב רָאשֵׁ֣י עַם־הָאָ֑רֶץ וַ֝יַּתְעֵ֗ם בְּתֹ֣הוּ לֹא־דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: He taketh away the heart of the chiefs of the people of the land, and causeth them to wander in a wilderness where there is no way.

jps.text: He taketh away the heart of the chiefs of the people of the land, and causeth them to wander in a wilderness where there is no way.

verses.hebrewText: יְמַֽשְׁשׁוּ־חֹ֥שֶׁךְ וְלֹא־אֹ֑ור וַ֝יַּתְעֵ֗ם כַּשִּׁכֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: They grope in the dark without light, and He maketh them to stagger like a drunken man.

jps.text: They grope in the dark without light, and He maketh them to stagger like a drunken man.

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־כֹּ֖ל רָאֲתָ֣ה עֵינִ֑י שָֽׁמְעָ֥ה אָ֝זְנִ֗י וַתָּ֥בֶן לָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Lo, mine eye hath seen all this, mine ear hath heard and understood it.

jps.text: Lo, mine eye hath seen all this, mine ear hath heard and understood it.

verses.hebrewText: כְּֽ֭דַעְתְּכֶם יָדַ֣עְתִּי גַם־אָ֑נִי לֹא־נֹפֵ֖ל אָנֹכִ֣י מִכֶּֽם׃
verses.englishText: What ye know, do I know also; I am not inferior unto you.

jps.text: What ye know, do I know also; I am not inferior unto you.

verses.hebrewText: אוּלָ֗ם אֲ֭נִי אֶל־שַׁדַּ֣י אֲדַבֵּ֑ר וְהֹוכֵ֖חַ אֶל־אֵ֣ל אֶחְפָּֽץ׃
verses.englishText: Notwithstanding I would speak to the Almighty, and I desire to reason with God.

jps.text: Notwithstanding I would speak to the Almighty, and I desire to reason with God.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאוּלָ֗ם אַתֶּ֥ם טֹֽפְלֵי־שָׁ֑קֶר רֹפְאֵ֖י אֱלִ֣ל כֻּלְּכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: But ye are plasterers of lies, ye are all physicians of no value.

jps.text: But ye are plasterers of lies, ye are all physicians of no value.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יִ֭תֵּן הַחֲרֵ֣שׁ תַּחֲרִישׁ֑וּן וּתְהִ֖י לָכֶ֣ם לְחָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Oh that ye would altogether hold your peace! and it would be your wisdom.

jps.text: Oh that ye would altogether hold your peace! and it would be your wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְעוּ־נָ֥א תֹוכַחְתִּ֑י וְרִבֹ֖ות שְׂפָתַ֣י הַקְשִֽׁיבוּ׃
verses.englishText: Hear now my reasoning, and hearken to the pleadings of my lips.

jps.text: Hear now my reasoning, and hearken to the pleadings of my lips.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭לְאֵל תְּדַבְּר֣וּ עַוְלָ֑ה וְ֝לֹ֗ו תְּֽדַבְּר֥וּ רְמִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Will ye speak unrighteously for God, and talk deceitfully for Him?

jps.text: Will ye speak unrighteously for God, and talk deceitfully for Him?

verses.hebrewText: הֲפָנָ֥יו תִּשָּׂא֑וּן אִם־לָאֵ֥ל תְּרִיבֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: Will ye show Him favour? Will ye contend for God?

jps.text: Will ye show Him favour? Will ye contend for God?

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭טֹוב כִּֽי־יַחְקֹ֣ר אֶתְכֶ֑ם אִם־כְּהָתֵ֥ל בֶּ֝אֱנֹ֗ושׁ תְּהָתֵ֥לּוּ בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Would it be good that He should search you out? Or as one mocketh a man, will ye mock Him?

jps.text: Would it be good that He should search you out? Or as one mocketh a man, will ye mock Him?

verses.hebrewText: הֹוכֵ֣חַ יֹוכִ֣יחַ אֶתְכֶ֑ם אִם־בַּ֝סֵּ֗תֶר פָּנִ֥ים תִּשָּׂאֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: He will surely reprove you, if ye do secretly show favour.

jps.text: He will surely reprove you, if ye do secretly show favour.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֣א שְׂ֭אֵתֹו תְּבַעֵ֣ת אֶתְכֶ֑ם וּ֝פַחְדֹּ֗ו יִפֹּ֥ל עֲלֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Shall not His majesty terrify you, and His dread fall upon you?

jps.text: Shall not His majesty terrify you, and His dread fall upon you?

verses.hebrewText: זִֽ֭כְרֹנֵיכֶם מִשְׁלֵי־אֵ֑פֶר לְגַבֵּי־חֹ֝֗מֶר גַּבֵּיכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Your memorials shall be like unto ashes, your eminences to eminences of clay.

jps.text: Your memorials shall be like unto ashes, your eminences to eminences of clay.

verses.hebrewText: הַחֲרִ֣ישׁוּ מִ֭מֶּנִּי וַאֲדַבְּרָה־אָ֑נִי וְיַעֲבֹ֖ר עָלַ֣י מָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hold your peace, let me alone, that I may speak, and let come on me what will.

jps.text: Hold your peace, let me alone, that I may speak, and let come on me what will.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־מָ֤ה ׀ אֶשָּׂ֣א בְשָׂרִ֣י בְשִׁנָּ֑י וְ֝נַפְשִׁ֗י אָשִׂ֥ים בְּכַפִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore? I will take my flesh in my teeth, and put my life in my hand.

jps.text: Wherefore? I will take my flesh in my teeth, and put my life in my hand.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן יִ֭קְטְלֵנִי *לֹא (לֹ֣ו) אֲיַחֵ֑ל אַךְ־דְּ֝רָכַ֗י אֶל־פָּנָ֥יו אֹוכִֽיחַ׃
verses.englishText: Though He slay me, yet will I trust in Him; but I will argue my ways before Him.

jps.text: Though He slay me, yet will I trust in Him; but I will argue my ways before Him.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־הוּא־לִ֥י לִֽישׁוּעָ֑ה כִּי־לֹ֥א לְ֝פָנָ֗יו חָנֵ֥ף יָבֹֽוא׃
verses.englishText: This also shall be my salvation, that a hypocrite cannot come before Him.

jps.text: This also shall be my salvation, that a hypocrite cannot come before Him.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְע֣וּ שָׁ֭מֹועַ מִלָּתִ֑י וְ֝אֽ͏ַחֲוָתִ֗י בְּאָזְנֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Hear diligently my speech, and let my declaration be in your ears.

jps.text: Hear diligently my speech, and let my declaration be in your ears.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּה־נָ֭א עָרַ֣כְתִּי מִשְׁפָּ֑ט יָ֝דַ֗עְתִּי כִּֽי־אֲנִ֥י אֶצְדָּֽק׃
verses.englishText: Behold now, I have ordered my cause; I know that I shall be justified.

jps.text: Behold now, I have ordered my cause; I know that I shall be justified.

verses.hebrewText: מִי־ה֭וּא יָרִ֣יב עִמָּדִ֑י כִּֽי־עַתָּ֖ה אַחֲרִ֣ישׁ וְאֶגְוָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Who is he that will contend with me? For then would I hold my peace and die.

jps.text: Who is he that will contend with me? For then would I hold my peace and die.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־שְׁ֭תַּיִם אַל־תַּ֣עַשׂ עִמָּדִ֑י אָ֥ז מִ֝פָּנֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א אֶסָּתֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Only do not two things unto me, then will I not hide myself from Thee:

jps.text: Only do not two things unto me, then will I not hide myself from Thee:

verses.hebrewText: כַּ֭פְּךָ מֵעָלַ֣י הַרְחַ֑ק וְ֝אֵ֥מָתְךָ֗ אַֽל־תְּבַעֲתַֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Withdraw Thy hand far from me; and let not Thy terror make me afraid.

jps.text: Withdraw Thy hand far from me; and let not Thy terror make me afraid.

verses.hebrewText: וּ֭קְרָא וְאָנֹכִ֣י אֶֽעֱנֶ֑ה אֹֽו־אֲ֝דַבֵּ֗ר וַהֲשִׁיבֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Then call Thou, and I will answer; or let me speak, and answer Thou me.

jps.text: Then call Thou, and I will answer; or let me speak, and answer Thou me.

verses.hebrewText: כַּמָּ֣ה לִ֭י עֲוֹנֹ֣ות וְחַטָּאֹ֑ות פִּֽשְׁעִ֥י וְ֝חַטָּאתִ֗י הֹדִיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: How many are mine iniquities and sins? Make me to know my transgression and my sin.

jps.text: How many are mine iniquities and sins? Make me to know my transgression and my sin.

verses.hebrewText: לָֽמָּה־פָנֶ֥יךָ תַסְתִּ֑יר וְתַחְשְׁבֵ֖נִי לְאֹויֵ֣ב לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore hidest Thou Thy face, and holdest me for Thine enemy?

jps.text: Wherefore hidest Thou Thy face, and holdest me for Thine enemy?

verses.hebrewText: הֶעָלֶ֣ה נִדָּ֣ף תַּעֲרֹ֑וץ וְאֶת־קַ֖שׁ יָבֵ֣שׁ תִּרְדֹּֽף׃
verses.englishText: Wilt Thou harass a driven leaf? And wilt Thou pursue the dry stubble?

jps.text: Wilt Thou harass a driven leaf? And wilt Thou pursue the dry stubble?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תִכְתֹּ֣ב עָלַ֣י מְרֹרֹ֑ות וְ֝תֹורִישֵׁ֗נִי עֲוֹנֹ֥ות נְעוּרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: That Thou shouldest write bitter things against me, and make me to inherit the iniquities of my youth.

jps.text: That Thou shouldest write bitter things against me, and make me to inherit the iniquities of my youth.

verses.hebrewText: וְתָ֘שֵׂ֤ם בַּסַּ֨ד ׀ רַגְלַ֗י וְתִשְׁמֹ֥ור כָּל־אָרְחֹותָ֑י עַל־שָׁרְשֵׁ֥י רַ֝גְלַ֗י תִּתְחַקֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou puttest my feet also in the stocks, and lookest narrowly unto all my paths; Thou drawest Thee a line about the soles of my feet;

jps.text: Thou puttest my feet also in the stocks, and lookest narrowly unto all my paths; Thou drawest Thee a line about the soles of my feet;

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭הוּא כְּרָקָ֣ב יִבְלֶ֑ה כְּ֝בֶ֗גֶד אֲכָ֣לֹו עָֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Though I am like a wine-skin that consumeth, like a garment that is moth-eaten.

jps.text: Though I am like a wine-skin that consumeth, like a garment that is moth-eaten.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭דָם יְל֣וּד אִשָּׁ֑ה קְצַ֥ר יָ֝מִ֗ים וּֽשְׂבַֽע־רֹֽגֶז׃
verses.englishText: Man that is born of a woman is of few days, and full of trouble.

jps.text: Man that is born of a woman is of few days, and full of trouble.

verses.hebrewText: כְּצִ֣יץ יָ֭צָא וַיִּמָּ֑ל וַיִּבְרַ֥ח כַּ֝צֵּ֗ל וְלֹ֣א יַעֲמֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: He cometh forth like a flower, and withereth; he fleeth also as a shadow, and continueth not.

jps.text: He cometh forth like a flower, and withereth; he fleeth also as a shadow, and continueth not.

verses.hebrewText: אַף־עַל־זֶ֭ה פָּקַ֣חְתָּ עֵינֶ֑ךָ וְאֹ֘תִ֤י תָבִ֖יא בְמִשְׁפָּ֣ט עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: And dost Thou open Thine eyes upon such a one, and bringest me into judgment with Thee?

jps.text: And dost Thou open Thine eyes upon such a one, and bringest me into judgment with Thee?

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יִתֵּ֣ן טָ֭הֹור מִטָּמֵ֗א לֹ֣א אֶחָֽד׃
verses.englishText: Who can bring a clean thing out of an unclean? not one.

jps.text: Who can bring a clean thing out of an unclean? not one.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֥ם חֲרוּצִ֨ים ׀ יָמָ֗יו מִֽסְפַּר־חֳדָשָׁ֥יו אִתָּ֑ךְ *חֻקֹּו (חֻקָּ֥יו) עָ֝שִׂ֗יתָ וְלֹ֣א יַעֲבֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Seeing his days are determined, the number of his months is with Thee, and Thou hast appointed his bounds that he cannot pass;

jps.text: Seeing his days are determined, the number of his months is with Thee, and Thou hast appointed his bounds that he cannot pass;

verses.hebrewText: שְׁעֵ֣ה מֵעָלָ֣יו וְיֶחְדָּ֑ל עַד־יִ֝רְצֶ֗ה כְּשָׂכִ֥יר יֹומֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Look away from him, that he may rest, till he shall accomplish, as a hireling, his day.

jps.text: Look away from him, that he may rest, till he shall accomplish, as a hireling, his day.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יֵ֥שׁ לָעֵ֗ץ תִּ֫קְוָ֥ה אִֽם־יִ֭כָּרֵת וְעֹ֣וד יַחֲלִ֑יף וְ֝יֹֽנַקְתֹּ֗ו לֹ֣א תֶחְדָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: For there is hope of a tree, if it be cut down, that it will sprout again, and that the tender branch thereof will not cease.

jps.text: For there is hope of a tree, if it be cut down, that it will sprout again, and that the tender branch thereof will not cease.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יַזְקִ֣ין בָּאָ֣רֶץ שָׁרְשֹׁ֑ו וּ֝בֶעָפָ֗ר יָמ֥וּת גִּזְעֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Though the root thereof wax old in the earth, and the stock thereof die in the ground;

jps.text: Though the root thereof wax old in the earth, and the stock thereof die in the ground;

verses.hebrewText: מֵרֵ֣יחַ מַ֣יִם יַפְרִ֑חַ וְעָשָׂ֖ה קָצִ֣יר כְּמֹו־נָֽטַע׃
verses.englishText: Yet through the scent of water it will bud, and put forth boughs like a plant.

jps.text: Yet through the scent of water it will bud, and put forth boughs like a plant.

verses.hebrewText: וְגֶ֣בֶר יָ֭מוּת וַֽיֶּחֱלָ֑שׁ וַיִּגְוַ֖ע אָדָ֣ם וְאַיֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: But man dieth, and lieth low; yea, man perisheth, and where is he?

jps.text: But man dieth, and lieth low; yea, man perisheth, and where is he?

verses.hebrewText: אָֽזְלוּ־מַ֭יִם מִנִּי־יָ֑ם וְ֝נָהָ֗ר יֶחֱרַ֥ב וְיָבֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: As the waters fail from the sea, and the river is drained dry;

jps.text: As the waters fail from the sea, and the river is drained dry;

verses.hebrewText: וְאִ֥ישׁ שָׁכַ֗ב וְֽלֹא־יָ֫ק֥וּם עַד־בִּלְתִּ֣י שָׁ֭מַיִם לֹ֣א יָקִ֑יצוּ וְלֹֽא־יֵ֝עֹ֗רוּ מִשְּׁנָתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: So man lieth down and riseth not; till the heavens be no more, they shall not awake, nor be roused out of their sleep.

jps.text: So man lieth down and riseth not; till the heavens be no more, they shall not awake, nor be roused out of their sleep.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י יִתֵּ֨ן ׀ בִּשְׁאֹ֬ול תַּצְפִּנֵ֗נִי תַּ֭סְתִּירֵנִי עַד־שׁ֣וּב אַפֶּ֑ךָ תָּ֤שִׁ֥ית לִ֖י חֹ֣ק וְתִזְכְּרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Oh that Thou wouldest hide me in the nether-world, that Thou wouldest keep me secret, until Thy wrath be past, that Thou wouldest appoint me a set time, and remember me! —

jps.text: Oh that Thou wouldest hide me in the nether-world, that Thou wouldest keep me secret, until Thy wrath be past, that Thou wouldest appoint me a set time, and remember me! —

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יָמ֥וּת גֶּ֗בֶר הֲיִ֫חְיֶ֥ה כָּל־יְמֵ֣י צְבָאִ֣י אֲיַחֵ֑ל עַד־בֹּ֝֗וא חֲלִיפָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If a man die, may he live again? All the days of my service would I wait, till my relief should come —

jps.text: If a man die, may he live again? All the days of my service would I wait, till my relief should come —

verses.hebrewText: תִּ֭קְרָא וְאָנֹכִ֣י אֶֽעֱנֶ֑ךָּ לְֽמַעֲשֵׂ֖ה יָדֶ֣יךָ תִכְסֹֽף׃
verses.englishText: Thou wouldest call, and I would answer Thee; Thou wouldest have a desire to the work of Thy hands.

jps.text: Thou wouldest call, and I would answer Thee; Thou wouldest have a desire to the work of Thy hands.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עַ֭תָּה צְעָדַ֣י תִּסְפֹּ֑ור לֹֽא־תִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ור עַל־חַטָּאתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But now Thou numberest my steps, Thou dost not even wait for my sin;

jps.text: But now Thou numberest my steps, Thou dost not even wait for my sin;

verses.hebrewText: חָתֻ֣ם בִּצְרֹ֣ור פִּשְׁעִ֑י וַ֝תִּטְפֹּ֗ל עַל־עֲוֹנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My transgression is sealed up in a bag, and Thou heapest up mine iniquity.

jps.text: My transgression is sealed up in a bag, and Thou heapest up mine iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אוּלָם הַר־נֹופֵ֣ל יִבֹּ֑ול וְ֝צ֗וּר יֶעְתַּ֥ק מִמְּקֹמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And surely the mountain falling crumbleth away, and the rock is removed out of its place;

jps.text: And surely the mountain falling crumbleth away, and the rock is removed out of its place;

verses.hebrewText: אֲבָנִ֤ים ׀ שָׁ֥חֲקוּ מַ֗יִם תִּשְׁטֹֽף־סְפִיחֶ֥יהָ עֲפַר־אָ֑רֶץ וְתִקְוַ֖ת אֱנֹ֣ושׁ הֶאֱבַֽדְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: The waters wear the stones; the overflowings thereof wash away the dust of the earth; so Thou destroyest the hope of man.

jps.text: The waters wear the stones; the overflowings thereof wash away the dust of the earth; so Thou destroyest the hope of man.

verses.hebrewText: תִּתְקְפֵ֣הוּ לָ֭נֶצַח וַֽיַּהֲלֹ֑ךְ מְשַׁנֶּ֥ה פָ֝נָ֗יו וַֽתְּשַׁלְּחֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Thou prevailest for ever against him, and he passeth; Thou changest his countenance, and sendest him away.

jps.text: Thou prevailest for ever against him, and he passeth; Thou changest his countenance, and sendest him away.

verses.hebrewText: יִכְבְּד֣וּ בָ֭נָיו וְלֹ֣א יֵדָ֑ע וְ֝יִצְעֲר֗וּ וְֽלֹא־יָבִ֥ין לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: His sons come to honour, and he knoweth it not; and they are brought low, but he regardeth them not.

jps.text: His sons come to honour, and he knoweth it not; and they are brought low, but he regardeth them not.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־בְּ֭שָׂרֹו עָלָ֣יו יִכְאָ֑ב וְ֝נַפְשֹׁ֗ו עָלָ֥יו תֶּאֱבָֽל׃ פ
verses.englishText: But his flesh grieveth for him, and his soul mourneth over him.

jps.text: But his flesh grieveth for him, and his soul mourneth over him.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן אֱלִיפַ֥ז הַֽתֵּימָנִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: הֶֽחָכָ֗ם יַעֲנֶ֥ה דַֽעַת־ר֑וּחַ וִֽימַלֵּ֖א קָדִ֣ים בִּטְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Should a wise man make answer with windy knowledge, and fill his belly with the east wind?

jps.text: Should a wise man make answer with windy knowledge, and fill his belly with the east wind?

verses.hebrewText: הֹוכֵ֣חַ בְּ֭דָבָר לֹ֣א יִסְכֹּ֑ון וּ֝מִלִּ֗ים לֹא־יֹועִ֥יל בָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Should he reason with unprofitable talk, or with speeches wherewith he can do no good?

jps.text: Should he reason with unprofitable talk, or with speeches wherewith he can do no good?

verses.hebrewText: אַף־אַ֭תָּה תָּפֵ֣ר יִרְאָ֑ה וְתִגְרַ֥ע שִׂ֝יחָ֗ה לִפְנֵי־אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Yea, thou doest away with fear, and impairest devotion before God.

jps.text: Yea, thou doest away with fear, and impairest devotion before God.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יְאַלֵּ֣ף עֲוֹנְךָ֣ פִ֑יךָ וְ֝תִבְחַ֗ר לְשֹׁ֣ון עֲרוּמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For thine iniquity teacheth thy mouth, and thou choosest the tongue of the crafty.

jps.text: For thine iniquity teacheth thy mouth, and thou choosest the tongue of the crafty.

verses.hebrewText: יַרְשִֽׁיעֲךָ֣ פִ֣יךָ וְלֹא־אָ֑נִי וּ֝שְׂפָתֶ֗יךָ יַעֲנוּ־בָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Thine own mouth condemneth thee, and not I; yea, thine own lips testify against thee.

jps.text: Thine own mouth condemneth thee, and not I; yea, thine own lips testify against thee.

verses.hebrewText: הֲרִאישֹׁ֣ון אָ֭דָם תִּוָּלֵ֑ד וְלִפְנֵ֖י גְבָעֹ֣ות חֹולָֽלְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: Art thou the first man that was born? Or wast thou brought forth before the hills?

jps.text: Art thou the first man that was born? Or wast thou brought forth before the hills?

verses.hebrewText: הַבְסֹ֣וד אֱלֹ֣והַ תִּשְׁמָ֑ע וְתִגְרַ֖ע אֵלֶ֣יךָ חָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Dost thou hearken in the council of God? And dost thou restrain wisdom to thyself?

jps.text: Dost thou hearken in the council of God? And dost thou restrain wisdom to thyself?

verses.hebrewText: מַה־יָּ֭דַעְתָּ וְלֹ֣א נֵדָ֑ע תָּ֝בִ֗ין וְֽלֹא־עִמָּ֥נוּ הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: What knowest thou, that we know not? What understandest thou, which is not in us?

jps.text: What knowest thou, that we know not? What understandest thou, which is not in us?

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־שָׂ֣ב גַּם־יָשִׁ֣ישׁ בָּ֑נוּ כַּבִּ֖יר מֵאָבִ֣יךָ יָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: With us are both the gray-headed and the very aged men, much older than thy father.

jps.text: With us are both the gray-headed and the very aged men, much older than thy father.

verses.hebrewText: הַמְעַ֣ט מִ֭מְּךָ תַּנְחֻמֹ֣ות אֵ֑ל וְ֝דָבָ֗ר לָאַ֥ט עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Are the consolations of God too small for thee, and the word that dealeth gently with thee?

jps.text: Are the consolations of God too small for thee, and the word that dealeth gently with thee?

verses.hebrewText: מַה־יִּקָּחֲךָ֥ לִבֶּ֑ךָ וּֽמַה־יִּרְזְמ֥וּן עֵינֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Why doth thy heart carry thee away? And why do thine eyes wink?

jps.text: Why doth thy heart carry thee away? And why do thine eyes wink?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תָשִׁ֣יב אֶל־אֵ֣ל רוּחֶ֑ךָ וְהֹצֵ֖אתָ מִפִּ֣יךָ מִלִּֽין׃
verses.englishText: That thou turnest thy spirit against God, and lettest such words go out of thy mouth.

jps.text: That thou turnest thy spirit against God, and lettest such words go out of thy mouth.

verses.hebrewText: מָֽה־אֱנֹ֥ושׁ כִּֽי־יִזְכֶּ֑ה וְכִֽי־יִ֝צְדַּ֗ק יְל֣וּד אִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: What is man, that he should be clean? And he that is born of a woman, that he should be righteous?

jps.text: What is man, that he should be clean? And he that is born of a woman, that he should be righteous?

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן *בִּקְדֹשֹׁו (בִּ֭קְדֹשָׁיו) לֹ֣א יַאֲמִ֑ין וְ֝שָׁמַ֗יִם לֹא־זַכּ֥וּ בְעֵינָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He putteth no trust in His holy ones; yea, the heavens are not clean in His sight.

jps.text: Behold, He putteth no trust in His holy ones; yea, the heavens are not clean in His sight.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭ף כִּֽי־נִתְעָ֥ב וְֽנֶאֱלָ֑ח אִישׁ־שֹׁתֶ֖ה כַמַּ֣יִם עַוְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: How much less one that is abominable and impure, man who drinketh iniquity like water!

jps.text: How much less one that is abominable and impure, man who drinketh iniquity like water!

verses.hebrewText: אֲחַוְךָ֥ שְֽׁמַֽע־לִ֑י וְזֶֽה־חָ֝זִ֗יתִי וַאֲסַפֵּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: I will tell thee, hear thou me; and that which I have seen I will declare —

jps.text: I will tell thee, hear thou me; and that which I have seen I will declare —

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־חֲכָמִ֥ים יַגִּ֑ידוּ וְלֹ֥א כִֽ֝חֲד֗וּ מֵאֲבֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Which wise men have told from their fathers, and have not hid it;

jps.text: Which wise men have told from their fathers, and have not hid it;

verses.hebrewText: לָהֶ֣ם לְ֭בַדָּם נִתְּנָ֣ה הָאָ֑רֶץ וְלֹא־עָ֖בַר זָ֣ר בְּתֹוכָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Unto whom alone the land was given, and no stranger passed among them.

jps.text: Unto whom alone the land was given, and no stranger passed among them.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־יְמֵ֣י רָ֭שָׁע ה֣וּא מִתְחֹולֵ֑ל וּמִסְפַּ֥ר שָׁ֝נִ֗ים נִצְפְּנ֥וּ לֶעָרִֽיץ׃
verses.englishText: The wicked man travaileth with pain all his days, even the number of years that are laid up for the oppressor.

jps.text: The wicked man travaileth with pain all his days, even the number of years that are laid up for the oppressor.

verses.hebrewText: קֹול־פְּחָדִ֥ים בְּאָזְנָ֑יו בַּ֝שָּׁלֹ֗ום שֹׁודֵ֥ד יְבֹואֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: A sound of terrors is in his ears: in prosperity the destroyer shall come upon him.

jps.text: A sound of terrors is in his ears: in prosperity the destroyer shall come upon him.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יַאֲמִ֣ין שׁ֭וּב מִנִּי־חֹ֑שֶׁךְ *וְצָפוּ (וְצָפ֖וּי) ה֣וּא אֱלֵי־חָֽרֶב׃
verses.englishText: He believeth not that he shall return out of darkness, and he is waited for of the sword.

jps.text: He believeth not that he shall return out of darkness, and he is waited for of the sword.

verses.hebrewText: נֹ֘דֵ֤ד ה֣וּא לַלֶּ֣חֶם אַיֵּ֑ה יָדַ֓ע ׀ כִּֽי־נָכֹ֖ון בְּיָדֹ֣ו יֹֽום־חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: He wandereth abroad for bread: 'Where is it?' He knoweth that the day of darkness is ready at his hand.

jps.text: He wandereth abroad for bread: 'Where is it?' He knoweth that the day of darkness is ready at his hand.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽ֭בַעֲתֻהוּ צַ֣ר וּמְצוּקָ֑ה תִּ֝תְקְפֵ֗הוּ כְּמֶ֤לֶךְ ׀ עָתִ֬יד לַכִּידֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Distress and anguish overwhelm him; they prevail against him, as a king ready to the battle.

jps.text: Distress and anguish overwhelm him; they prevail against him, as a king ready to the battle.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־נָטָ֣ה אֶל־אֵ֣ל יָדֹ֑ו וְאֶל־שַׁ֝דַּ֗י יִתְגַּבָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Because he hath stretched out his hand against God, and behaveth himself proudly against the Almighty;

jps.text: Because he hath stretched out his hand against God, and behaveth himself proudly against the Almighty;

verses.hebrewText: יָר֣וּץ אֵלָ֣יו בְּצַוָּ֑אר בַּ֝עֲבִ֗י גַּבֵּ֥י מָֽגִנָּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He runneth upon him with a stiff neck, with the thick bosses of his bucklers.

jps.text: He runneth upon him with a stiff neck, with the thick bosses of his bucklers.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־כִסָּ֣ה פָנָ֣יו בְּחֶלְבֹּ֑ו וַיַּ֖עַשׂ פִּימָ֣ה עֲלֵי־כָֽסֶל׃
verses.englishText: Because he hath covered his face with his fatness, and made collops of fat on his loins;

jps.text: Because he hath covered his face with his fatness, and made collops of fat on his loins;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּשְׁכֹּ֤ון ׀ עָ֘רִ֤ים נִכְחָדֹ֗ות בָּ֭תִּים לֹא־יֵ֣שְׁבוּ לָ֑מֹו אֲשֶׁ֖ר הִתְעַתְּד֣וּ לְגַלִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: And he hath dwelt in desolate cities, in houses which no man would inhabit, which were ready to become heaps.

jps.text: And he hath dwelt in desolate cities, in houses which no man would inhabit, which were ready to become heaps.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יֶ֖עְשַׁר וְלֹא־יָק֣וּם חֵילֹ֑ו וְלֹֽא־יִטֶּ֖ה לָאָ֣רֶץ מִנְלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He shall not be rich, neither shall his substance continue, neither shall their produce bend to the earth.

jps.text: He shall not be rich, neither shall his substance continue, neither shall their produce bend to the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יָס֨וּר ׀ מִנִּי־חֹ֗שֶׁךְ יֹֽ֭נַקְתֹּו תְּיַבֵּ֣שׁ שַׁלְהָ֑בֶת וְ֝יָס֗וּר בְּר֣וּחַ פִּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He shall not depart out of darkness; the flame shall dry up his branches, and by the breath of His mouth shall he go away.

jps.text: He shall not depart out of darkness; the flame shall dry up his branches, and by the breath of His mouth shall he go away.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יַאֲמֵ֣ן *בַּשֹּׁו (בַּשָּׁ֣יו) נִתְעָ֑ה כִּי־שָׁ֝֗וְא תִּהְיֶ֥ה תְמוּרָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Let him not trust in vanity, deceiving himself; for vanity shall be his recompense.

jps.text: Let him not trust in vanity, deceiving himself; for vanity shall be his recompense.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽלֹא־יֹ֭ומֹו תִּמָּלֵ֑א וְ֝כִפָּתֹ֗ו לֹ֣א רַעֲנָֽנָה׃
verses.englishText: It shall be accomplished before his time, and his branch shall not be leafy.

jps.text: It shall be accomplished before his time, and his branch shall not be leafy.

verses.hebrewText: יַחְמֹ֣ס כַּגֶּ֣פֶן בִּסְרֹ֑ו וְיַשְׁלֵ֥ךְ כַּ֝זַּ֗יִת נִצָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He shall shake off his unripe grape as the vine, and shall cast off his flower as the olive.

jps.text: He shall shake off his unripe grape as the vine, and shall cast off his flower as the olive.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עֲדַ֣ת חָנֵ֣ף גַּלְמ֑וּד וְ֝אֵ֗שׁ אָכְלָ֥ה אָֽהֳלֵי־שֹֽׁחַד׃
verses.englishText: For the company of the godless shall be desolate, and fire shall consume the tents of bribery.

jps.text: For the company of the godless shall be desolate, and fire shall consume the tents of bribery.

verses.hebrewText: הָרֹ֣ה עָ֭מָל וְיָ֣לֹד אָ֑וֶן וּ֝בִטְנָ֗ם תָּכִ֥ין מִרְמָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: They conceive mischief, and bring forth iniquity, and their belly prepareth deceit.

jps.text: They conceive mischief, and bring forth iniquity, and their belly prepareth deceit.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמַ֣עְתִּי כְאֵ֣לֶּה רַבֹּ֑ות מְנַחֲמֵ֖י עָמָ֣ל כֻּלְּכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: I have heard many such things; sorry comforters are ye all.

jps.text: I have heard many such things; sorry comforters are ye all.

verses.hebrewText: הֲקֵ֥ץ לְדִבְרֵי־ר֑וּחַ אֹ֥ו מַה־יַּ֝מְרִֽיצְךָ֗ כִּ֣י תַעֲנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Shall windy words have an end? Or what provoketh thee that thou answerest?

jps.text: Shall windy words have an end? Or what provoketh thee that thou answerest?

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם ׀ אָנֹכִי֮ כָּכֶ֪ם אֲדַ֫בֵּ֥רָה ל֤וּ־יֵ֪שׁ נַפְשְׁכֶ֡ם תַּ֤חַת נַפְשִׁ֗י אַחְבִּ֣ירָה עֲלֵיכֶ֣ם בְּמִלִּ֑ים וְאָנִ֥יעָה עֲ֝לֵיכֶ֗ם בְּמֹ֣ו רֹאשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: I also could speak as ye do; if your soul were in my soul's stead, I could join words together against you, and shake my head at you.

jps.text: I also could speak as ye do; if your soul were in my soul's stead, I could join words together against you, and shake my head at you.

verses.hebrewText: אֲאַמִּצְכֶ֥ם בְּמֹו־פִ֑י וְנִ֖יד שְׂפָתַ֣י יַחְשֹֽׂךְ׃
verses.englishText: I would strengthen you with my mouth, and the moving of my lips would assuage your grief.

jps.text: I would strengthen you with my mouth, and the moving of my lips would assuage your grief.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽם־אֲ֭דַבְּרָה לֹא־יֵחָשֵׂ֣ךְ כְּאֵבִ֑י וְ֝אַחְדְּלָ֗ה מַה־מִנִּ֥י יַהֲלֹֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Though I speak, my pain is not assuaged; and though I forbear, what am I eased?

jps.text: Though I speak, my pain is not assuaged; and though I forbear, what am I eased?

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־עַתָּ֥ה הֶלְאָ֑נִי הֲ֝שִׁמֹּ֗ותָ כָּל־עֲדָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But now He hath made me weary; Thou hast made desolate all my company.

jps.text: But now He hath made me weary; Thou hast made desolate all my company.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭תִּקְמְטֵנִי לְעֵ֣ד הָיָ֑ה וַיָּ֥קָם בִּ֥י כַ֝חֲשִׁ֗י בְּפָנַ֥י יַעֲנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Thou hast shrivelled me up, which is a witness against me; and my leanness riseth up against me, it testifieth to my face.

jps.text: And Thou hast shrivelled me up, which is a witness against me; and my leanness riseth up against me, it testifieth to my face.

verses.hebrewText: אַפֹּ֤ו טָרַ֨ף ׀ וַֽיִּשְׂטְמֵ֗נִי חָרַ֣ק עָלַ֣י בְּשִׁנָּ֑יו צָרִ֓י ׀ יִלְטֹ֖ושׁ עֵינָ֣יו לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: He hath torn me in His wrath, and hated me; He hath gnashed upon me with His teeth; mine adversary sharpeneth his eyes upon me.

jps.text: He hath torn me in His wrath, and hated me; He hath gnashed upon me with His teeth; mine adversary sharpeneth his eyes upon me.

verses.hebrewText: פָּעֲר֬וּ עָלַ֨י ׀ בְּפִיהֶ֗ם בְּ֭חֶרְפָּה הִכּ֣וּ לְחָיָ֑י יַ֝֗חַד עָלַ֥י יִתְמַלָּאֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: They have gaped upon me with their mouth; they have smitten me upon the cheek scornfully; they gather themselves together against me.

jps.text: They have gaped upon me with their mouth; they have smitten me upon the cheek scornfully; they gather themselves together against me.

verses.hebrewText: יַסְגִּירֵ֣נִי אֵ֭ל אֶ֣ל עֲוִ֑יל וְעַל־יְדֵ֖י רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִרְטֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: God delivereth me to the ungodly, and casteth me into the hands of the wicked.

jps.text: God delivereth me to the ungodly, and casteth me into the hands of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֘לֵ֤ו הָיִ֨יתִי ׀ וַֽיְפַרְפְּרֵ֗נִי וְאָחַ֣ז בְּ֭עָרְפִּי וַֽיְפַצְפְּצֵ֑נִי וַיְקִימֵ֥נִי לֹ֝֗ו לְמַטָּרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I was at ease, and He broke me asunder; yea, He hath taken me by the neck, and dashed me to pieces; He hath also set me up for His mark.

jps.text: I was at ease, and He broke me asunder; yea, He hath taken me by the neck, and dashed me to pieces; He hath also set me up for His mark.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֘סֹ֤בּוּ עָלַ֨י ׀ רַבָּ֗יו יְפַלַּ֣ח כִּ֭לְיֹותַי וְלֹ֣א יַחְמֹ֑ול יִשְׁפֹּ֥ךְ לָ֝אָ֗רֶץ מְרֵרָֽתִי׃
verses.englishText: His archers compass me round about, He cleaveth my reins asunder, and doth not spare; He poureth out my gall upon the ground.

jps.text: His archers compass me round about, He cleaveth my reins asunder, and doth not spare; He poureth out my gall upon the ground.

verses.hebrewText: יִפְרְצֵ֣נִי פֶ֭רֶץ עַל־פְּנֵי־פָ֑רֶץ יָרֻ֖ץ עָלַ֣י כְּגִבֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: He breaketh me with breach upon breach; He runneth upon me like a giant.

jps.text: He breaketh me with breach upon breach; He runneth upon me like a giant.

verses.hebrewText: שַׂ֣ק תָּ֭פַרְתִּי עֲלֵ֣י גִלְדִּ֑י וְעֹלַ֖לְתִּי בֶעָפָ֣ר קַרְנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I have sewed sackcloth upon my skin, and have laid my horn in the dust.

jps.text: I have sewed sackcloth upon my skin, and have laid my horn in the dust.

verses.hebrewText: פָּנַ֣י *חֳמַרְמְרָה (חֳ֭מַרְמְרוּ) מִנִּי־בֶ֑כִי וְעַ֖ל עַפְעַפַּ֣י צַלְמָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: My face is reddened with weeping, and on my eyelids is the shadow of death;

jps.text: My face is reddened with weeping, and on my eyelids is the shadow of death;

verses.hebrewText: עַ֭ל לֹא־חָמָ֣ס בְּכַפָּ֑י וּֽתְפִלָּתִ֥י זַכָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Although there is no violence in my hands, and my prayer is pure.

jps.text: Although there is no violence in my hands, and my prayer is pure.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭רֶץ אַל־תְּכַסִּ֣י דָמִ֑י וְֽאַל־יְהִ֥י מָ֝קֹ֗ום לְזַעֲקָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: O earth, cover not thou my blood, and let my cry have no resting-place.

jps.text: O earth, cover not thou my blood, and let my cry have no resting-place.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־עַ֭תָּה הִנֵּה־בַשָּׁמַ֣יִם עֵדִ֑י וְ֝שָׂהֲדִ֗י בַּמְּרֹומִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Even now, behold, my Witness is in heaven, and He that testifieth of me is on high.

jps.text: Even now, behold, my Witness is in heaven, and He that testifieth of me is on high.

verses.hebrewText: מְלִיצַ֥י רֵעָ֑י אֶל־אֱ֝לֹ֗והַ דָּלְפָ֥ה עֵינִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Mine inward thoughts are my intercessors, mine eye poureth out tears unto God;

jps.text: Mine inward thoughts are my intercessors, mine eye poureth out tears unto God;

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹוכַ֣ח לְגֶ֣בֶר עִם־אֱלֹ֑והַּ וּֽבֶן־אָדָ֥ם לְרֵעֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: That He would set aright a man contending with God, as a son of man setteth aright his neighbour!

jps.text: That He would set aright a man contending with God, as a son of man setteth aright his neighbour!

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שְׁנֹ֣ות מִסְפָּ֣ר יֶאֱתָ֑יוּ וְאֹ֖רַח לֹא־אָשׁ֣וּב אֶהֱלֹֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For the years that are few are coming on, and I shall go the way whence I shall not return.

jps.text: For the years that are few are coming on, and I shall go the way whence I shall not return.

verses.hebrewText: רוּחִ֣י חֻ֭בָּלָה יָמַ֥י נִזְעָ֗כוּ קְבָרִ֥ים לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My spirit is consumed, my days are extinct, the grave is ready for me.

jps.text: My spirit is consumed, my days are extinct, the grave is ready for me.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֣א הֲ֭תֻלִים עִמָּדִ֑י וּ֝בְהַמְּרֹותָ֗ם תָּלַ֥ן עֵינִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Surely there are mockers with me, and mine eye abideth in their provocation.

jps.text: Surely there are mockers with me, and mine eye abideth in their provocation.

verses.hebrewText: שִֽׂימָה־נָּ֭א עָרְבֵ֣נִי עִמָּ֑ךְ מִֽי ה֝֗וּא לְיָדִ֥י יִתָּקֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: Give now a pledge, be surety for me with Thyself; who else is there that will strike hands with me?

jps.text: Give now a pledge, be surety for me with Thyself; who else is there that will strike hands with me?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־לִ֭בָּם צָפַ֣נְתָּ מִּשָּׂ֑כֶל עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן לֹ֣א תְרֹמֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: For Thou hast hid their heart from understanding; therefore shalt Thou not exalt them.

jps.text: For Thou hast hid their heart from understanding; therefore shalt Thou not exalt them.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭חֵלֶק יַגִּ֣יד רֵעִ֑ים וְעֵינֵ֖י בָנָ֣יו תִּכְלֶֽנָה׃
verses.englishText: He that denounceth his friends for the sake of flattery, even the eyes of his children shall fail.

jps.text: He that denounceth his friends for the sake of flattery, even the eyes of his children shall fail.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭הִצִּגַנִי לִמְשֹׁ֣ל עַמִּ֑ים וְתֹ֖פֶת לְפָנִ֣ים אֶֽהְיֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: He hath made me also a byword of the people; and I am become one in whose face they spit.

jps.text: He hath made me also a byword of the people; and I am become one in whose face they spit.

verses.hebrewText: וַתֵּ֣כַהּ מִכַּ֣עַשׂ עֵינִ֑י וִֽיצֻרַ֖י כַּצֵּ֣ל כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Mine eye also is dimmed by reason of vexation, and all my members are as a shadow.

jps.text: Mine eye also is dimmed by reason of vexation, and all my members are as a shadow.

verses.hebrewText: יָשֹׁ֣מּוּ יְשָׁרִ֣ים עַל־זֹ֑את וְ֝נָקִ֗י עַל־חָנֵ֥ף יִתְעֹרָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Upright men are astonished at this, and the innocent stirreth up himself against the godless.

jps.text: Upright men are astonished at this, and the innocent stirreth up himself against the godless.

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹאחֵ֣ז צַדִּ֣יק דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וּֽטֳהָר־יָ֝דַ֗יִם יֹסִ֥יף אֹֽמֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Yet the righteous holdeth on his way, and he that hath clean hands waxeth stronger and stronger.

jps.text: Yet the righteous holdeth on his way, and he that hath clean hands waxeth stronger and stronger.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאוּלָ֗ם כֻּלָּ֣ם תָּ֭שֻׁבוּ וּבֹ֣אוּ נָ֑א וְלֹֽא־אֶמְצָ֖א בָכֶ֣ם חָכָֽם׃
verses.englishText: But as for you all, do ye return, and come now; and I shall not find a wise man among you.

jps.text: But as for you all, do ye return, and come now; and I shall not find a wise man among you.

verses.hebrewText: יָמַ֣י עָ֭בְרוּ זִמֹּתַ֣י נִתְּק֑וּ מֹ֖ורָשֵׁ֣י לְבָבִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My days are past, my purposes are broken off, even the thoughts of my heart.

jps.text: My days are past, my purposes are broken off, even the thoughts of my heart.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭יְלָה לְיֹ֣ום יָשִׂ֑ימוּ אֹ֝֗ור קָרֹ֥וב מִפְּנֵי־חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: They change the night into day; the light is short because of darkness.

jps.text: They change the night into day; the light is short because of darkness.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֲ֭קַוֶּה שְׁאֹ֣ול בֵּיתִ֑י בַּ֝חֹ֗שֶׁךְ רִפַּ֥דְתִּי יְצוּעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I look for the nether-world as my house; if I have spread my couch in the darkness;

jps.text: If I look for the nether-world as my house; if I have spread my couch in the darkness;

verses.hebrewText: לַשַּׁ֣חַת קָ֭רָאתִי אָ֣בִי אָ֑תָּה אִמִּ֥י וַ֝אֲחֹתִ֗י לָֽרִמָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: If I have said to corruption: 'Thou art my father', to the worm: 'Thou art my mother, and my sister';

jps.text: If I have said to corruption: 'Thou art my father', to the worm: 'Thou art my mother, and my sister';

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אַיֵּה אֵפֹ֣ו תִקְוָתִ֑י וְ֝תִקְוָתִ֗י מִ֣י יְשׁוּרֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Where then is my hope? And as for my hope, who shall see it?

jps.text: Where then is my hope? And as for my hope, who shall see it?

verses.hebrewText: בַּדֵּ֣י שְׁאֹ֣ל תֵּרַ֑דְנָה אִם־יַ֖חַד עַל־עָפָ֣ר נָֽחַת׃ ס
verses.englishText: They shall go down to the bars of the nether-world, when we are at rest together in the dust.

jps.text: They shall go down to the bars of the nether-world, when we are at rest together in the dust.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן בִּלְדַּ֥ד הַשֻּׁחִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אָ֤נָה ׀ תְּשִׂימ֣וּן קִנְצֵ֣י לְמִלִּ֑ין תָּ֝בִ֗ינוּ וְאַחַ֥ר נְדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: How long will ye lay snares for words? Consider, and afterwards we will speak.

jps.text: How long will ye lay snares for words? Consider, and afterwards we will speak.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֭דּוּעַ נֶחְשַׁ֣בְנוּ כַבְּהֵמָ֑ה נִ֝טְמִ֗ינוּ בְּעֵינֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore are we counted as beasts, and reputed dull in your sight?

jps.text: Wherefore are we counted as beasts, and reputed dull in your sight?

verses.hebrewText: טֹֽרֵ֥ף נַפְשֹׁ֗ו בְּאַ֫פֹּ֥ו הַ֭לְמַעַנְךָ תֵּעָ֣זַב אָ֑רֶץ וְיֶעְתַּק־צ֝֗וּר מִמְּקֹמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Thou that tearest thyself in thine anger, shall the earth be forsaken for thee? Or shall the rock be removed out of its place?

jps.text: Thou that tearest thyself in thine anger, shall the earth be forsaken for thee? Or shall the rock be removed out of its place?

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם אֹ֣ור רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִדְעָ֑ךְ וְלֹֽא־יִ֝גַּ֗הּ שְׁבִ֣יב אִשֹּֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Yea, the light of the wicked shall be put out, and the spark of his fire shall not shine.

jps.text: Yea, the light of the wicked shall be put out, and the spark of his fire shall not shine.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֖ור חָשַׁ֣ךְ בְּאָהֳלֹ֑ו וְ֝נֵרֹ֗ו עָלָ֥יו יִדְעָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: The light shall be dark in his tent, and his lamp over him shall be put out.

jps.text: The light shall be dark in his tent, and his lamp over him shall be put out.

verses.hebrewText: יֵֽ֭צְרוּ צַעֲדֵ֣י אֹונֹ֑ו וְֽתַשְׁלִיכֵ֥הוּ עֲצָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The steps of his strength shall be straitened, and his own counsel shall cast him down.

jps.text: The steps of his strength shall be straitened, and his own counsel shall cast him down.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שֻׁלַּ֣ח בְּרֶ֣שֶׁת בְּרַגְלָ֑יו וְעַל־שְׂ֝בָכָ֗ה יִתְהַלָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For he is cast into a net by his own feet, and he walketh upon the toils.

jps.text: For he is cast into a net by his own feet, and he walketh upon the toils.

verses.hebrewText: יֹאחֵ֣ז בְּעָקֵ֣ב פָּ֑ח יַחֲזֵ֖ק עָלָ֣יו צַמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: A gin shall take him by the heel, and a snare shall lay hold on him.

jps.text: A gin shall take him by the heel, and a snare shall lay hold on him.

verses.hebrewText: טָמ֣וּן בָּאָ֣רֶץ חַבְלֹ֑ו וּ֝מַלְכֻּדְתֹּ֗ו עֲלֵ֣י נָתִֽיב׃
verses.englishText: A noose is hid for him in the ground, and a trap for him in the way.

jps.text: A noose is hid for him in the ground, and a trap for him in the way.

verses.hebrewText: סָ֭בִיב בִּֽעֲתֻ֣הוּ בַלָּהֹ֑ות וֶהֱפִיצֻ֥הוּ לְרַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Terrors shall overwhelm him on every side, and shall entrap him at his feet.

jps.text: Terrors shall overwhelm him on every side, and shall entrap him at his feet.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִי־רָעֵ֥ב אֹנֹ֑ו וְ֝אֵ֗יד נָכֹ֥ון לְצַלְעֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: His trouble shall be ravenous, and calamity shall be ready for his fall.

jps.text: His trouble shall be ravenous, and calamity shall be ready for his fall.

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֭אכַל בַּדֵּ֣י עֹורֹ֑ו יֹאכַ֥ל בַּ֝דָּ֗יו בְּכֹ֣ור מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: It shall devour the members of his body, yea, the first-born of death shall devour his members.

jps.text: It shall devour the members of his body, yea, the first-born of death shall devour his members.

verses.hebrewText: יִנָּתֵ֣ק מֵ֭אָהֳלֹו מִבְטַחֹ֑ו וְ֝תַצְעִדֵ֗הוּ לְמֶ֣לֶךְ בַּלָּהֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: That wherein he trusteth shall be plucked out of his tent; and he shall be brought to the king of terrors.

jps.text: That wherein he trusteth shall be plucked out of his tent; and he shall be brought to the king of terrors.

verses.hebrewText: תִּשְׁכֹּ֣ון בְּ֭אָהֳלֹו מִבְּלִי־לֹ֑ו יְזֹרֶ֖ה עַל־נָוֵ֣הוּ גָפְרִֽית׃
verses.englishText: There shall dwell in his tent that which is none of his; brimstone shall be scattered upon his habitation.

jps.text: There shall dwell in his tent that which is none of his; brimstone shall be scattered upon his habitation.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭תַּחַת שָֽׁרָשָׁ֣יו יִבָ֑שׁוּ וּ֝מִמַּ֗עַל יִמַּ֥ל קְצִירֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: His roots shall dry up beneath, and above shall his branch wither.

jps.text: His roots shall dry up beneath, and above shall his branch wither.

verses.hebrewText: זִֽכְרֹו־אָ֭בַד מִנִּי־אָ֑רֶץ וְלֹא־שֵׁ֥ם לֹ֝֗ו עַל־פְּנֵי־חֽוּץ׃
verses.englishText: His remembrance shall perish from the earth, and he shall have no name abroad.

jps.text: His remembrance shall perish from the earth, and he shall have no name abroad.

verses.hebrewText: יֶ֭הְדְּפֻהוּ מֵאֹ֣ור אֶל־חֹ֑שֶׁךְ וּֽמִתֵּבֵ֥ל יְנִדֻּֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: He shall be driven from light into darkness, and chased out of the world.

jps.text: He shall be driven from light into darkness, and chased out of the world.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֘א נִ֤ין לֹ֣ו וְלֹא־נֶ֣כֶד בְּעַמֹּ֑ו וְאֵ֥ין שָׂ֝רִ֗יד בִּמְגוּרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He shall have neither son nor son's son among his people, nor any remaining in his dwellings.

jps.text: He shall have neither son nor son's son among his people, nor any remaining in his dwellings.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־יֹ֖ומֹו נָשַׁ֣מּוּ אַחֲרֹנִ֑ים וְ֝קַדְמֹנִ֗ים אָ֣חֲזוּ שָֽׂעַר׃
verses.englishText: They that come after shall be astonished at his day, as they that went before are affrighted.

jps.text: They that come after shall be astonished at his day, as they that went before are affrighted.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־אֵ֭לֶּה מִשְׁכְּנֹ֣ות עַוָּ֑ל וְ֝זֶ֗ה מְקֹ֣ום לֹא־יָדַֽע־אֵֽל׃ ס
verses.englishText: Surely such are the dwellings of the wicked, and this is the place of him that knoweth not God.

jps.text: Surely such are the dwellings of the wicked, and this is the place of him that knoweth not God.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אָ֭נָה תֹּוגְי֣וּן נַפְשִׁ֑י וּֽתְדַכְּאוּנַ֥נִי בְמִלִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: How long will ye vex my soul, and crush me with words?

jps.text: How long will ye vex my soul, and crush me with words?

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֤ה עֶ֣שֶׂר פְּ֭עָמִים תַּכְלִימ֑וּנִי לֹֽא־תֵ֝בֹ֗שׁוּ תַּהְכְּרוּ־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: These ten times have ye reproached me; ye are not ashamed that ye deal harshly with me.

jps.text: These ten times have ye reproached me; ye are not ashamed that ye deal harshly with me.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַף־אָמְנָ֥ם שָׁגִ֑יתִי אִ֝תִּ֗י תָּלִ֥ין מְשׁוּגָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And be it indeed that I have erred, mine error remaineth with myself.

jps.text: And be it indeed that I have erred, mine error remaineth with myself.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אָ֭מְנָם עָלַ֣י תַּגְדִּ֑ילוּ וְתֹוכִ֥יחוּ עָ֝לַ֗י חֶרְפָּתִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: If indeed ye will magnify yourselves against me, and plead against me my reproach;

jps.text: If indeed ye will magnify yourselves against me, and plead against me my reproach;

verses.hebrewText: דְּֽעוּ־אֵ֭פֹו כִּי־אֱלֹ֣והַּ עִוְּתָ֑נִי וּ֝מְצוּדֹ֗ו עָלַ֥י הִקִּֽיף׃
verses.englishText: Know now that God hath subverted my cause, and hath compassed me with His net.

jps.text: Know now that God hath subverted my cause, and hath compassed me with His net.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן אֶצְעַ֣ק חָ֭מָס וְלֹ֣א אֵעָנֶ֑ה אֲ֝שַׁוַּ֗ע וְאֵ֣ין מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I cry out: 'Violence!' but I am not heard; I cry aloud, but there is no justice.

jps.text: Behold, I cry out: 'Violence!' but I am not heard; I cry aloud, but there is no justice.

verses.hebrewText: אָרְחִ֣י גָ֭דַר וְלֹ֣א אֶעֱבֹ֑ור וְעַ֥ל נְ֝תִיבֹותַ֗י חֹ֣שֶׁךְ יָשִֽׂים׃
verses.englishText: He hath fenced up my way that I cannot pass, and hath set darkness in my paths.

jps.text: He hath fenced up my way that I cannot pass, and hath set darkness in my paths.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭בֹודִי מֵעָלַ֣י הִפְשִׁ֑יט וַ֝יָּ֗סַר עֲטֶ֣רֶת רֹאשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: He hath stripped me of my glory, and taken the crown from my head.

jps.text: He hath stripped me of my glory, and taken the crown from my head.

verses.hebrewText: יִתְּצֵ֣נִי סָ֭בִיב וָאֵלַ֑ךְ וַיַּסַּ֥ע כָּ֝עֵ֗ץ תִּקְוָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: He hath broken me down on every side, and I am gone; and my hope hath He plucked up like a tree.

jps.text: He hath broken me down on every side, and I am gone; and my hope hath He plucked up like a tree.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֣חַר עָלַ֣י אַפֹּ֑ו וַיַּחְשְׁבֵ֖נִי לֹ֣ו כְצָרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He hath also kindled His wrath against me, and He counteth me unto Him as one of His adversaries.

jps.text: He hath also kindled His wrath against me, and He counteth me unto Him as one of His adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: יַ֤חַד ׀ יָ֘בֹ֤אוּ גְדוּדָ֗יו וַיָּסֹ֣לּוּ עָלַ֣י דַּרְכָּ֑ם וַיַּחֲנ֖וּ סָבִ֣יב לְאָהֳלִֽי׃
verses.englishText: His troops come on together, and cast up their way against me, and encamp round about my tent.

jps.text: His troops come on together, and cast up their way against me, and encamp round about my tent.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭חַי מֵעָלַ֣י הִרְחִ֑יק וְ֝יֹדְעַ֗י אַךְ־זָ֥רוּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: He hath put my brethren far from me, and mine acquaintance are wholly estranged from me.

jps.text: He hath put my brethren far from me, and mine acquaintance are wholly estranged from me.

verses.hebrewText: חָדְל֥וּ קְרֹובָ֑י וּֽמְיֻדָּעַ֥י שְׁכֵחֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: My kinsfolk have failed, and my familiar friends have forgotten me.

jps.text: My kinsfolk have failed, and my familiar friends have forgotten me.

verses.hebrewText: גָּ֘רֵ֤י בֵיתִ֣י וְ֭אַמְהֹתַי לְזָ֣ר תַּחְשְׁבֻ֑נִי נָ֝כְרִ֗י הָיִ֥יתִי בְעֵינֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: They that dwell in my house, and my maids, count me for a stranger; I am become an alien in their sight.

jps.text: They that dwell in my house, and my maids, count me for a stranger; I am become an alien in their sight.

verses.hebrewText: לְעַבְדִּ֣י קָ֭רָאתִי וְלֹ֣א יַעֲנֶ֑ה בְּמֹו־פִ֝֗י אֶתְחַנֶּן־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: I call unto my servant, and he giveth me no answer, though I entreat him with my mouth.

jps.text: I call unto my servant, and he giveth me no answer, though I entreat him with my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: ר֭וּחִֽי זָ֣רָה לְאִשְׁתִּ֑י וְ֝חַנֹּתִ֗י לִבְנֵ֥י בִטְנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My breath is abhorred of my wife, and I am loathsome to the children of my tribe.

jps.text: My breath is abhorred of my wife, and I am loathsome to the children of my tribe.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־עֲ֭וִילִים מָ֣אֲסוּ בִ֑י אָ֝ק֗וּמָה וַיְדַבְּרוּ־בִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Even urchins despised me; if I arise, they speak against me.

jps.text: Even urchins despised me; if I arise, they speak against me.

verses.hebrewText: תִּֽ֭עֲבוּנִי כָּל־מְתֵ֣י סֹודִ֑י וְזֶֽה־אָ֝הַ֗בְתִּי נֶהְפְּכוּ־בִֽי׃
verses.englishText: All my intimate friends abhor me; and they whom I loved are turned against me.

jps.text: All my intimate friends abhor me; and they whom I loved are turned against me.

verses.hebrewText: בְּעֹורִ֣י וּ֭בִבְשָׂרִי דָּבְקָ֣ה עַצְמִ֑י וָ֝אֶתְמַלְּטָ֗ה בְּעֹ֣ור שִׁנָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: My bone cleaveth to my skin and to my flesh, and I am escaped with the skin of my teeth.

jps.text: My bone cleaveth to my skin and to my flesh, and I am escaped with the skin of my teeth.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֻּ֬נִי חָנֻּ֣נִי אַתֶּ֣ם רֵעָ֑י כִּ֥י יַד־אֱ֝לֹ֗והַּ נָ֣גְעָה בִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Have pity upon me, have pity upon me, O ye my friends; for the hand of God hath touched me.

jps.text: Have pity upon me, have pity upon me, O ye my friends; for the hand of God hath touched me.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭מָּה תִּרְדְּפֻ֣נִי כְמֹו־אֵ֑ל וּ֝מִבְּשָׂרִ֗י לֹ֣א תִשְׂבָּֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: Why do ye persecute me as God, and are not satisfied with my flesh?

jps.text: Why do ye persecute me as God, and are not satisfied with my flesh?

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יִתֵּ֣ן אֵ֭פֹו וְיִכָּתְב֣וּן מִלָּ֑י מִֽי־יִתֵּ֖ן בַּסֵּ֣פֶר וְיֻחָֽקוּ׃
verses.englishText: Oh that my words were now written! Oh that they were inscribed in a book!

jps.text: Oh that my words were now written! Oh that they were inscribed in a book!

verses.hebrewText: בְּעֵט־בַּרְזֶ֥ל וְעֹפָ֑רֶת לָ֝עַ֗ד בַּצּ֥וּר יֵחָצְבֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: That with an iron pen and lead they were graven in the rock for ever!

jps.text: That with an iron pen and lead they were graven in the rock for ever!

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֣י יָ֭דַעְתִּי גֹּ֣אֲלִי חָ֑י וְ֝אַחֲרֹ֗ון עַל־עָפָ֥ר יָקֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I know that my Redeemer liveth, and that He will witness at the last upon the dust;

jps.text: But as for me, I know that my Redeemer liveth, and that He will witness at the last upon the dust;

verses.hebrewText: וְאַחַ֣ר עֹ֖ורִֽי נִקְּפוּ־זֹ֑את וּ֝מִבְּשָׂרִ֗י אֶֽחֱזֶ֥ה אֱלֹֽוהַּ׃
verses.englishText: And when after my skin this is destroyed, then without my flesh shall I see God;

jps.text: And when after my skin this is destroyed, then without my flesh shall I see God;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר אֲנִ֨י ׀ אֶֽחֱזֶה־לִּ֗י וְעֵינַ֣י רָא֣וּ וְלֹא־זָ֑ר כָּל֖וּ כִלְיֹתַ֣י בְּחֵקִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Whom I, even I, shall see for myself, and mine eyes shall behold, and not another's. My reins are consumed within me.

jps.text: Whom I, even I, shall see for myself, and mine eyes shall behold, and not another's. My reins are consumed within me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י תֹ֖אמְרוּ מַה־נִּרְדָּף־לֹ֑ו וְשֹׁ֥רֶשׁ דָּ֝בָ֗ר נִמְצָא־בִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If ye say: 'How we will persecute him!' seeing that the root of the matter is found in me;

jps.text: If ye say: 'How we will persecute him!' seeing that the root of the matter is found in me;

verses.hebrewText: גּ֤וּרוּ לָכֶ֨ם ׀ מִפְּנֵי־חֶ֗רֶב כִּֽי־חֵ֭מָה עֲוֹנֹ֣ות חָ֑רֶב לְמַ֖עַן תֵּדְע֣וּן *שַׁדִּין (שַׁדּֽוּן)׃ ס
verses.englishText: Be ye afraid of the sword; for wrath bringeth the punishments of the sword, that ye may know there is a judgment.

jps.text: Be ye afraid of the sword; for wrath bringeth the punishments of the sword, that ye may know there is a judgment.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן צֹפַ֥ר הַנַּֽעֲמָתִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭כֵן שְׂעִפַּ֣י יְשִׁיב֑וּנִי וּ֝בַעֲב֗וּר ח֣וּשִׁי בִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Therefore do my thoughts give answer to me, even by reason of mine agitation that is in me.

jps.text: Therefore do my thoughts give answer to me, even by reason of mine agitation that is in me.

verses.hebrewText: מוּסַ֣ר כְּלִמָּתִ֣י אֶשְׁמָ֑ע וְ֝ר֗וּחַ מִֽבִּינָתִ֥י יַעֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I have heard the reproof which putteth me to shame, but out of my understanding my spirit answereth me.

jps.text: I have heard the reproof which putteth me to shame, but out of my understanding my spirit answereth me.

verses.hebrewText: הֲזֹ֣את יָ֭דַעְתָּ מִנִּי־עַ֑ד מִנִּ֤י שִׂ֖ים אָדָ֣ם עֲלֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Knowest thou not this of old time, since man was placed upon earth,

jps.text: Knowest thou not this of old time, since man was placed upon earth,

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י רִנְנַ֣ת רְ֭שָׁעִים מִקָּרֹ֑וב וְשִׂמְחַ֖ת חָנֵ֣ף עֲדֵי־רָֽגַע׃
verses.englishText: That the triumphing of the wicked is short, and the joy of the godless but for a moment?

jps.text: That the triumphing of the wicked is short, and the joy of the godless but for a moment?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יַעֲלֶ֣ה לַשָּׁמַ֣יִם שִׂיאֹ֑ו וְ֝רֹאשֹׁ֗ו לָעָ֥ב יַגִּֽיעַ׃
verses.englishText: Though his excellency mount up to the heavens, and his head reach unto the clouds;

jps.text: Though his excellency mount up to the heavens, and his head reach unto the clouds;

verses.hebrewText: כְּֽ֭גֶלֲלֹו לָנֶ֣צַח יֹאבֵ֑ד רֹ֝אָ֗יו יֹאמְר֥וּ אַיֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Yet he shall perish for ever like his own dung; they that have seen him shall say: 'Where is he?'

jps.text: Yet he shall perish for ever like his own dung; they that have seen him shall say: 'Where is he?'

verses.hebrewText: כַּחֲלֹ֣ום יָ֭עוּף וְלֹ֣א יִמְצָא֑וּהוּ וְ֝יֻדַּ֗ד כְּחֶזְיֹ֥ון לָֽיְלָה׃
verses.englishText: He shall fly away as a dream, and shall not be found; yea, he shall be chased away as a vision of the night.

jps.text: He shall fly away as a dream, and shall not be found; yea, he shall be chased away as a vision of the night.

verses.hebrewText: עַ֣יִן שְׁ֭זָפַתּוּ וְלֹ֣א תֹוסִ֑יף וְלֹא־עֹ֝֗וד תְּשׁוּרֶ֥נּוּ מְקֹומֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The eye which saw him shall see him no more; neither shall his place any more behold him.

jps.text: The eye which saw him shall see him no more; neither shall his place any more behold him.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֭נָיו יְרַצּ֣וּ דַלִּ֑ים וְ֝יָדָ֗יו תָּשֵׁ֥בְנָה אֹונֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: His children shall appease the poor, and his hands shall restore his wealth.

jps.text: His children shall appease the poor, and his hands shall restore his wealth.

verses.hebrewText: עַ֭צְמֹותָיו מָלְא֣וּ *עֲלוּמֹו (עֲלוּמָ֑יו) וְ֝עִמֹּ֗ו עַל־עָפָ֥ר תִּשְׁכָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: His bones are full of his youth, but it shall lie down with him in the dust.

jps.text: His bones are full of his youth, but it shall lie down with him in the dust.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תַּמְתִּ֣יק בְּפִ֣יו רָעָ֑ה יַ֝כְחִידֶ֗נָּה תַּ֣חַת לְשֹׁונֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Though wickedness be sweet in his mouth, though he hide it under his tongue;

jps.text: Though wickedness be sweet in his mouth, though he hide it under his tongue;

verses.hebrewText: יַחְמֹ֣ל עָ֭לֶיהָ וְלֹ֣א יַֽעַזְבֶ֑נָּה וְ֝יִמְנָעֶ֗נָּה בְּתֹ֣וךְ חִכֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Though he spare it, and will not let it go, but keep it still within his mouth;

jps.text: Though he spare it, and will not let it go, but keep it still within his mouth;

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭חְמֹו בְּמֵעָ֣יו נֶהְפָּ֑ךְ מְרֹורַ֖ת פְּתָנִ֣ים בְּקִרְבֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Yet his food in his bowels is turned, it is the gall of asps within him.

jps.text: Yet his food in his bowels is turned, it is the gall of asps within him.

verses.hebrewText: חַ֣יִל בָּ֭לַע וַיְקִאֶ֑נּוּ מִ֝בִּטְנֹ֗ו יֹֽורִשֶׁ֥נּוּ אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: He hath swallowed down riches, and he shall vomit them up again; God shall cast them out of his belly.

jps.text: He hath swallowed down riches, and he shall vomit them up again; God shall cast them out of his belly.

verses.hebrewText: רֹאשׁ־פְּתָנִ֥ים יִינָ֑ק תַּֽ֝הַרְגֵ֗הוּ לְשֹׁ֣ון אֶפְעֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: He shall suck the poison of asps; the viper's tongue shall slay him.

jps.text: He shall suck the poison of asps; the viper's tongue shall slay him.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יֵ֥רֶא בִפְלַגֹּ֑ות נַהֲרֵ֥י נַ֝חֲלֵ֗י דְּבַ֣שׁ וְחֶמְאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He shall not look upon the rivers, the flowing streams of honey and curd.

jps.text: He shall not look upon the rivers, the flowing streams of honey and curd.

verses.hebrewText: מֵשִׁ֣יב יָ֭גָע וְלֹ֣א יִבְלָ֑ע כְּחֵ֥יל תְּ֝מוּרָתֹ֗ו וְלֹ֣א יַעֲלֹֽס׃
verses.englishText: That which he laboured for shall he give back, and shall not swallow it down; according to the substance that he hath gotten, he shall not rejoice.

jps.text: That which he laboured for shall he give back, and shall not swallow it down; according to the substance that he hath gotten, he shall not rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־רִ֭צַּץ עָזַ֣ב דַּלִּ֑ים בַּ֥יִת גָּ֝זַ֗ל וְלֹ֣א יִבֶנֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: For he hath oppressed and forsaken the poor; he hath violently taken away a house, and he shall not build it up.

jps.text: For he hath oppressed and forsaken the poor; he hath violently taken away a house, and he shall not build it up.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־יָדַ֣ע שָׁלֵ֣ו בְּבִטְנֹ֑ו בַּ֝חֲמוּדֹ֗ו לֹ֣א יְמַלֵּֽט׃
verses.englishText: Because he knew no quietness within him, in his greed he suffered nought to escape,

jps.text: Because he knew no quietness within him, in his greed he suffered nought to escape,

verses.hebrewText: אֵין־שָׂרִ֥יד לְאָכְלֹ֑ו עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן לֹא־יָחִ֥יל טוּבֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: There was nothing left that he devoured not — therefore his prosperity shall not endure.

jps.text: There was nothing left that he devoured not — therefore his prosperity shall not endure.

verses.hebrewText: בִּמְלֹ֣אות שִׂ֭פְקֹו יֵ֣צֶר לֹ֑ו כָּל־יַ֖ד עָמֵ֣ל תְּבֹואֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: In the fulness of his sufficiency he shall be in straits; the hand of every one that is in misery shall come upon him.

jps.text: In the fulness of his sufficiency he shall be in straits; the hand of every one that is in misery shall come upon him.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִ֤י ׀ לְמַלֵּ֬א בִטְנֹ֗ו יְֽשַׁלַּח־בֹּ֖ו חֲרֹ֣ון אַפֹּ֑ו וְיַמְטֵ֥ר עָ֝לֵ֗ימֹו בִּלְחוּמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: It shall be for the filling of his belly; He shall cast the fierceness of His wrath upon him, and shall cause it to rain upon him into his flesh.

jps.text: It shall be for the filling of his belly; He shall cast the fierceness of His wrath upon him, and shall cause it to rain upon him into his flesh.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭בְרַח מִנֵּ֣שֶׁק בַּרְזֶ֑ל תַּ֝חְלְפֵ֗הוּ קֶ֣שֶׁת נְחוּשָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: If he flee from the iron weapon, the bow of brass shall strike him through.

jps.text: If he flee from the iron weapon, the bow of brass shall strike him through.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁלַף֮ וַיֵּצֵ֪א מִגֵּ֫וָ֥ה וּ֭בָרָק מִֽמְּרֹרָתֹ֥ו יַהֲלֹ֗ךְ עָלָ֥יו אֵמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He draweth it forth, and it cometh out of his body; yea, the glittering point cometh out of his gall; terrors are upon him.

jps.text: He draweth it forth, and it cometh out of his body; yea, the glittering point cometh out of his gall; terrors are upon him.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־חֹשֶׁךְ֮ טָמ֪וּן לִצְפּ֫וּנָ֥יו תְּ֭אָכְלֵהוּ אֵ֣שׁ לֹֽא־נֻפָּ֑ח יֵ֖רַע שָׂרִ֣יד בְּאָהֳלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: All darkness is laid up for his treasures; a fire not blown by man shall consume him; it shall go ill with him that is left in his tent.

jps.text: All darkness is laid up for his treasures; a fire not blown by man shall consume him; it shall go ill with him that is left in his tent.

verses.hebrewText: יְגַלּ֣וּ שָׁמַ֣יִם עֲוֹנֹ֑ו וְ֝אֶ֗רֶץ מִתְקֹומָ֘מָ֥ה לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The heavens shall reveal his iniquity, and the earth shall rise up against him.

jps.text: The heavens shall reveal his iniquity, and the earth shall rise up against him.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭גֶל יְב֣וּל בֵּיתֹ֑ו נִ֝גָּרֹ֗ות בְּיֹ֣ום אַפֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The increase of his house shall depart, his goods shall flow away in the day of his wrath.

jps.text: The increase of his house shall depart, his goods shall flow away in the day of his wrath.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֤ה ׀ חֵֽלֶק־אָדָ֣ם רָ֭שָׁע מֵאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְנַחֲלַ֖ת אִמְרֹ֣ו מֵאֵֽל׃ פ
verses.englishText: This is the portion of a wicked man from God, and the heritage appointed unto him by God.

jps.text: This is the portion of a wicked man from God, and the heritage appointed unto him by God.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְע֣וּ שָׁ֭מֹועַ מִלָּתִ֑י וּתְהִי־זֹ֝֗את תַּנְח֥וּמֹֽתֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Hear diligently my speech; and let this be your consolations.

jps.text: Hear diligently my speech; and let this be your consolations.

verses.hebrewText: שָׂ֭אוּנִי וְאָנֹכִ֣י אֲדַבֵּ֑ר וְאַחַ֖ר דַּבְּרִ֣י תַלְעִֽיג׃
verses.englishText: Suffer me, that I may speak; and after that I have spoken, mock on.

jps.text: Suffer me, that I may speak; and after that I have spoken, mock on.

verses.hebrewText: הֶ֭אָנֹכִי לְאָדָ֣ם שִׂיחִ֑י וְאִם־מַ֝דּ֗וּעַ לֹא־תִקְצַ֥ר רוּחִֽי׃
verses.englishText: As for me, is my complaint to man? Or why should I not be impatient?

jps.text: As for me, is my complaint to man? Or why should I not be impatient?

verses.hebrewText: פְּנוּ־אֵלַ֥י וְהָשַׁ֑מּוּ וְשִׂ֖ימוּ יָ֣ד עַל־פֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Turn unto me, and be astonished, and lay your hand upon your mouth.

jps.text: Turn unto me, and be astonished, and lay your hand upon your mouth.

verses.hebrewText: וְאִם־זָכַ֥רְתִּי וְנִבְהָ֑לְתִּי וְאָחַ֥ז בְּ֝שָׂרִ֗י פַּלָּצֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: Even when I remember I am affrighted, and horror hath taketh hold on my flesh.

jps.text: Even when I remember I am affrighted, and horror hath taketh hold on my flesh.

verses.hebrewText: מַדּ֣וּעַ רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִחְי֑וּ עָ֝תְק֗וּ גַּם־גָּ֥בְרוּ חָֽיִל׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore do the wicked live, become old, yea, wax mighty in power?

jps.text: Wherefore do the wicked live, become old, yea, wax mighty in power?

verses.hebrewText: זַרְעָ֤ם נָכֹ֣ון לִפְנֵיהֶ֣ם עִמָּ֑ם וְ֝צֶאֱצָאֵיהֶ֗ם לְעֵינֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Their seed is established in their sight with them, and their offspring before their eyes.

jps.text: Their seed is established in their sight with them, and their offspring before their eyes.

verses.hebrewText: בָּתֵּיהֶ֣ם שָׁלֹ֣ום מִפָּ֑חַד וְלֹ֤א שֵׁ֖בֶט אֱלֹ֣והַּ עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Their houses are safe, without fear, neither is the rod of God upon them.

jps.text: Their houses are safe, without fear, neither is the rod of God upon them.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁורֹ֣ו עִ֭בַּר וְלֹ֣א יַגְעִ֑ל תְּפַלֵּ֥ט פָּ֝רָתֹ֗ו וְלֹ֣א תְשַׁכֵּֽל׃
verses.englishText: Their bull gendereth, and faileth not; their cow calveth, and casteth not her calf.

jps.text: Their bull gendereth, and faileth not; their cow calveth, and casteth not her calf.

verses.hebrewText: יְשַׁלְּח֣וּ כַ֭צֹּאן עֲוִילֵיהֶ֑ם וְ֝יַלְדֵיהֶ֗ם יְרַקֵּדֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: They send forth their little ones like a flock, and their children dance.

jps.text: They send forth their little ones like a flock, and their children dance.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭שְׂאוּ כְּתֹ֣ף וְכִנֹּ֑ור וְ֝יִשְׂמְח֗וּ לְקֹ֣ול עוּגָֽב׃
verses.englishText: They sing to the timbrel and harp, and rejoice at the sound of the pipe.

jps.text: They sing to the timbrel and harp, and rejoice at the sound of the pipe.

verses.hebrewText: *יְבַלּוּ (יְכַלּ֣וּ) בַטֹּ֣וב יְמֵיהֶ֑ם וּ֝בְרֶ֗גַע שְׁאֹ֣ול יֵחָֽתּוּ׃
verses.englishText: They spend their days in prosperity, and peacefully they go down to the grave.

jps.text: They spend their days in prosperity, and peacefully they go down to the grave.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ לָ֭אֵל ס֣וּר מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וְדַ֥עַת דְּ֝רָכֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א חָפָֽצְנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yet they said unto God: 'Depart from us; for we desire not the knowledge of Thy ways.

jps.text: Yet they said unto God: 'Depart from us; for we desire not the knowledge of Thy ways.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־שַׁדַּ֥י כִּֽי־נַֽעַבְדֶ֑נּוּ וּמַה־נֹּ֝ועִ֗יל כִּ֣י נִפְגַּע־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: What is the Almighty, that we should serve Him? And what profit should we have, if we pray unto Him?' —

jps.text: What is the Almighty, that we should serve Him? And what profit should we have, if we pray unto Him?' —

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן לֹ֣א בְיָדָ֣ם טוּבָ֑ם עֲצַ֥ת רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים רָ֣חֲקָה מֶֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Lo, their prosperity is not in their hand; the counsel of the wicked is far from me.

jps.text: Lo, their prosperity is not in their hand; the counsel of the wicked is far from me.

verses.hebrewText: כַּמָּ֤ה ׀ נֵר־רְשָׁ֘עִ֤ים יִדְעָ֗ךְ וְיָבֹ֣א עָלֵ֣ימֹו אֵידָ֑ם חֲ֝בָלִ֗ים יְחַלֵּ֥ק בְּאַפֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: How oft is it that the lamp of the wicked is put out? that their calamity cometh upon them? that He distributeth pains in His anger?

jps.text: How oft is it that the lamp of the wicked is put out? that their calamity cometh upon them? that He distributeth pains in His anger?

verses.hebrewText: יִהְי֗וּ כְּתֶ֥בֶן לִפְנֵי־ר֑וּחַ וּ֝כְמֹ֗ץ גְּנָבַ֥תּוּ סוּפָֽה׃
verses.englishText: That they are as stubble before the wind, and as chaff that the storm stealeth away?

jps.text: That they are as stubble before the wind, and as chaff that the storm stealeth away?

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹ֗והַּ יִצְפֹּן־לְבָנָ֥יו אֹונֹ֑ו יְשַׁלֵּ֖ם אֵלָ֣יו וְיֵדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: 'God layeth up his iniquity for his children!' — let Him recompense it unto himself, that he may know it.

jps.text: 'God layeth up his iniquity for his children!' — let Him recompense it unto himself, that he may know it.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְא֣וּ *עֵינֹו (עֵינָ֣יו) כִּידֹ֑ו וּמֵחֲמַ֖ת שַׁדַּ֣י יִשְׁתֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let his own eyes see his destruction, and let him drink of the wrath of the Almighty.

jps.text: Let his own eyes see his destruction, and let him drink of the wrath of the Almighty.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י מַה־חֶפְצֹ֣ו בְּבֵיתֹ֣ו אַחֲרָ֑יו וּמִסְפַּ֖ר חֳדָשָׁ֣יו חֻצָּֽצוּ׃
verses.englishText: For what pleasure hath he in his house after him? seeing the number of his months is determined.

jps.text: For what pleasure hath he in his house after him? seeing the number of his months is determined.

verses.hebrewText: הַלְאֵ֥ל יְלַמֶּד־דָּ֑עַת וְ֝ה֗וּא רָמִ֥ים יִשְׁפֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: Shall any teach God knowledge? seeing it is He that judgeth those that are high.

jps.text: Shall any teach God knowledge? seeing it is He that judgeth those that are high.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֗ה יָ֭מוּת בְּעֶ֣צֶם תֻּמֹּ֑ו כֻּ֝לֹּ֗ו שַׁלְאֲנַ֥ן וְשָׁלֵֽיו׃
verses.englishText: One dieth in his full strength, being wholly at ease and quiet;

jps.text: One dieth in his full strength, being wholly at ease and quiet;

verses.hebrewText: עֲ֭טִינָיו מָלְא֣וּ חָלָ֑ב וּמֹ֖חַ עַצְמֹותָ֣יו יְשֻׁקֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: His pails are full of milk, and the marrow of his bones is moistened.

jps.text: His pails are full of milk, and the marrow of his bones is moistened.

verses.hebrewText: וְזֶ֗ה יָ֭מוּת בְּנֶ֣פֶשׁ מָרָ֑ה וְלֹֽא־אָ֝כַ֗ל בַּטֹּובָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And another dieth in bitterness of soul, and hath never tasted of good.

jps.text: And another dieth in bitterness of soul, and hath never tasted of good.

verses.hebrewText: יַ֭חַד עַל־עָפָ֣ר יִשְׁכָּ֑בוּ וְ֝רִמָּ֗ה תְּכַסֶּ֥ה עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: They lie down alike in the dust, and the worm covereth them.

jps.text: They lie down alike in the dust, and the worm covereth them.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן יָ֭דַעְתִּי מַחְשְׁבֹֽותֵיכֶ֑ם וּ֝מְזִמֹּ֗ות עָלַ֥י תַּחְמֹֽסוּ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I know your thoughts, and the devices which ye wrongfully imagine against me.

jps.text: Behold, I know your thoughts, and the devices which ye wrongfully imagine against me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י תֹֽאמְר֗וּ אַיֵּ֥ה בֵית־נָדִ֑יב וְ֝אַיֵּ֗ה אֹ֤הֶל ׀ מִשְׁכְּנֹ֬ות רְשָׁעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For ye say: 'Where is the house of the prince? And where is the tent wherein the wicked dwelt?'

jps.text: For ye say: 'Where is the house of the prince? And where is the tent wherein the wicked dwelt?'

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֣א שְׁ֭אֶלְתֶּם עֹ֣ובְרֵי דָ֑רֶךְ וְ֝אֹתֹתָ֗ם לֹ֣א תְנַכֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Have ye not asked them that go by the way; and will ye misdeem their tokens,

jps.text: Have ye not asked them that go by the way; and will ye misdeem their tokens,

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לְיֹ֣ום אֵ֭יד יֵחָ֣שֶׂךְ רָ֑ע לְיֹ֖ום עֲבָרֹ֣ות יוּבָֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: That the evil man is reserved to the day of calamity, that they are led forth to the day of wrath?

jps.text: That the evil man is reserved to the day of calamity, that they are led forth to the day of wrath?

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יַגִּ֣יד עַל־פָּנָ֣יו דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וְהֽוּא־עָ֝שָׂ֗ה מִ֣י יְשַׁלֶּם־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: But who shall declare his way to his face? And who shall repay him what he hath done?

jps.text: But who shall declare his way to his face? And who shall repay him what he hath done?

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭הוּא לִקְבָרֹ֣ות יוּבָ֑ל וְֽעַל־גָּדִ֥ישׁ יִשְׁקֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: For he is borne to the grave, and watch is kept over his tomb.

jps.text: For he is borne to the grave, and watch is kept over his tomb.

verses.hebrewText: מָֽתְקוּ־לֹ֗ו רִגְבֵ֫י נָ֥חַל וְ֭אַחֲרָיו כָּל־אָדָ֣ם יִמְשֹׁ֑וךְ וּ֝לְפָנָ֗יו אֵ֣ין מִסְפָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: The clods of the valley are sweet unto him, and all men draw after him, as there were innumerable before him.

jps.text: The clods of the valley are sweet unto him, and all men draw after him, as there were innumerable before him.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אֵיךְ תְּנַחֲמ֣וּנִי הָ֑בֶל וּ֝תְשֽׁוּבֹתֵיכֶ֗ם נִשְׁאַר־מָֽעַל׃ ס
verses.englishText: How then comfort ye me in vain? And as for your answers, there remaineth only faithlessness?

jps.text: How then comfort ye me in vain? And as for your answers, there remaineth only faithlessness?

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן אֱלִיפַ֥ז הַֽתֵּמָנִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: הַלְאֵ֥ל יִסְכָּן־גָּ֑בֶר כִּֽי־יִסְכֹּ֖ן עָלֵ֣ימֹו מַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: Can a man be profitable unto God? Or can he that is wise be profitable unto Him?
