jps.text: Can a man be profitable unto God? Or can he that is wise be profitable unto Him?

verses.hebrewText: הַחֵ֣פֶץ לְ֭שַׁדַּי כִּ֣י תִצְדָּ֑ק וְאִם־בֶּ֝֗צַע כִּֽי־תַתֵּ֥ם דְּרָכֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Is it any advantage to the Almighty, that thou art righteous? Or is it gain to Him, that thou makest thy ways blameless?

jps.text: Is it any advantage to the Almighty, that thou art righteous? Or is it gain to Him, that thou makest thy ways blameless?

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭‌ֽמִיִּרְאָ֣תְךָ יֹכִיחֶ֑ךָ יָבֹ֥וא עִ֝מְּךָ֗ בַּמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: Is it for thy fear of Him that He reproveth thee, that He entereth with thee into judgment?

jps.text: Is it for thy fear of Him that He reproveth thee, that He entereth with thee into judgment?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֣א רָעָֽתְךָ֣ רַבָּ֑ה וְאֵֽין־קֵ֝֗ץ לַעֲוֹנֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Is not thy wickedness great? And are not thine iniquities without end?

jps.text: Is not thy wickedness great? And are not thine iniquities without end?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תַחְבֹּ֣ל אַחֶ֣יךָ חִנָּ֑ם וּבִגְדֵ֖י עֲרוּמִּ֣ים תַּפְשִֽׁיט׃
verses.englishText: For thou hast taken pledges of thy brother for nought, and stripped the naked of their clothing.

jps.text: For thou hast taken pledges of thy brother for nought, and stripped the naked of their clothing.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־מַ֭יִם עָיֵ֣ף תַּשְׁקֶ֑ה וּ֝מֵרָעֵ֗ב תִּֽמְנַֽע־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast not given water to the weary to drink, and thou hast withholden bread from the hungry.

jps.text: Thou hast not given water to the weary to drink, and thou hast withholden bread from the hungry.

verses.hebrewText: וְאִ֣ישׁ זְ֭רֹועַ לֹ֣ו הָאָ֑רֶץ וּנְשׂ֥וּא פָ֝נִ֗ים יֵ֣שֶׁב בָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: And as a mighty man, who hath the earth, and as a man of rank, who dwelleth in it,

jps.text: And as a mighty man, who hath the earth, and as a man of rank, who dwelleth in it,

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭לְמָנֹות שִׁלַּ֣חְתָּ רֵיקָ֑ם וּזְרֹעֹ֖ות יְתֹמִ֣ים יְדֻכָּֽא׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast sent widows away empty, and the arms of the fatherless have been broken.

jps.text: Thou hast sent widows away empty, and the arms of the fatherless have been broken.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֭ן סְבִיבֹותֶ֣יךָ פַחִ֑ים וִֽ֝יבַהֶלְךָ פַּ֣חַד פִּתְאֹֽם׃
verses.englishText: Therefore snares are round about thee, and sudden dread affrighted thee,

jps.text: Therefore snares are round about thee, and sudden dread affrighted thee,

verses.hebrewText: אֹו־חֹ֥שֶׁךְ לֹֽא־תִרְאֶ֑ה וְֽשִׁפְעַת־מַ֥יִם תְּכַסֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Or darkness, that thou canst not see, and abundance of waters cover thee.

jps.text: Or darkness, that thou canst not see, and abundance of waters cover thee.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‍ֽלֹא־אֱ֭לֹוהַּ גֹּ֣בַהּ שָׁמָ֑יִם וּרְאֵ֤ה רֹ֖אשׁ כֹּוכָבִ֣ים כִּי־רָֽמּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Is not God in the height of heaven? And behold the topmost of the stars, how high they are!

jps.text: Is not God in the height of heaven? And behold the topmost of the stars, how high they are!

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭אָמַרְתָּ מַה־יָּ֣דַֽע אֵ֑ל הַבְעַ֖ד עֲרָפֶ֣ל יִשְׁפֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: And thou sayest: 'What doth God know? Can He judge through the dark cloud?

jps.text: And thou sayest: 'What doth God know? Can He judge through the dark cloud?

verses.hebrewText: עָבִ֣ים סֵֽתֶר־לֹ֖ו וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֶ֑ה וְח֥וּג שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם יִתְהַלָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Thick clouds are a covering to Him, that He seeth not; and He walketh in the circuit of heaven.'

jps.text: Thick clouds are a covering to Him, that He seeth not; and He walketh in the circuit of heaven.'

verses.hebrewText: הַאֹ֣רַח עֹולָ֣ם תִּשְׁמֹ֑ר אֲשֶׁ֖ר דָּרְכ֣וּ מְתֵי־אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Wilt thou keep the old way which wicked men have trodden?

jps.text: Wilt thou keep the old way which wicked men have trodden?

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶֽׁר־קֻמְּט֥וּ וְלֹא־עֵ֑ת נָ֝הָ֗ר יוּצַ֥ק יְסֹודָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Who were snatched away before their time, whose foundation was poured out as a stream;

jps.text: Who were snatched away before their time, whose foundation was poured out as a stream;

verses.hebrewText: הָאֹמְרִ֣ים לָ֭אֵל ס֣וּר מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וּמַה־יִּפְעַ֖ל שַׁדַּ֣י לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Who said unto God: 'Depart from us'; and what could the Almighty do unto them?

jps.text: Who said unto God: 'Depart from us'; and what could the Almighty do unto them?

verses.hebrewText: וְה֤וּא מִלֵּ֣א בָתֵּיהֶ֣ם טֹ֑וב וַעֲצַ֥ת רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים רָ֣חֲקָה מֶֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Yet He filled their houses with good things — but the counsel of the wicked is far from me.

jps.text: Yet He filled their houses with good things — but the counsel of the wicked is far from me.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְא֣וּ צַדִּיקִ֣ים וְיִשְׂמָ֑חוּ וְ֝נָקִ֗י יִלְעַג־לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: The righteous saw it, and were glad, and the innocent laugh them to scorn:

jps.text: The righteous saw it, and were glad, and the innocent laugh them to scorn:

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֣א נִכְחַ֣ד קִימָ֑נוּ וְ֝יִתְרָ֗ם אָ֣כְלָה אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: 'Surely their substance is cut off, and their abundance the fire hath consumed.'

jps.text: 'Surely their substance is cut off, and their abundance the fire hath consumed.'

verses.hebrewText: הַסְכֶּן־נָ֣א עִמֹּ֑ו וּשְׁלם בָּ֝הֶ֗ם תְּֽבֹואַתְךָ֥ טֹובָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Acquaint now thyself with Him, and be at peace; thereby shall thine increase be good.

jps.text: Acquaint now thyself with Him, and be at peace; thereby shall thine increase be good.

verses.hebrewText: קַח־נָ֣א מִפִּ֣יו תֹּורָ֑ה וְשִׂ֥ים אֲ֝מָרָ֗יו בִּלְבָבֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Receive, I pray thee, instruction from His mouth, and lay up His words in thy heart.

jps.text: Receive, I pray thee, instruction from His mouth, and lay up His words in thy heart.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תָּשׁ֣וּב עַד־שַׁ֭דַּי תִּבָּנֶ֑ה תַּרְחִ֥יק עַ֝וְלָ֗ה מֵאָהֳלֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: If thou return to the Almighty, thou shalt be built up — if thou put away unrighteousness far from thy tents,

jps.text: If thou return to the Almighty, thou shalt be built up — if thou put away unrighteousness far from thy tents,

verses.hebrewText: וְשִׁית־עַל־עָפָ֥ר בָּ֑צֶר וּבְצ֖וּר נְחָלִ֣ים אֹופִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: And lay thy treasure in the dust, and the gold of Ophir among the stones of the brooks;

jps.text: And lay thy treasure in the dust, and the gold of Ophir among the stones of the brooks;

verses.hebrewText: וְהָיָ֣ה שַׁדַּ֣י בְּצָרֶ֑יךָ וְכֶ֖סֶף תֹּועָפֹ֣ות לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: And the Almighty be thy treasure, and precious silver unto thee;

jps.text: And the Almighty be thy treasure, and precious silver unto thee;

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־אָ֭ז עַל־שַׁדַּ֣י תִּתְעַנָּ֑ג וְתִשָּׂ֖א אֶל־אֱלֹ֣והַּ פָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Then surely shalt thou have thy delight in the Almighty, and shalt lift up thy face unto God.

jps.text: Then surely shalt thou have thy delight in the Almighty, and shalt lift up thy face unto God.

verses.hebrewText: תַּעְתִּ֣יר אֵ֭לָיו וְיִשְׁמָעֶ֑ךָּ וּנְדָרֶ֥יךָ תְשַׁלֵּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt make thy prayer unto Him, and He will hear thee, and thou shalt pay thy vows;

jps.text: Thou shalt make thy prayer unto Him, and He will hear thee, and thou shalt pay thy vows;

verses.hebrewText: וְֽתִגְזַר־אֹ֖ומֶר וְיָ֣קָם לָ֑ךְ וְעַל־דְּ֝רָכֶ֗יךָ נָ֣גַֽהּ אֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt also decree a thing, and it shall be established unto thee, and light shall shine upon thy ways.

jps.text: Thou shalt also decree a thing, and it shall be established unto thee, and light shall shine upon thy ways.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִ֭שְׁפִּילוּ וַתֹּ֣אמֶר גֵּוָ֑ה וְשַׁ֖ח עֵינַ֣יִם יֹושִֽׁעַ׃
verses.englishText: When they cast thee down, thou shalt say: 'There is lifting up'; for the humble person He saveth.

jps.text: When they cast thee down, thou shalt say: 'There is lifting up'; for the humble person He saveth.

verses.hebrewText: יֽ͏ְמַלֵּ֥ט אִֽי־נָקִ֑י וְ֝נִמְלַ֗ט בְּבֹ֣ר כַּפֶּֽיךָ׃ פ
verses.englishText: He delivereth him that is innocent, yea, thou shalt be delivered through the cleanness of thy hands.

jps.text: He delivereth him that is innocent, yea, thou shalt be delivered through the cleanness of thy hands.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־הַ֭יֹּום מְרִ֣י שִׂחִ֑י יָ֝דִ֗י כָּבְדָ֥ה עַל־אַנְחָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Even to-day is my complaint bitter; my hand is become heavy because of my groaning.

jps.text: Even to-day is my complaint bitter; my hand is become heavy because of my groaning.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יִתֵּ֣ן יָ֭דַעְתִּי וְאֶמְצָאֵ֑הוּ אָ֝בֹ֗וא עַד־תְּכוּנָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Oh that I knew where I might find Him, that I might come even to His seat!

jps.text: Oh that I knew where I might find Him, that I might come even to His seat!

verses.hebrewText: אֶעֶרְכָ֣ה לְפָנָ֣יו מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּ֝פִ֗י אֲמַלֵּ֥א תֹוכָחֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: I would order my cause before Him, and fill my mouth with arguments.

jps.text: I would order my cause before Him, and fill my mouth with arguments.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֭דְעָה מִלִּ֣ים יַעֲנֵ֑נִי וְ֝אָבִ֗ינָה מַה־יֹּ֥אמַר לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I would know the words which He would answer me, and understand what He would say unto me.

jps.text: I would know the words which He would answer me, and understand what He would say unto me.

verses.hebrewText: הַבְּרָב־כֹּ֖חַ יָרִ֣יב עִמָּדִ֑י לֹ֥א אַךְ־ה֝֗וּא יָשִׂ֥ם בִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Would He contend with me in His great power? Nay; but He would give heed unto me.

jps.text: Would He contend with me in His great power? Nay; but He would give heed unto me.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֗ם יָ֭שָׁר נֹוכָ֣ח עִמֹּ֑ו וַאֲפַלְּטָ֥ה לָ֝נֶ֗צַח מִשֹּׁפְטִֽי׃
verses.englishText: There the upright might reason with Him; so should I be delivered for ever from my Judge.

jps.text: There the upright might reason with Him; so should I be delivered for ever from my Judge.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן קֶ֣דֶם אֶהֱלֹ֣ךְ וְאֵינֶ֑נּוּ וְ֝אָחֹ֗ור וְֽלֹא־אָבִ֥ין לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I go forward, but He is not there, and backward, but I cannot perceive Him;

jps.text: Behold, I go forward, but He is not there, and backward, but I cannot perceive Him;

verses.hebrewText: שְׂמֹ֣אול בַּעֲשֹׂתֹ֣ו וְלֹא־אָ֑חַז יַעְטֹ֥ף יָ֝מִ֗ין וְלֹ֣א אֶרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: On the left hand, when He doth work, but I cannot behold Him, He turneth Himself to the right hand, but I cannot see Him.

jps.text: On the left hand, when He doth work, but I cannot behold Him, He turneth Himself to the right hand, but I cannot see Him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יָ֭דַע דֶּ֣רֶךְ עִמָּדִ֑י בְּ֝חָנַ֗נִי כַּזָּהָ֥ב אֵצֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: For He knoweth the way that I take; when He hath tried me, I shall come forth as gold.

jps.text: For He knoweth the way that I take; when He hath tried me, I shall come forth as gold.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭אֲשֻׁרֹו אָחֲזָ֣ה רַגְלִ֑י דַּרְכֹּ֖ו שָׁמַ֣רְתִּי וְלֹא־אָֽט׃
verses.englishText: My foot hath held fast to His steps, His way have I kept, and turned not aside.

jps.text: My foot hath held fast to His steps, His way have I kept, and turned not aside.

verses.hebrewText: מִצְוַ֣ת שְׂ֭פָתָיו וְלֹ֣א אָמִ֑ישׁ מֵ֝חֻקִּ֗י צָפַ֥נְתִּי אִמְרֵי־פִֽיו׃
verses.englishText: I have not gone back from the commandment of His lips; I have treasured up the words of His mouth more than my necessary food.

jps.text: I have not gone back from the commandment of His lips; I have treasured up the words of His mouth more than my necessary food.

verses.hebrewText: וְה֣וּא בְ֭אֶחָד וּמִ֣י יְשִׁיבֶ֑נּוּ וְנַפְשֹׁ֖ו אִוְּתָ֣ה וַיָּֽעַשׂ׃
verses.englishText: But He is at one with Himself, and who can turn Him? And what His soul desireth, even that He doeth.

jps.text: But He is at one with Himself, and who can turn Him? And what His soul desireth, even that He doeth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י יַשְׁלִ֣ים חֻקִּ֑י וְכָהֵ֖נָּה רַבֹּ֣ות עִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: For He will perform that which is appointed for me; and many such things are with Him.

jps.text: For He will perform that which is appointed for me; and many such things are with Him.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֭ן מִפָּנָ֣יו אֶבָּהֵ֑ל אֶ֝תְבֹּונֵ֗ן וְאֶפְחַ֥ד מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Therefore am I affrighted at His presence; when I consider, I am afraid of Him.

jps.text: Therefore am I affrighted at His presence; when I consider, I am afraid of Him.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אֵל הֵרַ֣ךְ לִבִּ֑י וְ֝שַׁדַּ֗י הִבְהִילָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Yea, God hath made my heart faint, and the Almighty hath affrighted me;

jps.text: Yea, God hath made my heart faint, and the Almighty hath affrighted me;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־לֹ֣א נִ֭צְמַתִּי מִפְּנֵי־חֹ֑שֶׁךְ וּ֝מִפָּנַ֗י כִּסָּה־אֹֽפֶל׃
verses.englishText: Because I was not cut off before the darkness, neither did He cover the thick darkness from my face.

jps.text: Because I was not cut off before the darkness, neither did He cover the thick darkness from my face.

verses.hebrewText: מַדּ֗וּעַ מִ֭שַּׁדַּי לֹא־נִצְפְּנ֣וּ עִתִּ֑ים *וְיֹדְעֹו (וְ֝יֹדְעָ֗יו) לֹא־חָ֥זוּ יָמָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Why are times not laid up by the Almighty? And why do not they that know Him see His days?

jps.text: Why are times not laid up by the Almighty? And why do not they that know Him see His days?

verses.hebrewText: גְּבֻלֹ֥ות יַשִּׂ֑יגוּ עֵ֥דֶר גָּ֝זְל֗וּ וַיִּרְעֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: There are that remove the landmarks; they violently take away flocks, and feed them.

jps.text: There are that remove the landmarks; they violently take away flocks, and feed them.

verses.hebrewText: חֲמֹ֣ור יְתֹומִ֣ים יִנְהָ֑גוּ יַ֝חְבְּל֗וּ שֹׁ֣ור אַלְמָנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: They drive away the ass of the fatherless, they take the widow's ox for a pledge.

jps.text: They drive away the ass of the fatherless, they take the widow's ox for a pledge.

verses.hebrewText: יַטּ֣וּ אֶבְיֹונִ֣ים מִדָּ֑רֶךְ יַ֥חַד חֻ֝בְּא֗וּ עֲנִיֵּי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: They turn the needy out of the way; the poor of the earth hide themselves together.

jps.text: They turn the needy out of the way; the poor of the earth hide themselves together.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן פְּרָאִ֨ים ׀ בַּֽמִּדְבָּ֗ר יָצְא֣וּ בְּ֭פָעֳלָם מְשַׁחֲרֵ֣י לַטָּ֑רֶף עֲרָבָ֥ה לֹ֥ו לֶ֝֗חֶם לַנְּעָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Behold, as wild asses in the wilderness they go forth to their work, seeking diligently for food; the desert yieldeth them bread for their children.

jps.text: Behold, as wild asses in the wilderness they go forth to their work, seeking diligently for food; the desert yieldeth them bread for their children.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭שָּׂדֶה בְּלִילֹ֣ו *יַקְצִירוּ (יִקְצֹ֑ורוּ) וְכֶ֖רֶם רָשָׁ֣ע יְלַקֵּֽשׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: They cut his provender in the field; and they despoil the vineyard of the wicked.

jps.text: They cut his provender in the field; and they despoil the vineyard of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: עָרֹ֣ום יָ֭לִינוּ מִבְּלִ֣י לְב֑וּשׁ וְאֵ֥ין כְּ֝ס֗וּת בַּקָּרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: They lie all night naked without clothing, and have no covering in the cold.

jps.text: They lie all night naked without clothing, and have no covering in the cold.

verses.hebrewText: מִזֶּ֣רֶם הָרִ֣ים יִרְטָ֑בוּ וּֽמִבְּלִ֥י מַ֝חְסֶ֗ה חִבְּקוּ־צֽוּר׃
verses.englishText: They are wet with the showers of the mountains, and embrace the rock for want of a shelter.

jps.text: They are wet with the showers of the mountains, and embrace the rock for want of a shelter.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭גְזְלוּ מִשֹּׁ֣ד יָתֹ֑ום וְֽעַל־עָנִ֥י יַחְבֹּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: There are that pluck the fatherless from the breast, and take a pledge of the poor;

jps.text: There are that pluck the fatherless from the breast, and take a pledge of the poor;

verses.hebrewText: עָרֹ֣ום הִ֭לְּכוּ בְּלִ֣י לְב֑וּשׁ וּ֝רְעֵבִ֗ים נָ֣שְׂאוּ עֹֽמֶר׃
verses.englishText: So that they go about naked without clothing, and being hungry they carry the sheaves;

jps.text: So that they go about naked without clothing, and being hungry they carry the sheaves;

verses.hebrewText: בֵּין־שׁוּרֹתָ֥ם יַצְהִ֑ירוּ יְקָבִ֥ים דָּ֝רְכ֗וּ וַיִּצְמָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: They make oil within the rows of these men; they tread their winepresses, and suffer thirst.

jps.text: They make oil within the rows of these men; they tread their winepresses, and suffer thirst.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֘עִ֤יר מְתִ֨ים ׀ יִנְאָ֗קוּ וְנֶֽפֶשׁ־חֲלָלִ֥ים תְּשַׁוֵּ֑עַ וֶ֝אֱלֹ֗והַּ לֹא־יָשִׂ֥ים תִּפְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: From out of the populous city men groan, and the soul of the wounded crieth out; yet God imputeth it not for unseemliness.

jps.text: From out of the populous city men groan, and the soul of the wounded crieth out; yet God imputeth it not for unseemliness.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤מָּה ׀ הָיוּ֮ בְּֽמֹרְדֵ֫י־אֹ֥ור לֹֽא־הִכִּ֥ירוּ דְרָכָ֑יו וְלֹ֥א יָ֝שְׁב֗וּ בִּנְתִיבֹתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: These are of them that rebel against the light; they know not the ways thereof, nor abide in the paths thereof.

jps.text: These are of them that rebel against the light; they know not the ways thereof, nor abide in the paths thereof.

verses.hebrewText: לָאֹ֡ור יָ֘ק֤וּם רֹוצֵ֗חַ יִֽקְטָל־עָנִ֥י וְאֶבְיֹ֑ון וּ֝בַלַּ֗יְלָה יְהִ֣י כַגַּנָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: The murderer riseth with the light, to kill the poor and needy; and in the night he is as a thief.

jps.text: The murderer riseth with the light, to kill the poor and needy; and in the night he is as a thief.

verses.hebrewText: וְעֵ֤ין נֹאֵ֨ף ׀ שָׁ֤מְרָֽה נֶ֣שֶׁף לֵ֭אמֹר לֹא־תְשׁוּרֵ֣נִי עָ֑יִן וְסֵ֖תֶר פָּנִ֣ים יָשִֽׂים׃
verses.englishText: The eye also of the adulterer waiteth for the twilight, saying: 'No eye shall see me'; and he putteth a covering on his face.

jps.text: The eye also of the adulterer waiteth for the twilight, saying: 'No eye shall see me'; and he putteth a covering on his face.

verses.hebrewText: חָתַ֥ר בַּחֹ֗שֶׁךְ בָּ֫תִּ֥ים יֹומָ֥ם חִתְּמוּ־לָ֗מֹו לֹא־יָ֥דְעוּ אֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: In the dark they dig through houses; they shut themselves up in the day-time; they know not the light.

jps.text: In the dark they dig through houses; they shut themselves up in the day-time; they know not the light.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יַחְדָּ֨ו ׀ בֹּ֣קֶר לָ֣מֹו צַלְמָ֑וֶת כִּֽי־יַ֝כִּ֗יר בַּלְהֹ֥ות צַלְמָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: For the shadow of death is to all of them as the morning; for they know the terrors of the shadow of death.

jps.text: For the shadow of death is to all of them as the morning; for they know the terrors of the shadow of death.

verses.hebrewText: קַֽל־ה֤וּא ׀ עַל־פְּנֵי־מַ֗יִם תְּקֻלַּ֣ל חֶלְקָתָ֣ם בָּאָ֑רֶץ לֹֽא־יִ֝פְנֶה דֶּ֣רֶךְ כְּרָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He is swift upon the face of the waters; their portion is cursed in the earth; he turneth not by the way of the vineyards.

jps.text: He is swift upon the face of the waters; their portion is cursed in the earth; he turneth not by the way of the vineyards.

verses.hebrewText: צִיָּ֤ה גַם־חֹ֗ם יִגְזְל֥וּ מֵֽימֵי־שֶׁ֗לֶג שְׁאֹ֣ול חָטָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: Drought and heat consume the snow waters; so doth the nether-world those that have sinned.

jps.text: Drought and heat consume the snow waters; so doth the nether-world those that have sinned.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁכָּ֘חֵ֤הוּ רֶ֨חֶם ׀ מְתָ֘קֹ֤ו רִמָּ֗ה עֹ֥וד לֹֽא־יִזָּכֵ֑ר וַתִּשָּׁבֵ֖ר כָּעֵ֣ץ עַוְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The womb forgetteth him; the worm feedeth sweetly on him; he shall be no more remembered; and unrighteousness is broken as a tree.

jps.text: The womb forgetteth him; the worm feedeth sweetly on him; he shall be no more remembered; and unrighteousness is broken as a tree.

verses.hebrewText: רֹעֶ֣ה עֲ֭קָרָה לֹ֣א תֵלֵ֑ד וְ֝אַלְמָנָ֗ה לֹ֣א יְיֵטִֽיב׃
verses.englishText: He devoureth the barren that beareth not; and doeth not good to the widow.

jps.text: He devoureth the barren that beareth not; and doeth not good to the widow.

verses.hebrewText: וּמָשַׁ֣ךְ אַבִּירִ֣ים בְּכֹחֹ֑ו יָ֝ק֗וּם וְֽלֹא־יַאֲמִ֥ין בַּֽחַיִּֽין׃
verses.englishText: He draweth away the mighty also by his power; he riseth up, and he trusteth not his own life.

jps.text: He draweth away the mighty also by his power; he riseth up, and he trusteth not his own life.

verses.hebrewText: יִתֶּן־לֹ֣ו לָ֭בֶטַח וְיִשָּׁעֵ֑ן וְ֝עֵינֵ֗יהוּ עַל־דַּרְכֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Though it be given him to be in safety, whereon he resteth, yet His eyes are upon their ways.

jps.text: Though it be given him to be in safety, whereon he resteth, yet His eyes are upon their ways.

verses.hebrewText: רֹ֤ומּוּ מְּעַ֨ט ׀ וְֽאֵינֶ֗נּוּ וְֽהֻמְּכ֗וּ כַּכֹּ֥ל יִקָּפְצ֑וּן וּכְרֹ֖אשׁ שִׁבֹּ֣לֶת יִמָּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: They are exalted for a little while, and they are gone; yea, they are brought low, they are gathered in as all others, and wither as the tops of the ears of corn.

jps.text: They are exalted for a little while, and they are gone; yea, they are brought low, they are gathered in as all others, and wither as the tops of the ears of corn.

verses.hebrewText: וְאִם־לֹ֣א אֵ֭פֹו מִ֣י יַכְזִיבֵ֑נִי וְיָשֵׂ֥ם לְ֝אַ֗ל מִלָּתִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: And if it be not so now, who will prove me a liar, and make my speech nothing worth?

jps.text: And if it be not so now, who will prove me a liar, and make my speech nothing worth?

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּעַן בִּלְדַּ֥ד הַשֻּׁחִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:

jps.text: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:

verses.hebrewText: הַמְשֵׁ֣ל וָפַ֣חַד עִמֹּ֑ו עֹשֶׂ֥ה שָׁ֝לֹ֗ום בִּמְרֹומָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Dominion and fear are with Him; He maketh peace in His high places.

jps.text: Dominion and fear are with Him; He maketh peace in His high places.

verses.hebrewText: הֲיֵ֣שׁ מִ֭סְפָּר לִגְדוּדָ֑יו וְעַל־מִ֝֗י לֹא־יָק֥וּם אֹורֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Is there any number of His armies? And upon whom doth not His light arise?

jps.text: Is there any number of His armies? And upon whom doth not His light arise?

verses.hebrewText: וּמַה־יִּצְדַּ֣ק אֱנֹ֣ושׁ עִם־אֵ֑ל וּמַה־יִּ֝זְכֶּ֗ה יְל֣וּד אִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: How then can man be just with God? Or how can he be clean that is born of a woman?

jps.text: How then can man be just with God? Or how can he be clean that is born of a woman?

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן עַד־יָ֭רֵחַ וְלֹ֣א יַאֲהִ֑יל וְ֝כֹוכָבִ֗ים לֹא־זַכּ֥וּ בְעֵינָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Behold, even the moon hath no brightness, and the stars are not pure in His sight;

jps.text: Behold, even the moon hath no brightness, and the stars are not pure in His sight;

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭ף כִּֽי־אֱנֹ֣ושׁ רִמָּ֑ה וּבֶן־אָ֝דָ֗ם תֹּולֵעָֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: How much less man, that is a worm! and the son of man, that is a maggot!

jps.text: How much less man, that is a worm! and the son of man, that is a maggot!

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: מֶה־עָזַ֥רְתָּ לְלֹא־כֹ֑חַ הֹ֝ושַׁ֗עְתָּ זְרֹ֣ועַ לֹא־עֹֽז׃
verses.englishText: How hast thou helped him that is without power! How hast thou saved the arm that hath no strength!

jps.text: How hast thou helped him that is without power! How hast thou saved the arm that hath no strength!

verses.hebrewText: מַה־יָּ֭עַצְתָּ לְלֹ֣א חָכְמָ֑ה וְ֝תוּשִׁיָּ֗ה לָרֹ֥ב הֹודָֽעְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: How hast thou counselled him that hath no wisdom, and plentifully declared sound knowledge!

jps.text: How hast thou counselled him that hath no wisdom, and plentifully declared sound knowledge!

verses.hebrewText: אֶת־מִ֭י הִגַּ֣דְתָּ מִלִּ֑ין וְנִשְׁמַת־מִ֝י יָצְאָ֥ה מִמֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: With whose help hast thou uttered words? And whose spirit came forth from thee?

jps.text: With whose help hast thou uttered words? And whose spirit came forth from thee?

verses.hebrewText: הָרְפָאִ֥ים יְחֹולָ֑לוּ מִתַּ֥חַת מַ֝֗יִם וְשֹׁכְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The shades tremble beneath the waters and the inhabitants thereof.

jps.text: The shades tremble beneath the waters and the inhabitants thereof.

verses.hebrewText: עָרֹ֣ום שְׁאֹ֣ול נֶגְדֹּ֑ו וְאֵ֥ין כְּ֝ס֗וּת לָֽאֲבַדֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: The nether-world is naked before Him, and Destruction hath no covering.

jps.text: The nether-world is naked before Him, and Destruction hath no covering.

verses.hebrewText: נֹטֶ֣ה צָפֹ֣ון עַל־תֹּ֑הוּ תֹּ֥לֶה אֶ֝֗רֶץ עַל־בְּלִי־מָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He stretcheth out the north over the empty space, and hangeth the earth over nothing.

jps.text: He stretcheth out the north over the empty space, and hangeth the earth over nothing.

verses.hebrewText: צֹרֵֽר־מַ֥יִם בְּעָבָ֑יו וְלֹא־נִבְקַ֖ע עָנָ֣ן תַּחְתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: He bindeth up the waters in His thick clouds; and the cloud is not rent under them.

jps.text: He bindeth up the waters in His thick clouds; and the cloud is not rent under them.

verses.hebrewText: מְאַחֵ֥ז פְּנֵי־כִסֵּ֑ה פַּרְשֵׁ֖ז עָלָ֣יו עֲנָנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He closeth in the face of His throne, and spreadeth His cloud upon it.

jps.text: He closeth in the face of His throne, and spreadeth His cloud upon it.

verses.hebrewText: חֹֽק־חָ֭ג עַל־פְּנֵי־מָ֑יִם עַד־תַּכְלִ֖ית אֹ֣ור עִם־חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: He hath described a boundary upon the face of the waters, unto the confines of light and darkness.

jps.text: He hath described a boundary upon the face of the waters, unto the confines of light and darkness.

verses.hebrewText: עַמּוּדֵ֣י שָׁמַ֣יִם יְרֹופָ֑פוּ וְ֝יִתְמְה֗וּ מִגַּעֲרָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The pillars of heaven tremble and are astonished at His rebuke.

jps.text: The pillars of heaven tremble and are astonished at His rebuke.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭כֹחֹו רָגַ֣ע הַיָּ֑ם *וּבִתוּבְנָתֹו (וּ֝בִתְבוּנָתֹ֗ו) מָ֣חַץ רָֽהַב׃
verses.englishText: He stirreth up the sea with His power, and by His understanding He smiteth through Rahab.

jps.text: He stirreth up the sea with His power, and by His understanding He smiteth through Rahab.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭רוּחֹו שָׁמַ֣יִם שִׁפְרָ֑ה חֹֽלֲלָ֥ה יָ֝דֹ֗ו נָחָ֥שׁ בָּרִֽיחַ׃
verses.englishText: By His breath the heavens are serene; His hand hath pierced the slant serpent.

jps.text: By His breath the heavens are serene; His hand hath pierced the slant serpent.

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־אֵ֤לֶּה ׀ קְצֹ֬ות *דַּרְכֹּו (דְּרָכָ֗יו) וּמַה־שֵּׁ֣מֶץ דָּ֭בָר נִשְׁמַע־בֹּ֑ו וְרַ֥עַם *גְּבוּרָתֹו (גְּ֝בוּרֹותָ֗יו) מִ֣י יִתְבֹּונָֽן׃ ס
verses.englishText: Lo, these are but the outskirts of His ways; and how small a whisper is heard of Him! But the thunder of His mighty deeds who can understand?

jps.text: Lo, these are but the outskirts of His ways; and how small a whisper is heard of Him! But the thunder of His mighty deeds who can understand?

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣סֶף אִ֭יֹּוב שְׂאֵ֥ת מְשָׁלֹ֗ו וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: And Job again took up his parable, and said:

jps.text: And Job again took up his parable, and said:

verses.hebrewText: חַי־אֵ֭ל הֵסִ֣יר מִשְׁפָּטִ֑י וְ֝שַׁדַּ֗י הֵמַ֥ר נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: As God liveth, who hath taken away my right; and the Almighty, who hath dealt bitterly with me;

jps.text: As God liveth, who hath taken away my right; and the Almighty, who hath dealt bitterly with me;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־כָל־עֹ֣וד נִשְׁמָתִ֣י בִ֑י וְר֖וּחַ אֱלֹ֣והַּ בְּאַפִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: All the while my breath is in me, and the spirit of God is in my nostrils,

jps.text: All the while my breath is in me, and the spirit of God is in my nostrils,

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תְּדַבֵּ֣רְנָה שְׂפָתַ֣י עַוְלָ֑ה וּ֝לְשֹׁונִ֗י אִם־יֶהְגֶּ֥ה רְמִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Surely my lips shall not speak unrighteousness, neither shall my tongue utter deceit;

jps.text: Surely my lips shall not speak unrighteousness, neither shall my tongue utter deceit;

verses.hebrewText: חָלִ֣ילָה לִּי֮ אִם־אַצְדִּ֪יק אֶ֫תְכֶ֥ם עַד־אֶגְוָ֑ע לֹא־אָסִ֖יר תֻּמָּתִ֣י מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Far be it from me that I should justify you; till I die I will not put away mine integrity from me.

jps.text: Far be it from me that I should justify you; till I die I will not put away mine integrity from me.

verses.hebrewText: בְּצִדְקָתִ֣י הֶ֭חֱזַקְתִּי וְלֹ֣א אַרְפֶּ֑הָ לֹֽא־יֶחֱרַ֥ף לְ֝בָבִ֗י מִיָּמָֽי׃
verses.englishText: My righteousness I hold fast, and will not let it go; my heart shall not reproach me so long as I live.

jps.text: My righteousness I hold fast, and will not let it go; my heart shall not reproach me so long as I live.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִ֣י כְ֭רָשָׁע אֹ֣יְבִ֑י וּמִתְקֹומְמִ֥י כְעַוָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: Let mine enemy be as the wicked, and let him that riseth up against me be as the unrighteous.

jps.text: Let mine enemy be as the wicked, and let him that riseth up against me be as the unrighteous.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י מַה־תִּקְוַ֣ת חָ֭נֵף כִּ֣י יִבְצָ֑ע כִּ֤י יֵ֖שֶׁל אֱלֹ֣והַּ נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: For what is the hope of the godless, though he get him gain, when God taketh away his soul?

jps.text: For what is the hope of the godless, though he get him gain, when God taketh away his soul?

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭צַעֲקָתֹו יִשְׁמַ֥ע ׀ אֵ֑ל כִּֽי־תָבֹ֖וא עָלָ֣יו צָרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Will God hear his cry, when trouble cometh upon him?

jps.text: Will God hear his cry, when trouble cometh upon him?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־עַל־שַׁדַּ֥י יִתְעַנָּ֑ג יִקְרָ֖א אֱלֹ֣והַּ בְּכָל־עֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: Will he have his delight in the Almighty, and call upon God at all times?

jps.text: Will he have his delight in the Almighty, and call upon God at all times?

verses.hebrewText: אֹורֶ֣ה אֶתְכֶ֣ם בְּיַד־אֵ֑ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר עִם־שַׁ֝דַּ֗י לֹ֣א אֲכַחֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: I will teach you concerning the hand of God; that which is with the Almighty will I not conceal.

jps.text: I will teach you concerning the hand of God; that which is with the Almighty will I not conceal.

verses.hebrewText: הֵן־אַתֶּ֣ם כֻּלְּכֶ֣ם חֲזִיתֶ֑ם וְלָמָּה־זֶּ֝֗ה הֶ֣בֶל תֶּהְבָּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, all ye yourselves have seen it; why then are ye become altogether vain?

jps.text: Behold, all ye yourselves have seen it; why then are ye become altogether vain?

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֤ה ׀ חֵֽלֶק־אָדָ֖ם רָשָׁ֥ע ׀ עִם־אֵ֑ל וְֽנַחֲלַ֥ת עָ֝רִיצִ֗ים מִשַּׁדַּ֥י יִקָּֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: This is the portion of a wicked man with God, and the heritage of oppressors, which they receive from the Almighty.

jps.text: This is the portion of a wicked man with God, and the heritage of oppressors, which they receive from the Almighty.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יִרְבּ֣וּ בָנָ֣יו לְמֹו־חָ֑רֶב וְ֝צֶאֱצָאָ֗יו לֹ֣א יִשְׂבְּעוּ־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: If his children be multiplied, it is for the sword; and his offspring shall not have bread enough.

jps.text: If his children be multiplied, it is for the sword; and his offspring shall not have bread enough.

verses.hebrewText: *שְׂרִידֹו (שְׂ֭רִידָיו) בַּמָּ֣וֶת יִקָּבֵ֑רוּ וְ֝אַלְמְנֹתָ֗יו לֹ֣א תִבְכֶּֽינָה׃
verses.englishText: Those that remain of him shall be buried by pestilence, and his widows shall make no lamentation.

jps.text: Those that remain of him shall be buried by pestilence, and his widows shall make no lamentation.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יִצְבֹּ֣ר כֶּעָפָ֣ר כָּ֑סֶף וְ֝כַחֹ֗מֶר יָכִ֥ין מַלְבּֽוּשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Though he heap up silver as the dust, and prepare raiment as the clay;

jps.text: Though he heap up silver as the dust, and prepare raiment as the clay;

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭כִין וְצַדִּ֣יק יִלְבָּ֑שׁ וְ֝כֶ֗סֶף נָקִ֥י יַחֲלֹֽק׃
verses.englishText: He may prepare it, but the just shall put it on, and the innocent shall divide the silver.

jps.text: He may prepare it, but the just shall put it on, and the innocent shall divide the silver.

verses.hebrewText: בָּנָ֣ה כָעָ֣שׁ בֵּיתֹ֑ו וּ֝כְסֻכָּ֗ה עָשָׂ֥ה נֹצֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: He buildeth his house as a moth, and as a booth which the keeper maketh.

jps.text: He buildeth his house as a moth, and as a booth which the keeper maketh.

verses.hebrewText: עָשִׁ֣יר יִ֭שְׁכַּב וְלֹ֣א יֵאָסֵ֑ף עֵינָ֖יו פָּקַ֣ח וְאֵינֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: He lieth down rich, but there shall be not to gather; he openeth his eyes, and his wealth is not.

jps.text: He lieth down rich, but there shall be not to gather; he openeth his eyes, and his wealth is not.

verses.hebrewText: תַּשִּׂיגֵ֣הוּ כַ֭מַּיִם בַּלָּהֹ֑ות לַ֝֗יְלָה גְּנָבַ֥תּוּ סוּפָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Terrors overtake him like waters; a tempest stealeth him away in the night.

jps.text: Terrors overtake him like waters; a tempest stealeth him away in the night.

verses.hebrewText: יִשָּׂאֵ֣הוּ קָדִ֣ים וְיֵלַ֑ךְ וִֽ֝ישָׂעֲרֵ֗הוּ מִמְּקֹמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The east wind carrieth him away, and he departeth; and it sweepeth him out of his place.

jps.text: The east wind carrieth him away, and he departeth; and it sweepeth him out of his place.

verses.hebrewText: וְיַשְׁלֵ֣ךְ עָ֭לָיו וְלֹ֣א יַחְמֹ֑ל מִ֝יָּדֹ֗ו בָּרֹ֥וחַ יִבְרָֽח׃
verses.englishText: Yea, it hurleth at him, and spareth not; he would fain flee from its power.

jps.text: Yea, it hurleth at him, and spareth not; he would fain flee from its power.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂפֹּ֣ק עָלֵ֣ימֹו כַפֵּ֑ימֹו וְיִשְׁרֹ֥ק עָ֝לָ֗יו מִמְּקֹמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Men shall clap their hands at him, and shall hiss him out of his place.

jps.text: Men shall clap their hands at him, and shall hiss him out of his place.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יֵ֣שׁ לַכֶּ֣סֶף מֹוצָ֑א וּ֝מָקֹ֗ום לַזָּהָ֥ב יָזֹֽקּוּ׃
verses.englishText: For there is a mine for silver, and a place for gold which they refine.

jps.text: For there is a mine for silver, and a place for gold which they refine.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭רְזֶל מֵעָפָ֣ר יֻקָּ֑ח וְ֝אֶ֗בֶן יָצ֥וּק נְחוּשָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: Iron is taken out of the dust, and brass is molten out of the stone.

jps.text: Iron is taken out of the dust, and brass is molten out of the stone.

verses.hebrewText: קֵ֤ץ ׀ שָׂ֤ם לַחֹ֗שֶׁךְ וּֽלְכָל־תַּ֭כְלִית ה֣וּא חֹוקֵ֑ר אֶ֖בֶן אֹ֣פֶל וְצַלְמָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Man setteth an end to darkness, and searcheth out to the furthest bound the stones of thick darkness and of the shadow of death.

jps.text: Man setteth an end to darkness, and searcheth out to the furthest bound the stones of thick darkness and of the shadow of death.

verses.hebrewText: פָּ֤רַץ נַ֨חַל ׀ מֵֽעִם־גָּ֗ר הַֽנִּשְׁכָּחִ֥ים מִנִּי־רָ֑גֶל דַּ֖לּוּ מֵאֱנֹ֣ושׁ נָֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: He breaketh open a shaft away from where men sojourn; they are forgotten of the foot that passeth by; they hang afar from men, they swing to and fro.

jps.text: He breaketh open a shaft away from where men sojourn; they are forgotten of the foot that passeth by; they hang afar from men, they swing to and fro.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֗רֶץ מִמֶּ֥נָּה יֵֽצֵא־לָ֑חֶם וְ֝תַחְתֶּ֗יהָ נֶהְפַּ֥ךְ כְּמֹו־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: As for the earth, out of it cometh bread, and underneath it is turned up as it were by fire.

jps.text: As for the earth, out of it cometh bread, and underneath it is turned up as it were by fire.

verses.hebrewText: מְקֹום־סַפִּ֥יר אֲבָנֶ֑יהָ וְעַפְרֹ֖ת זָהָ֣ב לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The stones thereof are the place of sapphires, and it hath dust of gold.

jps.text: The stones thereof are the place of sapphires, and it hath dust of gold.

verses.hebrewText: נָ֭תִיב לֹֽא־יְדָ֣עֹו עָ֑יִט וְלֹ֥א שְׁ֝זָפַ֗תּוּ עֵ֣ין אַיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: That path no bird of prey knoweth, neither hath the falcon's eye seen it;

jps.text: That path no bird of prey knoweth, neither hath the falcon's eye seen it;

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־הִדְרִיכֻ֥הוּ בְנֵי־שָׁ֑חַץ לֹֽא־עָדָ֖ה עָלָ֣יו שָֽׁחַל׃
verses.englishText: The proud beasts have not trodden it, nor hath the lion passed thereby.

jps.text: The proud beasts have not trodden it, nor hath the lion passed thereby.

verses.hebrewText: בַּֽ֭חַלָּמִישׁ שָׁלַ֣ח יָדֹ֑ו הָפַ֖ךְ מִשֹּׁ֣רֶשׁ הָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He putteth forth his hand upon the flinty rock; He overturneth the mountains by the roots.

jps.text: He putteth forth his hand upon the flinty rock; He overturneth the mountains by the roots.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭צּוּרֹות יְאֹרִ֣ים בִּקֵּ֑עַ וְכָל־יְ֝קָ֗ר רָאֲתָ֥ה עֵינֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He cutteth out channels among the rocks; and his eye seeth every precious thing.

jps.text: He cutteth out channels among the rocks; and his eye seeth every precious thing.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭בְּכִי נְהָרֹ֣ות חִבֵּ֑שׁ וְ֝תַעֲלֻמָ֗הּ יֹ֣צִא אֹֽור׃ פ
verses.englishText: He bindeth the streams that they trickle not; and the thing that is hid bringeth he forth to light.

jps.text: He bindeth the streams that they trickle not; and the thing that is hid bringeth he forth to light.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭הַחָכְמָה מֵאַ֣יִן תִּמָּצֵ֑א וְאֵ֥י זֶ֝ה מְקֹ֣ום בִּינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: But wisdom, where shall it be found? And where is the place of understanding?

jps.text: But wisdom, where shall it be found? And where is the place of understanding?

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יָדַ֣ע אֱנֹ֣ושׁ עֶרְכָּ֑הּ וְלֹ֥א תִ֝מָּצֵ֗א בְּאֶ֣רֶץ הֽ͏ַחַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Man knoweth not the price thereof; neither is it found in the land of the living.

jps.text: Man knoweth not the price thereof; neither is it found in the land of the living.

verses.hebrewText: תְּהֹ֣ום אָ֭מַר לֹ֣א בִי־הִ֑יא וְיָ֥ם אָ֝מַ֗ר אֵ֣ין עִמָּדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: The deep saith: 'It is not in me'; and the sea saith: 'It is not with me.'

jps.text: The deep saith: 'It is not in me'; and the sea saith: 'It is not with me.'

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יֻתַּ֣ן סְגֹ֣ור תַּחְתֶּ֑יהָ וְלֹ֥א יִ֝שָּׁקֵ֗ל כֶּ֣סֶף מְחִירָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: It cannot be gotten for gold, neither shall silver be weighed for the price thereof.

jps.text: It cannot be gotten for gold, neither shall silver be weighed for the price thereof.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־תְ֭סֻלֶּה בְּכֶ֣תֶם אֹופִ֑יר בְּשֹׁ֖הַם יָקָ֣ר וְסַפִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: It cannot be valued with the gold of Ophir, with the precious onyx, or the sapphire.

jps.text: It cannot be valued with the gold of Ophir, with the precious onyx, or the sapphire.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יַעַרְכֶ֣נָּה זָ֭הָב וּזְכֹוכִ֑ית וּתְמ֖וּרָתָ֣הּ כְּלִי־פָֽז׃
verses.englishText: Gold and glass cannot equal it; neither shall the exchange thereof be vessels of fine gold.

jps.text: Gold and glass cannot equal it; neither shall the exchange thereof be vessels of fine gold.

verses.hebrewText: רָאמֹ֣ות וְ֭גָבִישׁ לֹ֣א יִזָּכֵ֑ר וּמֶ֥שֶׁךְ חָ֝כְמָ֗ה מִפְּנִינִֽים׃
verses.englishText: No mention shall be made of coral or of crystal; yea, the price of wisdom is above rubies.

jps.text: No mention shall be made of coral or of crystal; yea, the price of wisdom is above rubies.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יַ֭עַרְכֶנָּה פִּטְדַת־כּ֑וּשׁ בְּכֶ֥תֶם טָ֝הֹ֗ור לֹ֣א תְסֻלֶּֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: The topaz of Ethiopia shall not equal it, neither shall it be valued with pure gold.

jps.text: The topaz of Ethiopia shall not equal it, neither shall it be valued with pure gold.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭הַחָכְמָה מֵאַ֣יִן תָּבֹ֑וא וְאֵ֥י זֶ֝֗ה מְקֹ֣ום בִּינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Whence then cometh wisdom? And where is the place of understanding?

jps.text: Whence then cometh wisdom? And where is the place of understanding?

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭נֶעֶלְמָה מֵעֵינֵ֣י כָל־חָ֑י וּמֵעֹ֖וף הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם נִסְתָּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: Seeing it is hid from the eyes of all living, and kept close from the fowls of the air.

jps.text: Seeing it is hid from the eyes of all living, and kept close from the fowls of the air.

verses.hebrewText: אֲבַדֹּ֣ון וָ֭מָוֶת אָ֣מְר֑וּ בְּ֝אָזְנֵ֗ינוּ שָׁמַ֥עְנוּ שִׁמְעָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Destruction and Death say: 'We have heard a rumor thereof with our ears.'

jps.text: Destruction and Death say: 'We have heard a rumor thereof with our ears.'

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹהִים הֵבִ֣ין דַּרְכָּ֑הּ וְ֝ה֗וּא יָדַ֥ע אֶת־מְקֹומָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: God understandeth the way thereof, and He knoweth the place thereof.

jps.text: God understandeth the way thereof, and He knoweth the place thereof.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־ה֖וּא לִקְצֹות־הָאָ֣רֶץ יַבִּ֑יט תַּ֖חַת כָּל־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם יִרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: For He looketh to the ends of the earth, and seeth under the whole heaven;

jps.text: For He looketh to the ends of the earth, and seeth under the whole heaven;

verses.hebrewText: לַעֲשֹׂ֣ות לָר֣וּחַ מִשְׁקָ֑ל וּ֝מַ֗יִם תִּכֵּ֥ן בְּמִדָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: When He maketh a weight for the wind, and meteth out the waters by measure.

jps.text: When He maketh a weight for the wind, and meteth out the waters by measure.

verses.hebrewText: בַּעֲשׂתֹ֣ו לַמָּטָ֣ר חֹ֑ק וְ֝דֶ֗רֶךְ לַחֲזִ֥יז קֹלֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: When He made a decree for the rain, and a way for the storm of thunders;

jps.text: When He made a decree for the rain, and a way for the storm of thunders;

verses.hebrewText: אָ֣ז רָ֭אָהּ וַֽיְסַפְּרָ֑הּ הֱ֝כִינָ֗הּ וְגַם־חֲקָרָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Then did He see it, and declare it; He established it, yea, and searched it out.

jps.text: Then did He see it, and declare it; He established it, yea, and searched it out.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר ׀ לָֽאָדָ֗ם הֵ֤ן יִרְאַ֣ת אֲ֭דֹנָי הִ֣יא חָכְמָ֑ה וְס֖וּר מֵרָ֣ע בִּינָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And unto man He said: 'Behold, the fear of the Lord, that is wisdom; and to depart from evil is understanding.'

jps.text: And unto man He said: 'Behold, the fear of the Lord, that is wisdom; and to depart from evil is understanding.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣סֶף אִ֭יֹּוב שְׂאֵ֥ת מְשָׁלֹ֗ו וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: And Job again took up his parable, and said:

jps.text: And Job again took up his parable, and said:

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יִתְּנֵ֥נִי כְיַרְחֵי־קֶ֑דֶם כִּ֝ימֵ֗י אֱלֹ֣והַּ יִשְׁמְרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Oh that I were as in the months of old, as in the days when God watched over me;

jps.text: Oh that I were as in the months of old, as in the days when God watched over me;

verses.hebrewText: בְּהִלֹּ֣ו נֵ֭רֹו עֲלֵ֣י רֹאשִׁ֑י לְ֝אֹורֹו אֵ֣לֶךְ חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: When His lamp shined above my head, and by His light I walked through darkness;

jps.text: When His lamp shined above my head, and by His light I walked through darkness;

verses.hebrewText: כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר הָ֭יִיתִי בִּימֵ֣י חָרְפִּ֑י בְּסֹ֥וד אֱ֝לֹ֗והַּ עֲלֵ֣י אָהֳלִֽי׃
verses.englishText: As I was in the days of my youth, when the converse of God was upon my tent;

jps.text: As I was in the days of my youth, when the converse of God was upon my tent;

verses.hebrewText: בְּעֹ֣וד שַׁ֭דַּי עִמָּדִ֑י סְבִ֖יבֹותַ֣י נְעָרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: When the Almighty was yet with me, and my children were about me;

jps.text: When the Almighty was yet with me, and my children were about me;

verses.hebrewText: בִּרְחֹ֣ץ הֲלִיכַ֣י בְּחֵמָ֑ה וְצ֥וּר יָצ֥וּק עִ֝מָּדִ֗י פַּלְגֵי־שָֽׁמֶן׃
verses.englishText: When my steps were washed with butter, and the rock poured me out rivers of oil!

jps.text: When my steps were washed with butter, and the rock poured me out rivers of oil!

verses.hebrewText: בְּצֵ֣אתִי שַׁ֣עַר עֲלֵי־קָ֑רֶת בָּ֝רְחֹ֗וב אָכִ֥ין מֹושָׁבִֽי׃
verses.englishText: When I went forth to the gate unto the city, when I prepared my seat in the broad place,

jps.text: When I went forth to the gate unto the city, when I prepared my seat in the broad place,

verses.hebrewText: רָא֣וּנִי נְעָרִ֣ים וְנֶחְבָּ֑אוּ וִֽ֝ישִׁישִׁים קָ֣מוּ עָמָֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: The young men saw me and hid themselves, and the aged rose up and stood;

jps.text: The young men saw me and hid themselves, and the aged rose up and stood;

verses.hebrewText: שָׂ֭רִים עָצְר֣וּ בְמִלִּ֑ים וְ֝כַ֗ף יָשִׂ֥ימוּ לְפִיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The princes refrained talking, and laid their hand on their mouth;

jps.text: The princes refrained talking, and laid their hand on their mouth;

verses.hebrewText: קֹול־נְגִידִ֥ים נֶחְבָּ֑אוּ וּ֝לְשֹׁונָ֗ם לְחִכָּ֥ם דָּבֵֽקָה׃
verses.englishText: The voice of the nobles was hushed, and their tongue cleaved to the roof of their mouth.

jps.text: The voice of the nobles was hushed, and their tongue cleaved to the roof of their mouth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֹ֣זֶן שָׁ֭מְעָה וַֽתְּאַשְּׁרֵ֑נִי וְעַ֥יִן רָ֝אֲתָ֗ה וַתְּעִידֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: For when the ear heard me, then it blessed me, and when the eye saw me, it gave witness unto me;

jps.text: For when the ear heard me, then it blessed me, and when the eye saw me, it gave witness unto me;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אֲ֭מַלֵּט עָנִ֣י מְשַׁוֵּ֑עַ וְ֝יָתֹ֗ום וְֽלֹא־עֹזֵ֥ר לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Because I delivered the poor that cried, the fatherless also, that had none to help him.

jps.text: Because I delivered the poor that cried, the fatherless also, that had none to help him.

verses.hebrewText: בִּרְכַּ֣ת אֹ֭בֵד עָלַ֣י תָּבֹ֑א וְלֵ֖ב אַלְמָנָ֣ה אַרְנִֽן׃
verses.englishText: The blessing of him that was ready to perish came upon me; and I caused the widow's heart to sing for joy.

jps.text: The blessing of him that was ready to perish came upon me; and I caused the widow's heart to sing for joy.

verses.hebrewText: צֶ֣דֶק לָ֭בַשְׁתִּי וַיִּלְבָּשֵׁ֑נִי כִּמְעִ֥יל וְ֝צָנִ֗יף מִשְׁפָּטִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I put on righteousness, and it clothed itself with me; my justice was as a robe and a diadem.

jps.text: I put on righteousness, and it clothed itself with me; my justice was as a robe and a diadem.

verses.hebrewText: עֵינַ֣יִם הָ֭יִיתִי לַֽעִוֵּ֑ר וְרַגְלַ֖יִם לַפִּסֵּ֣חַ אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I was eyes to the blind, and feet was I to the lame.

jps.text: I was eyes to the blind, and feet was I to the lame.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֣ב אָ֭נֹכִֽי לָֽאֶבְיֹונִ֑ים וְרִ֖ב לֹא־יָדַ֣עְתִּי אֶחְקְרֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: I was a father to the needy; and the cause of him that I knew not I searched out.

jps.text: I was a father to the needy; and the cause of him that I knew not I searched out.

verses.hebrewText: וָֽ֭אֲשַׁבְּרָה מְתַלְּעֹ֣ות עַוָּ֑ל וּ֝מִשִּׁנָּ֗יו אַשְׁלִ֥יךְ טָֽרֶף׃
verses.englishText: And I broke the jaws of the unrighteous, and plucked the prey out of his teeth.

jps.text: And I broke the jaws of the unrighteous, and plucked the prey out of his teeth.

verses.hebrewText: וָ֭אֹמַר עִם־קִנִּ֣י אֶגְוָ֑ע וְ֝כַחֹ֗ול אַרְבֶּ֥ה יָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Then I said: 'I shall die with my nest, and I shall multiply my days as the phoenix;

jps.text: Then I said: 'I shall die with my nest, and I shall multiply my days as the phoenix;

verses.hebrewText: שָׁרְשִׁ֣י פָת֣וּחַ אֱלֵי־מָ֑יִם וְ֝טַ֗ל יָלִ֥ין בִּקְצִירֽ͏ִי׃
verses.englishText: My root shall be spread out to the waters, and the dew shall lie all night upon my branch;

jps.text: My root shall be spread out to the waters, and the dew shall lie all night upon my branch;

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭בֹודִי חָדָ֣שׁ עִמָּדִ֑י וְ֝קַשְׁתִּ֗י בְּיָדִ֥י תַחֲלִֽיף׃
verses.englishText: My glory shall be fresh in me, and my bow shall be renewed in my hand.'

jps.text: My glory shall be fresh in me, and my bow shall be renewed in my hand.'

verses.hebrewText: לִֽי־שָׁמְע֥וּ וְיִחֵ֑לּוּ וְ֝יִדְּמ֗וּ לְמֹ֣ו עֲצָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Unto me men gave ear, and waited, and kept silence for my counsel.

jps.text: Unto me men gave ear, and waited, and kept silence for my counsel.

verses.hebrewText: אַחֲרֵ֣י דְ֭בָרִי לֹ֣א יִשְׁנ֑וּ וְ֝עָלֵ֗ימֹו תִּטֹּ֥ף מִלָּתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: After my words they spoke not again; and my speech dropped upon them.

jps.text: After my words they spoke not again; and my speech dropped upon them.

verses.hebrewText: וְיִֽחֲל֣וּ כַמָּטָ֣ר לִ֑י וּ֝פִיהֶ֗ם פָּעֲר֥וּ לְמַלְקֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: And they waited for me as for the rain; and they opened their mouth wide as for the latter rain.

jps.text: And they waited for me as for the rain; and they opened their mouth wide as for the latter rain.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשְׂחַ֣ק אֲ֭לֵהֶם לֹ֣א יַאֲמִ֑ינוּ וְאֹ֥ור פָּ֝נַ֗י לֹ֣א יַפִּילֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: If I laughed on them, they believed it not; and the light of my countenance they cast not down.

jps.text: If I laughed on them, they believed it not; and the light of my countenance they cast not down.

verses.hebrewText: אֶֽבֲחַ֣ר דַּרְכָּם֮ וְאֵשֵׁ֪ב רֹ֥אשׁ וְ֭אֶשְׁכֹּון כְּמֶ֣לֶךְ בַּגְּד֑וּד כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר אֲבֵלִ֣ים יְנַחֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: I chose out their way, and sat as chief, and dwelt as a king in the army, as one that comforteth the mourners.

jps.text: I chose out their way, and sat as chief, and dwelt as a king in the army, as one that comforteth the mourners.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֤ה ׀ שָֽׂחֲק֣וּ עָלַי֮ צְעִירִ֥ים מִמֶּ֗נִּי לְיָ֫מִ֥ים אֲשֶׁר־מָאַ֥סְתִּי אֲבֹותָ֑ם לָ֝שִׁ֗ית עִם־כַּלְבֵ֥י צֹאנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But now they that are younger than I have me in derision, whose fathers I disdained to set with the dogs of my flock.

jps.text: But now they that are younger than I have me in derision, whose fathers I disdained to set with the dogs of my flock.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־כֹּ֣חַ יְ֭דֵיהֶם לָ֣מָּה לִּ֑י עָ֝לֵ֗ימֹו אָ֣בַד כָּֽלַח׃
verses.englishText: Yea, the strength of their hands, whereto should it profit me? men in whom ripe age is perished.

jps.text: Yea, the strength of their hands, whereto should it profit me? men in whom ripe age is perished.

verses.hebrewText: בְּחֶ֥סֶר וּבְכָפָ֗ן גַּ֫לְמ֥וּד הַֽעֹרְקִ֥ים צִיָּ֑ה אֶ֝֗מֶשׁ שֹׁואָ֥ה וּמְשֹׁאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: They are gaunt with want and famine; they gnaw the dry ground, in the gloom of wasteness and desolation.

jps.text: They are gaunt with want and famine; they gnaw the dry ground, in the gloom of wasteness and desolation.

verses.hebrewText: הַקֹּטְפִ֣ים מַלּ֣וּחַ עֲלֵי־שִׂ֑יחַ וְשֹׁ֖רֶשׁ רְתָמִ֣ים לַחְמָֽם׃
verses.englishText: They pluck salt-wort with wormwood; and the roots of the broom are their food.

jps.text: They pluck salt-wort with wormwood; and the roots of the broom are their food.

verses.hebrewText: מִן־גֵּ֥ו יְגֹרָ֑שׁוּ יָרִ֥יעוּ עָ֝לֵ֗ימֹו כַּגַּנָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: They are driven forth from the midst of men; they cry after them as after a thief.

jps.text: They are driven forth from the midst of men; they cry after them as after a thief.

verses.hebrewText: בַּעֲר֣וּץ נְחָלִ֣ים לִשְׁכֹּ֑ן חֹרֵ֖י עָפָ֣ר וְכֵפִֽים׃
verses.englishText: In the clefts of the valleys must they dwell, in holes of the earth and of the rocks.

jps.text: In the clefts of the valleys must they dwell, in holes of the earth and of the rocks.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּין־שִׂיחִ֥ים יִנְהָ֑קוּ תַּ֖חַת חָר֣וּל יְסֻפָּֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: Among the bushes they bray; under the nettles they are gathered together.

jps.text: Among the bushes they bray; under the nettles they are gathered together.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽנֵי־נָ֭בָל גַּם־בְּנֵ֣י בְלִי־שֵׁ֑ם נִ֝כְּא֗וּ מִן־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: They are children of churls, yea, children of ignoble men; they were scourged out of the land.

jps.text: They are children of churls, yea, children of ignoble men; they were scourged out of the land.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭עַתָּה נְגִינָתָ֣ם הָיִ֑יתִי וָאֱהִ֖י לָהֶ֣ם לְמִלָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: And now I am become their song, yea, I am a byword unto them.

jps.text: And now I am become their song, yea, I am a byword unto them.

verses.hebrewText: תִּֽ֭עֲבוּנִי רָ֣חֲקוּ מֶ֑נִּי וּ֝מִפָּנַ֗י לֹא־חָ֥שְׂכוּ רֹֽק׃
verses.englishText: They abhor me, they flee far from me, and spare not to spit in my face.

jps.text: They abhor me, they flee far from me, and spare not to spit in my face.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־*יִתְרֹו (יִתְרִ֣י) פִ֭תַּח וַיְעַנֵּ֑נִי וְ֝רֶ֗סֶן מִפָּנַ֥י שִׁלֵּֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: For He hath loosed my cord, and afflicted me, and they have cast off the bridle before me.

jps.text: For He hath loosed my cord, and afflicted me, and they have cast off the bridle before me.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־יָמִין֮ פִּרְחַ֪ח יָ֫ק֥וּמוּ רַגְלַ֥י שִׁלֵּ֑חוּ וַיָּסֹ֥לּוּ עָ֝לַ֗י אָרְחֹ֥ות אֵידָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Upon my right hand rise the brood; they entangle my feet, and they cast up against me their ways of destruction.

jps.text: Upon my right hand rise the brood; they entangle my feet, and they cast up against me their ways of destruction.

verses.hebrewText: נָתְס֗וּ נְֽתִיבָ֫תִ֥י לְהַוָּתִֽי יֹעִ֑ילוּ לֹ֖א עֹזֵ֣ר לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: They break up my path, they further my calamity, even men that have no helper.

jps.text: They break up my path, they further my calamity, even men that have no helper.

verses.hebrewText: כְּפֶ֣רֶץ רָחָ֣ב יֶאֱתָ֑יוּ תַּ֥חַת שֹׁ֝אָ֗ה הִתְגַּלְגָּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: As through a wide breach they come; in the midst of the ruin they roll themselves upon me.

jps.text: As through a wide breach they come; in the midst of the ruin they roll themselves upon me.

verses.hebrewText: הָהְפַּ֥ךְ עָלַ֗י בַּלָּ֫הֹ֥ות תִּרְדֹּ֣ף כָּ֭רוּחַ נְדִבָתִ֑י וּ֝כְעָ֗ב עָבְרָ֥ה יְשֻׁעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Terrors are turned upon me, they chase mine honour as the wind; and my welfare is passed away as a cloud.

jps.text: Terrors are turned upon me, they chase mine honour as the wind; and my welfare is passed away as a cloud.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֗ה עָ֭לַי תִּשְׁתַּפֵּ֣ךְ נַפְשִׁ֑י יֹ֖אחֲז֣וּנִי יְמֵי־עֹֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: And now my soul is poured out within me; days of affliction have taken hold upon me.

jps.text: And now my soul is poured out within me; days of affliction have taken hold upon me.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֗יְלָה עֲ֭צָמַי נִקַּ֣ר מֵעָלָ֑י וְ֝עֹרְקַ֗י לֹ֣א יִשְׁכָּבֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: In the night my bones are pierced, and fall from me, and my sinews take no rest.

jps.text: In the night my bones are pierced, and fall from me, and my sinews take no rest.

verses.hebrewText: בְּרָב־כֹּ֖חַ יִתְחַפֵּ֣שׂ לְבוּשִׁ֑י כְּפִ֖י כֻתָּנְתִּ֣י יַֽאַזְרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: By the great force of my disease is my garment disfigured; it bindeth me about as the collar of my coat.

jps.text: By the great force of my disease is my garment disfigured; it bindeth me about as the collar of my coat.

verses.hebrewText: הֹרָ֥נִי לַחֹ֑מֶר וָ֝אֶתְמַשֵּׁ֗ל כֶּעָפָ֥ר וָאֵֽפֶר׃
verses.englishText: He hath cast me into the mire, and I am become like dust and ashes.

jps.text: He hath cast me into the mire, and I am become like dust and ashes.

verses.hebrewText: אֲשַׁוַּ֣ע אֵ֭לֶיךָ וְלֹ֣א תַעֲנֵ֑נִי עָ֝מַ֗דְתִּי וַתִּתְבֹּ֥נֶן בִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I cry unto Thee, and Thou dost not answer me; I stand up, and Thou lookest at me.

jps.text: I cry unto Thee, and Thou dost not answer me; I stand up, and Thou lookest at me.

verses.hebrewText: תֵּהָפֵ֣ךְ לְאַכְזָ֣ר לִ֑י בְּעֹ֖צֶם יָדְךָ֣ תִשְׂטְמֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou art turned to be cruel to me; with the might of Thy hand Thou hatest me.

jps.text: Thou art turned to be cruel to me; with the might of Thy hand Thou hatest me.

verses.hebrewText: תִּשָּׂאֵ֣נִי אֶל־ר֖וּחַ תַּרְכִּיבֵ֑נִי וּ֝תְמֹגְגֵ֗נִי *תְּשֻׁוֶּה (תּוּשִׁיָּֽה)׃
verses.englishText: Thou liftest me up to the wind, Thou causest me to ride upon it; and Thou dissolvest my substance.

jps.text: Thou liftest me up to the wind, Thou causest me to ride upon it; and Thou dissolvest my substance.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יָ֭דַעְתִּי מָ֣וֶת תְּשִׁיבֵ֑נִי וּבֵ֖ית מֹועֵ֣ד לְכָל־חָֽי׃
verses.englishText: For I know that Thou wilt bring me to death, and to the house appointed for all living.

jps.text: For I know that Thou wilt bring me to death, and to the house appointed for all living.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֣ךְ לֹא־בְ֭עִי יִשְׁלַח־יָ֑ד אִם־בְּ֝פִידֹ֗ו לָהֶ֥ן שֽׁוּעַ׃
verses.englishText: Surely none shall put forth his hand to a ruinous heap, neither because of these things shall help come in one's calamity,

jps.text: Surely none shall put forth his hand to a ruinous heap, neither because of these things shall help come in one's calamity,

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֣א בָ֭כִיתִי לִקְשֵׁה־יֹ֑ום עָֽגְמָ֥ה נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י לָאֶבְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: If I have not wept for him that was in trouble, and if my soul grieved not for the needy.

jps.text: If I have not wept for him that was in trouble, and if my soul grieved not for the needy.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י טֹ֣וב קִ֭וִּיתִי וַיָּ֣בֹא רָ֑ע וַֽאֲיַחֲלָ֥ה לְ֝אֹ֗ור וַיָּ֥בֹא אֹֽפֶל׃
verses.englishText: Yet, when I looked for good, there came evil; and when I waited for light, there came darkness.

jps.text: Yet, when I looked for good, there came evil; and when I waited for light, there came darkness.

verses.hebrewText: מֵעַ֖י רֻתְּח֥וּ וְלֹא־דָ֗מּוּ קִדְּמֻ֥נִי יְמֵי־עֹֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Mine inwards boil, and rest not; days of affliction are come upon me.

jps.text: Mine inwards boil, and rest not; days of affliction are come upon me.

verses.hebrewText: קֹדֵ֣ר הִ֭לַּכְתִּי בְּלֹ֣א חַמָּ֑ה קַ֖מְתִּי בַקָּהָ֣ל אֲשַׁוֵּֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: I go mourning without the sun; I stand up in the assembly, and cry for help.

jps.text: I go mourning without the sun; I stand up in the assembly, and cry for help.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭ח הָיִ֣יתִי לְתַנִּ֑ים וְ֝רֵ֗עַ לִבְנֹ֥ות יַעֲנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I am become a brother to jackals, and a companion to ostriches.

jps.text: I am become a brother to jackals, and a companion to ostriches.

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֖ורִי שָׁחַ֣ר מֵעָלָ֑י וְעַצְמִי־חָ֝֗רָה מִנִּי־חֹֽרֶב׃
verses.englishText: My skin is black, and falleth from me, and my bones are burned with heat.

jps.text: My skin is black, and falleth from me, and my bones are burned with heat.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֣י לְ֭אֵבֶל כִּנֹּרִ֑י וְ֝עֻגָבִ֗י לְקֹ֣ול בֹּכִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Therefore is my harp turned to mourning, and my pipe into the voice of them that weep.

jps.text: Therefore is my harp turned to mourning, and my pipe into the voice of them that weep.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭רִית כָּרַ֣תִּי לְעֵינָ֑י וּמָ֥ה אֶ֝תְבֹּונֵ֗ן עַל־בְּתוּלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I made a covenant with mine eyes; how then should I look upon a maid?

jps.text: I made a covenant with mine eyes; how then should I look upon a maid?

verses.hebrewText: וּמֶ֤ה ׀ חֵ֣לֶק אֱלֹ֣והַּ מִמָּ֑עַל וְֽנַחֲלַ֥ת שַׁ֝דַּ֗י מִמְּרֹמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For what would be the portion of God from above, and the heritage of the Almighty from on high?

jps.text: For what would be the portion of God from above, and the heritage of the Almighty from on high?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹא־אֵ֥יד לְעַוָּ֑ל וְ֝נֵ֗כֶר לְפֹ֣עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Is it not calamity to the unrighteous, and disaster to the workers of iniquity?

jps.text: Is it not calamity to the unrighteous, and disaster to the workers of iniquity?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹא־ה֖וּא יִרְאֶ֣ה דְרָכָ֑י וְֽכָל־צְעָדַ֥י יִסְפֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: Doth not He see my ways, and count all my steps?

jps.text: Doth not He see my ways, and count all my steps?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־הָלַ֥כְתִּי עִם־שָׁ֑וְא וַתַּ֖חַשׁ עַל־מִרְמָ֣ה רַגְלִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I have walked with vanity, and my foot hath hasted to deceit —

jps.text: If I have walked with vanity, and my foot hath hasted to deceit —

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁקְלֵ֥נִי בְמֹאזְנֵי־צֶ֑דֶק וְיֵדַ֥ע אֱ֝לֹ֗והַּ תֻּמָּתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let me be weighed in a just balance, that God may know mine integrity —

jps.text: Let me be weighed in a just balance, that God may know mine integrity —

verses.hebrewText: אִ֥ם תִּטֶּ֣ה אַשֻּׁרִי֮ מִנִּ֪י הַ֫דָּ֥רֶךְ וְאַחַ֣ר עֵ֭ינַי הָלַ֣ךְ לִבִּ֑י וּ֝בְכַפַּ֗י דָּ֣בַק מֻאֽוּם׃ פ
verses.englishText: If my step hath turned out of the way, and my heart walked after mine eyes, and if any spot hath cleaved to my hands;

jps.text: If my step hath turned out of the way, and my heart walked after mine eyes, and if any spot hath cleaved to my hands;

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭זְרְעָה וְאַחֵ֣ר יֹאכֵ֑ל וְֽצֶאֱצָאַ֥י יְשֹׁרָֽשׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: Then let me sow, and let another eat; yea, let the produce of my field be rooted out.

jps.text: Then let me sow, and let another eat; yea, let the produce of my field be rooted out.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־נִפְתָּ֣ה לִ֭בִּי עַל־אִשָּׁ֑ה וְעַל־פֶּ֖תַח רֵעִ֣י אָרָֽבְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: If my heart have been enticed unto a woman, and I have lain in wait at my neighbour's door;

jps.text: If my heart have been enticed unto a woman, and I have lain in wait at my neighbour's door;

verses.hebrewText: תִּטְחַ֣ן לְאַחֵ֣ר אִשְׁתִּ֑י וְ֝עָלֶ֗יהָ יִכְרְע֥וּן אֲחֵרִֽין׃
verses.englishText: Then let my wife grind unto another, and let others bow down upon her.

jps.text: Then let my wife grind unto another, and let others bow down upon her.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־*הוּא (הִ֥יא) זִמָּ֑ה *וְהִיא (וְ֝ה֗וּא) עָוֹ֥ן פְּלִילִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For that were a heinous crime; yea, it were an iniquity to be punished by the judges.

jps.text: For that were a heinous crime; yea, it were an iniquity to be punished by the judges.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵ֣שׁ הִ֭יא עַד־אֲבַדֹּ֣ון תֹּאכֵ֑ל וּֽבְכָל־תְּב֖וּאָתִ֣י תְשָׁרֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: For it is a fire that consumeth unto destruction, and would root out all mine increase.

jps.text: For it is a fire that consumeth unto destruction, and would root out all mine increase.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶמְאַ֗ס מִשְׁפַּ֣ט עַ֭בְדִּי וַאֲמָתִ֑י בְּ֝רִבָ֗ם עִמָּדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I did despise the cause of my man-servant, or of my maid-servant, when they contended with me —

jps.text: If I did despise the cause of my man-servant, or of my maid-servant, when they contended with me —

verses.hebrewText: וּמָ֣ה אֶֽ֭עֱשֶׂה כִּֽי־יָק֣וּם אֵ֑ל וְכִֽי־יִ֝פְקֹ֗ד מָ֣ה אֲשִׁיבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: What then shall I do when God riseth up? And when He remembereth, what shall I answer Him?

jps.text: What then shall I do when God riseth up? And when He remembereth, what shall I answer Him?

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‍ֽ֝לֹא־בַ֭בֶּטֶן עֹשֵׂ֣נִי עָשָׂ֑הוּ וַ֝יְכֻנֶ֗נּוּ בָּרֶ֥חֶם אֶחָֽד׃
verses.englishText: Did not He that made me in the womb make him? And did not One fashion us in the womb?

jps.text: Did not He that made me in the womb make him? And did not One fashion us in the womb?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶ֭מְנַע מֵחֵ֣פֶץ דַּלִּ֑ים וְעֵינֵ֖י אַלְמָנָ֣ה אֲכַלֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: If I have withheld aught that the poor desired, or have caused the eyes of the widow to fail;

jps.text: If I have withheld aught that the poor desired, or have caused the eyes of the widow to fail;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֹכַ֣ל פִּתִּ֣י לְבַדִּ֑י וְלֹא־אָכַ֖ל יָתֹ֣ום מִמֶּֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Or have eaten my morsel myself alone, and the fatherless hath not eaten thereof —

jps.text: Or have eaten my morsel myself alone, and the fatherless hath not eaten thereof —

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י מִ֭נְּעוּרַי גְּדֵלַ֣נִי כְאָ֑ב וּמִבֶּ֖טֶן אִמִּ֣י אַנְחֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Nay, from my youth he grew up with me as with a father, and I have been her guide from my mother's womb.

jps.text: Nay, from my youth he grew up with me as with a father, and I have been her guide from my mother's womb.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶרְאֶ֣ה אֹ֖ובֵד מִבְּלִ֣י לְב֑וּשׁ וְאֵ֥ין כְּ֝ס֗וּת לָאֶבְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: If I have seen any wanderer in want of clothing, or that the needy had no covering;

jps.text: If I have seen any wanderer in want of clothing, or that the needy had no covering;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֣א בֵרֲכ֣וּנִי *חֲלָצֹו (חֲלָצָ֑יו) וּמִגֵּ֥ז כְּ֝בָשַׂי יִתְחַמָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: If his loins have not blessed me, and if he were not warmed with the fleece of my sheep;

jps.text: If his loins have not blessed me, and if he were not warmed with the fleece of my sheep;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־הֲנִיפֹ֣ותִי עַל־יָתֹ֣ום יָדִ֑י כִּֽי־אֶרְאֶ֥ה בַ֝שַּׁ֗עַר עֶזְרָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I have lifted up my hand against the fatherless, because I saw my help in the gate;

jps.text: If I have lifted up my hand against the fatherless, because I saw my help in the gate;

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭תֵפִי מִשִּׁכְמָ֣ה תִפֹּ֑ול וְ֝אֶזְרֹעִ֗י מִקָּנָ֥ה תִשָּׁבֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then let my shoulder fall from the shoulder-blade, and mine arm be broken from the bone.

jps.text: Then let my shoulder fall from the shoulder-blade, and mine arm be broken from the bone.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י פַ֣חַד אֵ֭לַי אֵ֣יד אֵ֑ל וּ֝מִשְּׂאֵתֹ֗ו לֹ֣א אוּכָֽל׃
verses.englishText: For calamity from God was a terror to me, and by reason of His majesty I could do nothing.

jps.text: For calamity from God was a terror to me, and by reason of His majesty I could do nothing.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־שַׂ֣מְתִּי זָהָ֣ב כִּסְלִ֑י וְ֝לַכֶּ֗תֶם אָמַ֥רְתִּי מִבְטַחִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I have made gold my hope, and have said to the fine gold: 'Thou art my confidence';

jps.text: If I have made gold my hope, and have said to the fine gold: 'Thou art my confidence';

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶ֭שְׂמַח כִּי־רַ֣ב חֵילִ֑י וְכִֽי־כַ֝בִּ֗יר מָצְאָ֥ה יָדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I rejoiced because my wealth was great, and because my hand had gotten much;

jps.text: If I rejoiced because my wealth was great, and because my hand had gotten much;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶרְאֶ֣ה אֹ֖ור כִּ֣י יָהֵ֑ל וְ֝יָרֵ֗חַ יָקָ֥ר הֹלֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: If I beheld the sun when it shined, or the moon walking in brightness;

jps.text: If I beheld the sun when it shined, or the moon walking in brightness;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּ֣פְתְּ בַּסֵּ֣תֶר לִבִּ֑י וַתִּשַּׁ֖ק יָדִ֣י לְפִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And my heart hath been secretly enticed, and my mouth hath kissed my hand;

jps.text: And my heart hath been secretly enticed, and my mouth hath kissed my hand;

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־ה֖וּא עָוֹ֣ן פְּלִילִ֑י כִּֽי־כִחַ֖שְׁתִּי לָאֵ֣ל מִמָּֽעַל׃
verses.englishText: This also were an iniquity to be punished by the judges; for I should have lied to God that is above.

jps.text: This also were an iniquity to be punished by the judges; for I should have lied to God that is above.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶ֭שְׂמַח בְּפִ֣יד מְשַׂנְאִ֑י וְ֝הִתְעֹרַ֗רְתִּי כִּֽי־מְצָ֥אֹו רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: If I rejoiced at the destruction of him that hated me, or exulted when evil found him —

jps.text: If I rejoiced at the destruction of him that hated me, or exulted when evil found him —

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹא־נָתַ֣תִּי לַחֲטֹ֣א חִכִּ֑י לִשְׁאֹ֖ל בְּאָלָ֣ה נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Yea, I suffered not my mouth to sin by asking his life with a curse.

jps.text: Yea, I suffered not my mouth to sin by asking his life with a curse.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֣א אָ֭מְרוּ מְתֵ֣י אָהֳלִ֑י מִֽי־יִתֵּ֥ן מִ֝בְּשָׂרֹ֗ו לֹ֣א נִשְׂבָּֽע׃
verses.englishText: If the men of my tent said not: 'Who can find one that hath not been satisfied with his meat?'

jps.text: If the men of my tent said not: 'Who can find one that hath not been satisfied with his meat?'

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭חוּץ לֹא־יָלִ֣ין גֵּ֑ר דְּ֝לָתַ֗י לָאֹ֥רַח אֶפְתָּֽח׃
verses.englishText: The stranger did not lodge in the street; my doors I opened to the roadside.

jps.text: The stranger did not lodge in the street; my doors I opened to the roadside.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־כִּסִּ֣יתִי כְאָדָ֣ם פְּשָׁעָ֑י לִטְמֹ֖ון בְּחֻבִּ֣י עֲוֹֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: If after the manner of men I covered my transgressions, by hiding mine iniquity in my bosom —

jps.text: If after the manner of men I covered my transgressions, by hiding mine iniquity in my bosom —

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֶֽעֱרֹ֨וץ ׀ הָ֘מֹ֤ון רַבָּ֗ה וּבוּז־מִשְׁפָּחֹ֥ות יְחִתֵּ֑נִי וָ֝אֶדֹּ֗ם לֹא־אֵ֥צֵא פָֽתַח׃
verses.englishText: Because I feared the great multitude, and the most contemptible among families terrified me, so that I kept silence, and went not out of the door.

jps.text: Because I feared the great multitude, and the most contemptible among families terrified me, so that I kept silence, and went not out of the door.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י יִתֶּן־לִ֨י ׀ שֹׁ֘מֵ֤עַֽ לִ֗י הֶן־תָּ֭וִי שַׁדַּ֣י יַעֲנֵ֑נִי וְסֵ֥פֶר כָּ֝תַ֗ב אִ֣ישׁ רִיבִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Oh that I had one to hear me! — Lo, here is my signature, let the Almighty answer me — and that I had the indictment which mine adversary hath written!

jps.text: Oh that I had one to hear me! — Lo, here is my signature, let the Almighty answer me — and that I had the indictment which mine adversary hath written!

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֣א עַל־שִׁ֭כְמִי אֶשָּׂאֶ֑נּוּ אֶֽעֶנְדֶ֖נּוּ עֲטָרֹ֣ות לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Surely I would carry it upon my shoulder; I would bind it unto me as a crown.

jps.text: Surely I would carry it upon my shoulder; I would bind it unto me as a crown.

verses.hebrewText: מִסְפַּ֣ר צְ֭עָדַי אַגִּידֶ֑נּוּ כְּמֹו־נָ֝גִ֗יד אֲקָרֲבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: I would declare unto him the number of my steps; as a prince would I go near unto him.

jps.text: I would declare unto him the number of my steps; as a prince would I go near unto him.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־עָ֭לַי אַדְמָתִ֣י תִזְעָ֑ק וְ֝יַ֗חַד תְּלָמֶ֥יהָ יִבְכָּיֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: If my land cry out against me, and the furrows thereof weep together;

jps.text: If my land cry out against me, and the furrows thereof weep together;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־כֹּ֖חָהּ אָכַ֣לְתִּי בְלִי־כָ֑סֶף וְנֶ֖פֶשׁ בְּעָלֶ֣יהָ הִפָּֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: If I have eaten the fruits thereof without money, or have caused the tillers thereof to be disappointed —

jps.text: If I have eaten the fruits thereof without money, or have caused the tillers thereof to be disappointed —

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֤חַת חִטָּ֨ה ׀ יֵ֥צֵא חֹ֗וחַ וְתַֽחַת־שְׂעֹרָ֥ה בָאְשָׁ֑ה תַּ֝֗מּוּ דִּבְרֵ֥י אִיֹּֽוב׃ פ
verses.englishText: Let thistles grow instead of wheat, and noisome weeds instead of barley. The words of Job are ended.

jps.text: Let thistles grow instead of wheat, and noisome weeds instead of barley. The words of Job are ended.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיִּשְׁבְּת֡וּ שְׁלֹ֤שֶׁת הָאֲנָשִׁ֣ים הָ֭אֵלֶּה מֵעֲנֹ֣ות אֶת־אִיֹּ֑וב כִּ֤י ה֖וּא צַדִּ֣יק בְּעֵינָֽיו׃ פ
verses.englishText: So these three men ceased to answer Job, because he was righteous in his own eyes.

jps.text: So these three men ceased to answer Job, because he was righteous in his own eyes.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּ֤חַר אַ֨ף ׀ אֱלִיה֣וּא בֶן־בַּרַכְאֵ֣ל הַבּוּזִי֮ מִמִּשְׁפַּ֪חַ֫ת רָ֥ם בְּ֭אִיֹּוב חָרָ֣ה אַפֹּ֑ו עַֽל־צַדְּקֹ֥ו נַ֝פְשֹׁ֗ו מֵאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Then was kindled the wrath of Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite, of the family of Ram; against Job was his wrath kindled, because he justified himself rather than God.

jps.text: Then was kindled the wrath of Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite, of the family of Ram; against Job was his wrath kindled, because he justified himself rather than God.

verses.hebrewText: וּבִשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת רֵעָיו֮ חָרָ֪ה אַ֫פֹּ֥ו עַ֤ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־מָצְא֣וּ מַעֲנֶ֑ה וַ֝יַּרְשִׁ֗יעוּ אֶת־אִיֹּֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Also against his three friends was his wrath kindled, because they had found no answer, and yet had condemned Job.

jps.text: Also against his three friends was his wrath kindled, because they had found no answer, and yet had condemned Job.

verses.hebrewText: וֶֽאֱלִיה֗וּ חִכָּ֣ה אֶת־אִ֭יֹּוב בִּדְבָרִ֑ים כִּ֤י זְֽקֵנִים־הֵ֖מָּה מִמֶּ֣נּוּ לְיָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Now Elihu had waited to speak unto Job, because they were older than he.

jps.text: Now Elihu had waited to speak unto Job, because they were older than he.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֤רְא אֱלִיה֗וּא כִּ֘י אֵ֤ין מַעֲנֶ֗ה בְּ֭פִי שְׁלֹ֥שֶׁת הָאֲנָשִׁ֗ים וַיִּ֥חַר אַפֹּֽו׃ פ
verses.englishText: And when Elihu saw that there was no answer in the mouth of these three men, his wrath was kindled.

jps.text: And when Elihu saw that there was no answer in the mouth of these three men, his wrath was kindled.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֤עַן ׀ אֱלִיה֖וּא בֶן־בַּֽרַכְאֵ֥ל הַבּוּזִ֗י וַיֹּ֫אמַ֥ר צָ֘עִ֤יר אֲנִ֣י לְ֭יָמִים וְאַתֶּ֣ם יְשִׁישִׁ֑ים עַל־כֵּ֖ן זָחַ֥לְתִּי וָֽאִירָ֓א ׀ מֵחַוֹּ֖ת דֵּעִ֣י אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: And Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite answered and said: I am young, and ye are very old; wherefore I held back, and durst not declare you mine opinion.

jps.text: And Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite answered and said: I am young, and ye are very old; wherefore I held back, and durst not declare you mine opinion.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭מַרְתִּי יָמִ֣ים יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ וְרֹ֥ב שָׁ֝נִ֗ים יֹדִ֥יעוּ חָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I said: 'Days should speak, and multitude of years should teach wisdom.'

jps.text: I said: 'Days should speak, and multitude of years should teach wisdom.'

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭כֵן רֽוּחַ־הִ֣יא בֶאֱנֹ֑ושׁ וְנִשְׁמַ֖ת שַׁדַּ֣י תְּבִינֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: But it is a spirit in man, and the breath of the Almighty, that giveth them understanding.

jps.text: But it is a spirit in man, and the breath of the Almighty, that giveth them understanding.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־רַבִּ֥ים יֶחְכָּ֑מוּ וּ֝זְקֵנִ֗ים יָבִ֥ינוּ מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: It is not the great that are wise, nor the aged that discern judgment.

jps.text: It is not the great that are wise, nor the aged that discern judgment.

verses.hebrewText: לָכֵ֣ן אָ֭מַרְתִּי שִׁמְעָה־לִּ֑י אֲחַוֶּ֖ה דֵּעִ֣י אַף־אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Therefore I say: 'Hearken to me; I also will declare mine opinion.'

jps.text: Therefore I say: 'Hearken to me; I also will declare mine opinion.'

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן הֹוחַ֨לְתִּי לְֽדִבְרֵיכֶ֗ם אָ֭זִין עַד־תְּב֥וּנֹֽתֵיכֶ֑ם עַֽד־תַּחְקְר֥וּן מִלִּֽין׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I waited for your words, I listened for your reasons, whilst ye searched out what to say.

jps.text: Behold, I waited for your words, I listened for your reasons, whilst ye searched out what to say.

verses.hebrewText: וְעָֽדֵיכֶ֗ם אֶתְבֹּ֫ונָ֥ן וְהִנֵּ֤ה אֵ֣ין לְאִיֹּ֣וב מֹוכִ֑יחַ עֹונֶ֖ה אֲמָרָ֣יו מִכֶּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Yea, I attended unto you, and, behold, there was none that convinced Job, or that answered his words, among you.

jps.text: Yea, I attended unto you, and, behold, there was none that convinced Job, or that answered his words, among you.

verses.hebrewText: פֶּן־תֹּ֣֭אמְרוּ מָצָ֣אנוּ חָכְמָ֑ה אֵ֖ל יִדְּפֶ֣נּוּ לֹא־אִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: Beware lest ye say: 'We have found wisdom; God may vanquish him, not man!'

jps.text: Beware lest ye say: 'We have found wisdom; God may vanquish him, not man!'

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹא־עָרַ֣ךְ אֵלַ֣י מִלִּ֑ין וּ֝בְאִמְרֵיכֶ֗ם לֹ֣א אֲשִׁיבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: For he hath not directed his words against me; neither will I answer him with your speeches.

jps.text: For he hath not directed his words against me; neither will I answer him with your speeches.

verses.hebrewText: חַ֭תּוּ לֹא־עָ֣נוּ עֹ֑וד הֶעְתִּ֖יקוּ מֵהֶ֣ם מִלִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: They are amazed, they answer no more; words are departed from them.

jps.text: They are amazed, they answer no more; words are departed from them.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭הֹוחַלְתִּי כִּי־לֹ֣א יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ כִּ֥י עָ֝מְד֗וּ לֹא־עָ֥נוּ עֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: And shall I wait, because they speak not, because they stand still, and answer no more?

jps.text: And shall I wait, because they speak not, because they stand still, and answer no more?

verses.hebrewText: אַעֲנֶ֣ה אַף־אֲנִ֣י חֶלְקִ֑י אֲחַוֶּ֖ה דֵעִ֣י אַף־אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I also will answer my part, I also will declare mine opinion.

jps.text: I also will answer my part, I also will declare mine opinion.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י מָלֵ֣תִי מִלִּ֑ים הֱ֝צִיקַ֗תְנִי ר֣וּחַ בִּטְנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: For I am full of words; the spirit within me constraineth me.

jps.text: For I am full of words; the spirit within me constraineth me.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּֽה־בִטְנִ֗י כְּיַ֥יִן לֹא־יִפָּתֵ֑חַ כְּאֹבֹ֥ות חֲ֝דָשִׁ֗ים יִבָּקֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, mine inwards are as wine which hath no vent; like new wine-skins which are ready to burst.

jps.text: Behold, mine inwards are as wine which hath no vent; like new wine-skins which are ready to burst.

verses.hebrewText: אֲדַבְּרָ֥ה וְיִֽרְוַֽח־לִ֑י אֶפְתַּ֖ח שְׂפָתַ֣י וְאֶֽעֱנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: I will speak, that I may find relief; I will open my lips and answer.

jps.text: I will speak, that I may find relief; I will open my lips and answer.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־נָ֭א אֶשָּׂ֣א פְנֵי־אִ֑ישׁ וְאֶל־אָ֝דָ֗ם לֹ֣א אֲכַנֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let me not, I pray you, respect any man's person; neither will I give flattering titles unto any man.

jps.text: Let me not, I pray you, respect any man's person; neither will I give flattering titles unto any man.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א יָדַ֣עְתִּי אֲכַנֶּ֑ה כִּ֝מְעַ֗ט יִשָּׂאֵ֥נִי עֹשֵֽׂנִי׃
verses.englishText: For I know not to give flattering titles; else would my Maker soon take me away.

jps.text: For I know not to give flattering titles; else would my Maker soon take me away.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאוּלָ֗ם שְׁמַֽע־נָ֣א אִיֹּ֣וב מִלָּ֑י וְֽכָל־דְּבָרַ֥י הַאֲזִֽינָה׃
verses.englishText: Howbeit, Job, I pray thee, hear my speech, and hearken to all my words.

jps.text: Howbeit, Job, I pray thee, hear my speech, and hearken to all my words.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּה־נָ֭א פָּתַ֣חְתִּי פִ֑י דִּבְּרָ֖ה לְשֹׁונִ֣י בְחִכִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Behold now, I have opened my mouth, my tongue hath spoken in my mouth.

jps.text: Behold now, I have opened my mouth, my tongue hath spoken in my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: יֹֽשֶׁר־לִבִּ֥י אֲמָרָ֑י וְדַ֥עַת שְׂ֝פָתַ֗י בָּר֥וּר מִלֵּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: My words shall utter the uprightness of my heart; and that which my lips know they shall speak sincerely.

jps.text: My words shall utter the uprightness of my heart; and that which my lips know they shall speak sincerely.

verses.hebrewText: רֽוּחַ־אֵ֥ל עָשָׂ֑תְנִי וְנִשְׁמַ֖ת שַׁדַּ֣י תְּחַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: The spirit of God hath made me, and the breath of the Almighty given me life.

jps.text: The spirit of God hath made me, and the breath of the Almighty given me life.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תּוּכַ֥ל הֲשִׁיבֵ֑נִי עֶרְכָ֥ה לְ֝פָנַ֗י הִתְיַצָּֽבָה׃
verses.englishText: If thou canst, answer thou me, set thy words in order before me, stand forth.

jps.text: If thou canst, answer thou me, set thy words in order before me, stand forth.

verses.hebrewText: הֵן־אֲנִ֣י כְפִ֣יךָ לָאֵ֑ל מֵ֝חֹ֗מֶר קֹרַ֥צְתִּי גַם־אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I am toward God even as thou art; I also am formed out of the clay.

jps.text: Behold, I am toward God even as thou art; I also am formed out of the clay.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֣ה אֵ֭מָתִי לֹ֣א תְבַעֲתֶ֑ךָּ וְ֝אַכְפִּ֗י עָלֶ֥יךָ לֹא־יִכְבָּֽד׃
verses.englishText: Behold, my terror shall not make thee afraid, neither shall my pressure be heavy upon thee.

jps.text: Behold, my terror shall not make thee afraid, neither shall my pressure be heavy upon thee.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭ךְ אָמַ֣רְתָּ בְאָזְנָ֑י וְקֹ֖ול מִלִּ֣ין אֶשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Surely thou hast spoken in my hearing, and I have heard the voice of thy words;

jps.text: Surely thou hast spoken in my hearing, and I have heard the voice of thy words;

verses.hebrewText: זַ֥ךְ אֲנִ֗י בְּֽלִ֫י פָ֥שַׁע חַ֥ף אָנֹכִ֑י וְלֹ֖א עָוֹ֣ן לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: 'I am clean, without transgression, I am innocent, neither is there iniquity in me;

jps.text: 'I am clean, without transgression, I am innocent, neither is there iniquity in me;

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן תְּ֭נוּאֹות עָלַ֣י יִמְצָ֑א יַחְשְׁבֵ֖נִי לְאֹויֵ֣ב לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He findeth occasions against me, He counteth me for His enemy;

jps.text: Behold, He findeth occasions against me, He counteth me for His enemy;

verses.hebrewText: יָשֵׂ֣ם בַּסַּ֣ד רַגְלָ֑י יִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ר כָּל־אָרְחֹתָֽי׃
verses.englishText: He putteth my feet in the stocks, He marketh all my paths.'

jps.text: He putteth my feet in the stocks, He marketh all my paths.'

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־זֹ֣את לֹא־צָדַ֣קְתָּ אֶעֱנֶ֑ךָּ כִּֽי־יִרְבֶּ֥ה אֱ֝לֹ֗והַ מֵאֱנֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I answer thee: In this thou art not right, that God is too great for man;

jps.text: Behold, I answer thee: In this thou art not right, that God is too great for man;
