verses.hebrewText: מַ֭דּוּעַ אֵלָ֣יו רִיבֹ֑ותָ כִּ֥י כָל־דְּ֝בָרָ֗יו לֹ֣א־יַעֲנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Why hast thou striven against Him? seeing that He will not answer any of his words.

jps.text: Why hast thou striven against Him? seeing that He will not answer any of his words.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־בְאַחַ֥ת יְדַבֶּר־אֵ֑ל וּ֝בִשְׁתַּ֗יִם לֹ֣א יְשׁוּרֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: For God speaketh in one way, yea in two, though man perceiveth it not.

jps.text: For God speaketh in one way, yea in two, though man perceiveth it not.

verses.hebrewText: בַּחֲלֹ֤ום ׀ חֶזְיֹ֬ון לַ֗יְלָה בִּנְפֹ֣ל תַּ֭רְדֵּמָה עַל־אֲנָשִׁ֑ים בִּ֝תְנוּמֹ֗ות עֲלֵ֣י מִשְׁכָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: In a dream, in a vision of the night, when deep sleep falleth upon men, in slumberings upon the bed;

jps.text: In a dream, in a vision of the night, when deep sleep falleth upon men, in slumberings upon the bed;

verses.hebrewText: אָ֣ז יִ֭גְלֶה אֹ֣זֶן אֲנָשִׁ֑ים וּבְמֹ֖סָרָ֣ם יַחְתֹּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Then He openeth the ears of men, and by their chastisement sealeth the decree,

jps.text: Then He openeth the ears of men, and by their chastisement sealeth the decree,

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭הָסִיר אָדָ֣ם מַעֲשֶׂ֑ה וְגֵוָ֖ה מִגֶּ֣בֶר יְכַסֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: That men may put away their purpose, and that He may hide pride from man;

jps.text: That men may put away their purpose, and that He may hide pride from man;

verses.hebrewText: יַחְשֹׂ֣ךְ נַ֭פְשֹׁו מִנִּי־שָׁ֑חַת וְ֝חַיָּתֹ֗ו מֵעֲבֹ֥ר בַּשָּֽׁלַח׃
verses.englishText: That He may keep back his soul from the pit, and his life from perishing by the sword.

jps.text: That He may keep back his soul from the pit, and his life from perishing by the sword.

verses.hebrewText: וְהוּכַ֣ח בְּ֭מַכְאֹוב עַל־מִשְׁכָּבֹ֑ו *וְרִיב (וְרֹ֖וב) עֲצָמָ֣יו אֵתָֽן׃
verses.englishText: He is chastened also with pain upon his bed, and all his bones grow stiff;

jps.text: He is chastened also with pain upon his bed, and all his bones grow stiff;

verses.hebrewText: וְזִֽהֲמַ֣תּוּ חַיָּתֹ֣ו לָ֑חֶם וְ֝נַפְשֹׁ֗ו מַאֲכַ֥ל תַּאֲוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: So that his life maketh him to abhor bread, and his soul dainty food.

jps.text: So that his life maketh him to abhor bread, and his soul dainty food.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֣כֶל בְּשָׂרֹ֣ו מֵרֹ֑אִי *וּשְׁפִי (וְשֻׁפּ֥וּ) עַ֝צְמֹותָ֗יו לֹ֣א רֻאּֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: His flesh is consumed away, that it cannot be seen; and his bones corrode to unsightliness.

jps.text: His flesh is consumed away, that it cannot be seen; and his bones corrode to unsightliness.

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּקְרַ֣ב לַשַּׁ֣חַת נַפְשֹׁ֑ו וְ֝חַיָּתֹ֗ו לַֽמְמִתִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Yea, his soul draweth near unto the pit, and his life to the destroyers.

jps.text: Yea, his soul draweth near unto the pit, and his life to the destroyers.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יֵ֤שׁ עָלָ֨יו ׀ מַלְאָ֗ךְ מֵלִ֗יץ אֶחָ֥ד מִנִּי־אָ֑לֶף לְהַגִּ֖יד לְאָדָ֣ם יָשְׁרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: If there be for him an angel, an intercessor, one among a thousand, to vouch for a man's uprightness;

jps.text: If there be for him an angel, an intercessor, one among a thousand, to vouch for a man's uprightness;

verses.hebrewText: וַיְחֻנֶּ֗נּוּ וַיֹּ֗אמֶר פְּ֭דָעֵהוּ מֵרֶ֥דֶת שָׁ֗חַת מָצָ֥אתִי כֹֽפֶר׃
verses.englishText: Then He is gracious unto him, and saith: 'Deliver him from going down to the pit, I have found a ransom.'

jps.text: Then He is gracious unto him, and saith: 'Deliver him from going down to the pit, I have found a ransom.'

verses.hebrewText: רֻֽטֲפַ֣שׁ בְּשָׂרֹ֣ו מִנֹּ֑עַר יָ֝שׁ֗וּב לִימֵ֥י עֲלוּמָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: His flesh is tenderer than a child's; he returneth to the days of his youth;

jps.text: His flesh is tenderer than a child's; he returneth to the days of his youth;

verses.hebrewText: יֶעְתַּ֤ר אֶל־אֱלֹ֨והַּ ׀ וַיִּרְצֵ֗הוּ וַיַּ֣רְא פָּ֭נָיו בִּתְרוּעָ֑ה וַיָּ֥שֶׁב לֶ֝אֱנֹ֗ושׁ צִדְקָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He prayeth unto God, and He is favourable unto him; so that he seeth His face with joy; and He restoreth unto man his righteousness.

jps.text: He prayeth unto God, and He is favourable unto him; so that he seeth His face with joy; and He restoreth unto man his righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: יָשֹׁ֤ר ׀ עַל־אֲנָשִׁ֗ים וַיֹּ֗אמֶר חָ֭טָאתִי וְיָשָׁ֥ר הֶעֱוֵ֗יתִי וְלֹא־שָׁ֥וָה לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: He cometh before men, and saith: 'I have sinned, and perverted that which was right, and it profited me not.'

jps.text: He cometh before men, and saith: 'I have sinned, and perverted that which was right, and it profited me not.'

verses.hebrewText: פָּדָ֣ה *נַפְשִׁי (נַ֭פְשֹׁו) מֵעֲבֹ֣ר בַּשָּׁ֑חַת *וְחַיָּתִי (וְ֝חַיָּתֹו) בָּאֹ֥ור תִּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: So He redeemeth his soul from going into the pit, and his life beholdeth the light.

jps.text: So He redeemeth his soul from going into the pit, and his life beholdeth the light.

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־כָּל־אֵ֭לֶּה יִפְעַל־אֵ֑ל פַּעֲמַ֖יִם שָׁלֹ֣ושׁ עִם־גָּֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: Lo, all these things doth God work, twice, yea thrice, with a man,

jps.text: Lo, all these things doth God work, twice, yea thrice, with a man,

verses.hebrewText: לְהָשִׁ֣יב נַ֭פְשֹׁו מִנִּי־שָׁ֑חַת לֵ֝אֹ֗ור בְּאֹ֣ור הַֽחַיִּים׃
verses.englishText: To bring back his soul from the pit, that he may be enlightened with the light of the living.

jps.text: To bring back his soul from the pit, that he may be enlightened with the light of the living.

verses.hebrewText: הַקְשֵׁ֖ב אִיֹּ֥וב שְֽׁמַֽע־לִ֑י הַ֝חֲרֵ֗שׁ וְאָנֹכִ֥י אֲדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Mark well, O Job, hearken unto me; hold thy peace, and I will speak.

jps.text: Mark well, O Job, hearken unto me; hold thy peace, and I will speak.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יֵשׁ־מִלִּ֥ין הֲשִׁיבֵ֑נִי דַּ֝בֵּ֗ר כִּֽי־חָפַ֥צְתִּי צַדְּקֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: If thou hast any thing to say, answer me; speak, for I desire to justify thee.

jps.text: If thou hast any thing to say, answer me; speak, for I desire to justify thee.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אַ֭יִן אַתָּ֥ה שְֽׁמַֽע־לִ֑י הַ֝חֲרֵ֗שׁ וַאֲאַלֶּפְךָ֥ חָכְמָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: If not, hearken thou unto me; hold thy peace, and I will teach thee wisdom.

jps.text: If not, hearken thou unto me; hold thy peace, and I will teach thee wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אֱלִיה֗וּא וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Moreover Elihu answered and said:

jps.text: Moreover Elihu answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְע֣וּ חֲכָמִ֣ים מִלָּ֑י וְ֝יֹדְעִ֗ים הַאֲזִ֥ינוּ לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Hear my words, ye wise men; and give ear unto me, ye that have knowledge.

jps.text: Hear my words, ye wise men; and give ear unto me, ye that have knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־אֹ֭זֶן מִלִּ֣ין תִּבְחָ֑ן וְ֝חֵ֗ךְ יִטְעַ֥ם לֶאֱכֹֽל׃
verses.englishText: For the ear trieth words, as the palate tasteth food.

jps.text: For the ear trieth words, as the palate tasteth food.

verses.hebrewText: מִשְׁפָּ֥ט נִבְחֲרָה־לָּ֑נוּ נֵדְעָ֖ה בֵינֵ֣ינוּ מַה־טֹּֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Let us choose for us that which is right; let us know among ourselves what is good.

jps.text: Let us choose for us that which is right; let us know among ourselves what is good.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָ֭מַר אִיֹּ֣וב צָדַ֑קְתִּי וְ֝אֵ֗ל הֵסִ֥יר מִשְׁפָּטִֽי׃
verses.englishText: For Job hath said: 'I am righteous, and God hath taken away my right;

jps.text: For Job hath said: 'I am righteous, and God hath taken away my right;

verses.hebrewText: עַל־מִשְׁפָּטִ֥י אֲכַזֵּ֑ב אָנ֖וּשׁ חִצִּ֣י בְלִי־פָֽשַׁע׃
verses.englishText: Notwithstanding my right I am accounted a liar; my wound is incurable, though I am without transgression.'

jps.text: Notwithstanding my right I am accounted a liar; my wound is incurable, though I am without transgression.'

verses.hebrewText: מִי־גֶ֥בֶר כְּאִיֹּ֑וב יִֽשְׁתֶּה־לַּ֥עַג כַּמָּֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: What man is like Job, who drinketh up scorning like water?

jps.text: What man is like Job, who drinketh up scorning like water?

verses.hebrewText: וְאָרַ֣ח לְ֭חֶבְרָה עִם־פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָ֑וֶן וְ֝לָלֶ֗כֶת עִם־אַנְשֵׁי־רֶֽשַׁע׃
verses.englishText: Who goeth in company with the workers of iniquity, and walketh with wicked men.

jps.text: Who goeth in company with the workers of iniquity, and walketh with wicked men.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָ֭מַר לֹ֣א יִסְכָּן־גָּ֑בֶר בִּ֝רְצֹתֹ֗ו עִם־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For he hath said: 'It profiteth a man nothing that he should be in accord with God.'

jps.text: For he hath said: 'It profiteth a man nothing that he should be in accord with God.'

verses.hebrewText: לָכֵ֤ן ׀ אַ֥נֲשֵׁ֥י לֵבָ֗ב שִׁמְע֫וּ לִ֥י חָלִ֖לָה לָאֵ֥ל מֵרֶ֗שַׁע וְשַׁדַּ֥י מֵעָֽוֶל׃
verses.englishText: Therefore hearken unto me, ye men of understanding: Far be it from God, that He should do wickedness; and from the Almighty, that He should commit iniquity.

jps.text: Therefore hearken unto me, ye men of understanding: Far be it from God, that He should do wickedness; and from the Almighty, that He should commit iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י פֹ֣עַל אָ֭דָם יְשַׁלֶּם־לֹ֑ו וּֽכְאֹ֥רַח אִ֝֗ישׁ יַמְצִאֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: For the work of a man will He requite unto him, and cause every man to find according to his ways.

jps.text: For the work of a man will He requite unto him, and cause every man to find according to his ways.

verses.hebrewText: אַף־אָמְנָ֗ם אֵ֥ל לֹֽא־יַרְשִׁ֑יעַ וְ֝שַׁדַּ֗י לֹֽא־יְעַוֵּ֥ת מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: Yea, of a surety, God will not do wickedly, neither will the Almighty pervert justice.

jps.text: Yea, of a surety, God will not do wickedly, neither will the Almighty pervert justice.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־פָקַ֣ד עָלָ֣יו אָ֑רְצָה וּמִ֥י שָׂ֝֗ם תֵּבֵ֥ל כֻּלָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Who gave Him a charge over the earth? Or who hath disposed the whole world?

jps.text: Who gave Him a charge over the earth? Or who hath disposed the whole world?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יָשִׂ֣ים אֵלָ֣יו לִבֹּ֑ו רוּחֹ֥ו וְ֝נִשְׁמָתֹ֗ו אֵלָ֥יו יֶאֱסֹֽף׃
verses.englishText: If He set His heart upon man, if He gather unto Himself his spirit and his breath;

jps.text: If He set His heart upon man, if He gather unto Himself his spirit and his breath;

verses.hebrewText: יִגְוַ֣ע כָּל־בָּשָׂ֣ר יָ֑חַד וְ֝אָדָ֗ם עַל־עָפָ֥ר יָשֽׁוּב׃
verses.englishText: All flesh shall perish together, and man shall return unto dust.

jps.text: All flesh shall perish together, and man shall return unto dust.

verses.hebrewText: וְאִם־בִּ֥ינָה שִׁמְעָה־זֹּ֑את הַ֝אֲזִ֗ינָה לְקֹ֣ול מִלָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: If now thou hast understanding, hear this; hearken to the voice of my words.

jps.text: If now thou hast understanding, hear this; hearken to the voice of my words.

verses.hebrewText: הַאַ֬ף שֹׂונֵ֣א מִשְׁפָּ֣ט יַחֲבֹ֑ושׁ וְאִם־צַדִּ֖יק כַּבִּ֣יר תַּרְשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.englishText: Shall even one that hateth right govern? And wilt thou condemn Him that is just and mighty —

jps.text: Shall even one that hateth right govern? And wilt thou condemn Him that is just and mighty —

verses.hebrewText: הַאֲמֹ֣ר לְמֶ֣לֶךְ בְּלִיָּ֑עַל רָ֝שָׁ֗ע אֶל־נְדִיבִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Is it fit to say to a king: 'Thou art base'? Or to nobles: 'Ye are wicked'? —

jps.text: Is it fit to say to a king: 'Thou art base'? Or to nobles: 'Ye are wicked'? —

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר לֹֽא־נָשָׂ֨א ׀ פְּנֵ֥י שָׂרִ֗ים וְלֹ֣א נִכַּר־שֹׁ֖ועַ לִפְנֵי־דָ֑ל כִּֽי־מַעֲשֵׂ֖ה יָדָ֣יו כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: That respecteth not the persons of princes, nor regardeth the rich more than the poor? For they all are the work of His hands.

jps.text: That respecteth not the persons of princes, nor regardeth the rich more than the poor? For they all are the work of His hands.

verses.hebrewText: רֶ֤גַע ׀ יָמֻתוּ֮ וַחֲצֹ֪ות לָ֥יְלָה יְגֹעֲשׁ֣וּ עָ֣ם וְיַעֲבֹ֑רוּ וְיָסִ֥ירוּ אַ֝בִּ֗יר לֹ֣א בְיָֽד׃
verses.englishText: In a moment they die, even at midnight; the people are shaken and pass away, and the mighty are taken away without hand.

jps.text: In a moment they die, even at midnight; the people are shaken and pass away, and the mighty are taken away without hand.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־עֵ֭ינָיו עַל־דַּרְכֵי־אִ֑ישׁ וְֽכָל־צְעָדָ֥יו יִרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: For His eyes are upon the ways of a man, and He seeth all his goings.

jps.text: For His eyes are upon the ways of a man, and He seeth all his goings.

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽין־חֹ֖שֶׁךְ וְאֵ֣ין צַלְמָ֑וֶת לְהִסָּ֥תֶר שָׁ֝֗ם פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: There is no darkness, nor shadow of death, where the workers of iniquity may hide themselves.

jps.text: There is no darkness, nor shadow of death, where the workers of iniquity may hide themselves.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א עַל־אִ֭ישׁ יָשִׂ֣ים עֹ֑וד לַהֲלֹ֥ךְ אֶל־אֵ֝֗ל בַּמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: For He doth not appoint a time unto any man, when he should go before God in judgment.

jps.text: For He doth not appoint a time unto any man, when he should go before God in judgment.

verses.hebrewText: יָרֹ֣עַ כַּבִּירִ֣ים לֹא־חֵ֑קֶר וַיַּעֲמֵ֖ד אֲחֵרִ֣ים תַּחְתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: He breaketh in pieces mighty men without inquisition, and setteth others in their stead.

jps.text: He breaketh in pieces mighty men without inquisition, and setteth others in their stead.

verses.hebrewText: לָכֵ֗ן יַ֭כִּיר מַעְבָּֽדֵיהֶ֑ם וְהָ֥פַךְ לַ֝֗יְלָה וְיִדַּכָּֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: Therefore He taketh knowledge of their works; and He overturneth them in the night, so that they are crushed.

jps.text: Therefore He taketh knowledge of their works; and He overturneth them in the night, so that they are crushed.

verses.hebrewText: תַּֽחַת־רְשָׁעִ֥ים סְפָקָ֗ם בִּמְקֹ֥ום רֹאִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He striketh them as wicked men in the open sight of others;

jps.text: He striketh them as wicked men in the open sight of others;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־כֵּ֭ן סָ֣רוּ מֵֽאַחֲרָ֑יו וְכָל־דְּ֝רָכָ֗יו לֹ֣א הִשְׂכִּֽילוּ׃
verses.englishText: Because they turned aside from following Him, and would not have regard to any of His ways;

jps.text: Because they turned aside from following Him, and would not have regard to any of His ways;

verses.hebrewText: לְהָבִ֣יא עָ֭לָיו צַֽעֲקַת־דָּ֑ל וְצַעֲקַ֖ת עֲנִיִּ֣ים יִשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.englishText: So that they cause the cry of the poor to come unto Him, and He heareth the cry of the afflicted.

jps.text: So that they cause the cry of the poor to come unto Him, and He heareth the cry of the afflicted.

verses.hebrewText: וְה֤וּא יַשְׁקִ֨ט ׀ וּמִ֥י יַרְשִׁ֗עַ וְיַסְתֵּ֣ר פָּ֭נִים וּמִ֣י יְשׁוּרֶ֑נּוּ וְעַל־גֹּ֖וי וְעַל־אָדָ֣ם יָֽחַד׃
verses.englishText: When He giveth quietness, who then can condemn? And when He hideth His face, who then can behold Him? whether it be done unto a nation, or unto a man, alike;

jps.text: When He giveth quietness, who then can condemn? And when He hideth His face, who then can behold Him? whether it be done unto a nation, or unto a man, alike;

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭מְּלֹךְ אָדָ֥ם חָנֵ֗ף מִמֹּ֥קְשֵׁי עָֽם׃
verses.englishText: That the godless man reign not, that there be none to ensnare the people.

jps.text: That the godless man reign not, that there be none to ensnare the people.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אֶל־אֵ֭ל הֶאָמַ֥ר נָשָׂ֗אתִי לֹ֣א אֶחְבֹּֽל׃
verses.englishText: For hath any said unto God: 'I have borne chastisement, though I offend not;

jps.text: For hath any said unto God: 'I have borne chastisement, though I offend not;

verses.hebrewText: בִּלְעֲדֵ֣י אֶ֭חֱזֶה אַתָּ֣ה הֹרֵ֑נִי אִֽם־עָ֥וֶל פָּ֝עַ֗לְתִּי לֹ֣א אֹסִֽיף׃
verses.englishText: That which I see not teach Thou me; if I have done iniquity, I will do it no more'?

jps.text: That which I see not teach Thou me; if I have done iniquity, I will do it no more'?

verses.hebrewText: הַֽמֵעִמְּךָ֬ יְשַׁלְמֶ֨נָּה כִּֽי־מָאַ֗סְתָּ כִּי־אַתָּ֣ה תִבְחַ֣ר וְלֹא־אָ֑נִי וּֽמַה־יָדַ֥עְתָּ דַבֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Shall His recompense be as thou wilt? For thou loathest it, so that thou must choose, and not I; therefore speak what thou knowest.

jps.text: Shall His recompense be as thou wilt? For thou loathest it, so that thou must choose, and not I; therefore speak what thou knowest.

verses.hebrewText: אַנְשֵׁ֣י לֵ֭בָב יֹ֣אמְרוּ לִ֑י וְגֶ֥בֶר חָ֝כָ֗ם שֹׁמֵ֥עַֽ לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Men of understanding will say unto me, yea, every wise man that heareth me:

jps.text: Men of understanding will say unto me, yea, every wise man that heareth me:

verses.hebrewText: אִ֭יֹּוב לֹא־בְדַ֣עַת יְדַבֵּ֑ר וּ֝דְבָרָ֗יו לֹ֣א בְהַשְׂכֵּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: 'Job speaketh without knowledge, and his words are without discernment.'

jps.text: 'Job speaketh without knowledge, and his words are without discernment.'

verses.hebrewText: אָבִ֗י יִבָּחֵ֣ן אִיֹּ֣וב עַד־נֶ֑צַח עַל־תְּ֝שֻׁבֹ֗ת בְּאַנְשֵׁי־אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Would that Job were tried unto the end, because of his answering like wicked men.

jps.text: Would that Job were tried unto the end, because of his answering like wicked men.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֥י יֹ֘סִ֤יף עַֽל־חַטָּאתֹ֣ו פֶ֭שַׁע בֵּינֵ֣ינוּ יִסְפֹּ֑וק וְיֶ֖רֶב אֲמָרָ֣יו לָאֵֽל׃ ס
verses.englishText: For he addeth rebellion unto his sin, he clappeth his hands among us, and multiplieth his words against God.

jps.text: For he addeth rebellion unto his sin, he clappeth his hands among us, and multiplieth his words against God.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥עַן אֱלִיה֗וּ וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Moreover Elihu answered and said:

jps.text: Moreover Elihu answered and said:

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭זֹאת חָשַׁ֣בְתָּ לְמִשְׁפָּ֑ט אָ֝מַ֗רְתָּ צִדְקִ֥י מֵאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Thinkest thou this to be thy right, or sayest thou: 'I am righteousness before God',

jps.text: Thinkest thou this to be thy right, or sayest thou: 'I am righteousness before God',

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תֹ֭אמַר מַה־יִּסְכָּן־לָ֑ךְ מָֽה־אֹ֝עִ֗יל מֵֽחַטָּאתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: That thou inquirest: 'What advantage will it be unto Thee?' And: 'What profit shall I have, more than if I had sinned?'

jps.text: That thou inquirest: 'What advantage will it be unto Thee?' And: 'What profit shall I have, more than if I had sinned?'

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭נִי אֲשִֽׁיבְךָ֣ מִלִּ֑ין וְֽאֶת־רֵעֶ֥יךָ עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: I will give thee answer, and thy companions with thee.

jps.text: I will give thee answer, and thy companions with thee.

verses.hebrewText: הַבֵּ֣ט שָׁמַ֣יִם וּרְאֵ֑ה וְשׁ֥וּר שְׁ֝חָקִ֗ים גָּבְה֥וּ מִמֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Look unto the heavens, and see; and behold the skies, which are higher than thou.

jps.text: Look unto the heavens, and see; and behold the skies, which are higher than thou.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־חָ֭טָאתָ מַה־תִּפְעָל־בֹּ֑ו וְרַבּ֥וּ פְ֝שָׁעֶ֗יךָ מַה־תַּעֲשֶׂה־לֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: If thou hast sinned, what doest thou against Him? And if thy transgressions be multiplied, what doest thou unto Him?

jps.text: If thou hast sinned, what doest thou against Him? And if thy transgressions be multiplied, what doest thou unto Him?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־צָ֭דַקְתָּ מַה־תִּתֶּן־לֹ֑ו אֹ֥ו מַה־מִיָּדְךָ֥ יִקָּֽח׃
verses.englishText: If thou be righteous, what givest thou Him? Or what receiveth He of thy hand?

jps.text: If thou be righteous, what givest thou Him? Or what receiveth He of thy hand?

verses.hebrewText: לְאִישׁ־כָּמֹ֥וךָ רִשְׁעֶ֑ךָ וּלְבֶן־אָ֝דָ֗ם צִדְקָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thy wickedness concerneth a man as thou art; and thy righteousness a son of man.

jps.text: Thy wickedness concerneth a man as thou art; and thy righteousness a son of man.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֭רֹב עֲשׁוּקִ֣ים יַזְעִ֑יקוּ יְשַׁוְּע֖וּ מִזְּרֹ֣ועַ רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: By reason of the multitude of oppressions they cry out; they cry for help by reason of the arm of the mighty.

jps.text: By reason of the multitude of oppressions they cry out; they cry for help by reason of the arm of the mighty.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽלֹא־אָמַ֗ר אַ֭יֵּה אֱלֹ֣והַּ עֹשָׂ֑י נֹתֵ֖ן זְמִרֹ֣ות בַּלָּֽיְלָה׃
verses.englishText: But none saith: 'Where is God my Maker, who giveth songs in the night;

jps.text: But none saith: 'Where is God my Maker, who giveth songs in the night;

verses.hebrewText: מַ֭לְּפֵנוּ מִבַּהֲמֹ֣ות אָ֑רֶץ וּמֵעֹ֖וף הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם יְחַכְּמֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Who teacheth us more than the beasts of the earth, and maketh us wiser than the fowls of heaven?'

jps.text: Who teacheth us more than the beasts of the earth, and maketh us wiser than the fowls of heaven?'

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֣ם יִ֭צְעֲקוּ וְלֹ֣א יַעֲנֶ֑ה מִ֝פְּנֵ֗י גְּאֹ֣ון רָעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: There they cry, but none giveth answer, because of the pride of evil men.

jps.text: There they cry, but none giveth answer, because of the pride of evil men.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־שָׁ֭וְא לֹא־יִשְׁמַ֥ע ׀ אֵ֑ל וְ֝שַׁדַּ֗י לֹ֣א יְשׁוּרֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: Surely God will not hear vanity, neither will the Almighty regard it.

jps.text: Surely God will not hear vanity, neither will the Almighty regard it.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֣ף כִּֽי־תֹ֖אמַר לֹ֣א תְשׁוּרֶ֑נּוּ דִּ֥ין לְ֝פָנָ֗יו וּתְחֹ֥ולֵֽל לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Yea, when thou sayest thou canst not see Him — the cause is before Him; therefore wait thou for Him.

jps.text: Yea, when thou sayest thou canst not see Him — the cause is before Him; therefore wait thou for Him.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֗ה כִּי־אַ֭יִן פָּקַ֣ד אַפֹּ֑ו וְלֹֽא־יָדַ֖ע בַּפַּ֣שׁ מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: And now, is it for nought that He punished in His anger? And hath He not full knowledge of arrogance?

jps.text: And now, is it for nought that He punished in His anger? And hath He not full knowledge of arrogance?

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אִיֹּוב הֶ֣בֶל יִפְצֶה־פִּ֑יהוּ בִּבְלִי־דַ֝֗עַת מִלִּ֥ין יַכְבִּֽר׃ פ
verses.englishText: But Job doth open his mouth in vanity; he multiplieth words without knowledge.

jps.text: But Job doth open his mouth in vanity; he multiplieth words without knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֥סֶף אֱלִיה֗וּא וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Elihu also proceeded, and said:

jps.text: Elihu also proceeded, and said:

verses.hebrewText: כַּתַּר־לִ֣י זְ֭עֵיר וַאֲחַוֶּ֑ךָּ כִּ֤י עֹ֖וד לֶאֱלֹ֣והַּ מִלִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Suffer me a little, and I will tell thee; for there are yet words on God's behalf.

jps.text: Suffer me a little, and I will tell thee; for there are yet words on God's behalf.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשָּׂ֣א דֵ֭עִי לְמֵרָחֹ֑וק וְ֝לְפֹעֲלִ֗י אֶֽתֵּֽן־צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.englishText: I will fetch my knowledge from afar, and will ascribe righteousness to my Maker.

jps.text: I will fetch my knowledge from afar, and will ascribe righteousness to my Maker.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָ֭מְנָם לֹא־שֶׁ֣קֶר מִלָּ֑י תְּמִ֖ים דֵּעֹ֣ות עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For truly my words are not false; one that is upright in mind is with thee.

jps.text: For truly my words are not false; one that is upright in mind is with thee.

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־אֵ֣ל כַּ֭בִּיר וְלֹ֣א יִמְאָ֑ס כַּ֝בִּ֗יר כֹּ֣חַֽ לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: Behold, God is mighty, yet He despiseth not any; He is mighty in strength of understanding.

jps.text: Behold, God is mighty, yet He despiseth not any; He is mighty in strength of understanding.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יְחַיֶּ֥ה רָשָׁ֑ע וּמִשְׁפַּ֖ט עֲנִיִּ֣ים יִתֵּֽן׃
verses.englishText: He preserveth not the life of the wicked; but giveth to the poor their right.

jps.text: He preserveth not the life of the wicked; but giveth to the poor their right.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יִגְרַ֥ע מִצַּדִּ֗יק עֵ֫ינָ֥יו וְאֶת־מְלָכִ֥ים לַכִּסֵּ֑א וַיֹּשִׁיבֵ֥ם לָ֝נֶ֗צַח וַיִּגְבָּֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: He withdraweth not His eyes from the righteous; but with kings upon the throne He setteth them for ever, and they are exalted.

jps.text: He withdraweth not His eyes from the righteous; but with kings upon the throne He setteth them for ever, and they are exalted.

verses.hebrewText: וְאִם־אֲסוּרִ֥ים בַּזִּקִּ֑ים יִ֝לָּכְד֗וּן בְּחַבְלֵי־עֹֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: And if they be bound in fetters, and be holden in cords of affliction;

jps.text: And if they be bound in fetters, and be holden in cords of affliction;

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּגֵּ֣ד לָהֶ֣ם פָּעֳלָ֑ם וּ֝פִשְׁעֵיהֶ֗ם כִּ֣י יִתְגַּבָּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Then He declareth unto them their work, and their transgressions, that they have behaved themselves proudly.

jps.text: Then He declareth unto them their work, and their transgressions, that they have behaved themselves proudly.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּ֣גֶל אָ֭זְנָם לַמּוּסָ֑ר וַ֝יֹּ֗אמֶר כִּֽי־יְשֻׁב֥וּן מֵאָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: He openeth also their ear to discipline, and commandeth that they return from iniquity.

jps.text: He openeth also their ear to discipline, and commandeth that they return from iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽם־יִשְׁמְע֗וּ וְֽיַ֫עֲבֹ֥דוּ יְכַלּ֣וּ יְמֵיהֶ֣ם בַּטֹּ֑וב וּ֝שְׁנֵיהֶ֗ם בַּנְּעִימִֽים׃
verses.englishText: If they hearken and serve Him, they shall spend their days in prosperity, and their years in pleasures.

jps.text: If they hearken and serve Him, they shall spend their days in prosperity, and their years in pleasures.

verses.hebrewText: וְאִם־לֹ֣א יִ֭שְׁמְעוּ בְּשֶׁ֣לַח יַעֲבֹ֑רוּ וְ֝יִגְוְע֗וּ כִּבְלִי־דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: But if they hearken not, they shall perish by the sword, and they shall die without knowledge.

jps.text: But if they hearken not, they shall perish by the sword, and they shall die without knowledge.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽחַנְפֵי־לֵ֭ב יָשִׂ֣ימוּ אָ֑ף לֹ֥א יְ֝שַׁוְּע֗וּ כִּ֣י אֲסָרָֽם׃
verses.englishText: But they that are godless in heart lay up anger; they cry not for help when He bindeth them.

jps.text: But they that are godless in heart lay up anger; they cry not for help when He bindeth them.

verses.hebrewText: תָּמֹ֣ת בַּנֹּ֣עַר נַפְשָׁ֑ם וְ֝חַיָּתָ֗ם בַּקְּדֵשִֽׁים׃
verses.englishText: Their soul perisheth in youth, and their life as that of the depraved.

jps.text: Their soul perisheth in youth, and their life as that of the depraved.

verses.hebrewText: יְחַלֵּ֣ץ עָנִ֣י בְעָנְיֹ֑ו וְיִ֖גֶל בַּלַּ֣חַץ אָזְנָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He delivereth the afflicted by His affliction, and openeth their ear by tribulation.

jps.text: He delivereth the afflicted by His affliction, and openeth their ear by tribulation.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַ֤ף הֲסִיתְךָ֨ ׀ מִפִּי־צָ֗ר רַ֭חַב לֹא־מוּצָ֣ק תַּחְתֶּ֑יהָ וְנַ֥חַת שֻׁ֝לְחָנְךָ֗ מָ֣לֵא דָֽשֶׁן׃
verses.englishText: Yea, He hath allured thee out of distress into a broad place, where there is no straitness; and that which is set on thy table is full of fatness;

jps.text: Yea, He hath allured thee out of distress into a broad place, where there is no straitness; and that which is set on thy table is full of fatness;

verses.hebrewText: וְדִין־רָשָׁ֥ע מָלֵ֑אתָ דִּ֖ין וּמִשְׁפָּ֣ט יִתְמֹֽכוּ׃
verses.englishText: And thou art full of the judgment of the wicked; judgment and justice take hold on them.

jps.text: And thou art full of the judgment of the wicked; judgment and justice take hold on them.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חֵ֭מָה פֶּן־יְסִֽיתְךָ֣ בְסָ֑פֶק וְרָב־כֹּ֝֗פֶר אַל־יַטֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: For beware of wrath, lest thou be led away by thy sufficiency; neither let the greatness of the ransom turn thee aside.

jps.text: For beware of wrath, lest thou be led away by thy sufficiency; neither let the greatness of the ransom turn thee aside.

verses.hebrewText: הֲיַעֲרֹ֣ךְ שׁ֖וּעֲךָ לֹ֣א בְצָ֑ר וְ֝כֹ֗ל מַאֲמַצֵּי־כֹֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: Will thy riches avail, that are without stint, or all the forces of thy strength?

jps.text: Will thy riches avail, that are without stint, or all the forces of thy strength?

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּשְׁאַ֥ף הַלָּ֑יְלָה לַעֲלֹ֖ות עַמִּ֣ים תַּחְתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Desire not the night, when peoples are cut off in their place.

jps.text: Desire not the night, when peoples are cut off in their place.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭שָּׁמֶר אַל־תֵּ֣פֶן אֶל־אָ֑וֶן כִּֽי־עַל־זֶ֝֗ה בָּחַ֥רְתָּ מֵעֹֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Take heed, regard not iniquity; for this hast thou chosen rather than affliction.

jps.text: Take heed, regard not iniquity; for this hast thou chosen rather than affliction.

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־אֵ֭ל יַשְׂגִּ֣יב בְּכֹחֹ֑ו מִ֖י כָמֹ֣הוּ מֹורֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Behold, God doeth loftily in His power; who is a teacher like Him?

jps.text: Behold, God doeth loftily in His power; who is a teacher like Him?

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־פָקַ֣ד עָלָ֣יו דַּרְכֹּ֑ו וּמִֽי־אָ֝מַ֗ר פָּעַ֥לְתָּ עַוְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who hath enjoined Him His way? Or who hath said: 'Thou hast wrought unrighteousness'?

jps.text: Who hath enjoined Him His way? Or who hath said: 'Thou hast wrought unrighteousness'?

verses.hebrewText: זְ֭כֹר כִּֽי־תַשְׂגִּ֣יא פָעֳלֹ֑ו אֲשֶׁ֖ר שֹׁרְר֣וּ אֲנָשִֽׁים׃
verses.englishText: Remember that thou magnify His work, whereof men have sung.

jps.text: Remember that thou magnify His work, whereof men have sung.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־אָדָ֥ם חָֽזוּ־בֹ֑ו אֱ֝נֹ֗ושׁ יַבִּ֥יט מֵרָחֹֽוק׃
verses.englishText: All men have looked thereon; man beholdeth it afar off.

jps.text: All men have looked thereon; man beholdeth it afar off.

verses.hebrewText: הֶן־אֵ֣ל שַׂ֭גִּיא וְלֹ֣א נֵדָ֑ע מִסְפַּ֖ר שָׁנָ֣יו וְלֹא־חֵֽקֶר׃
verses.englishText: Behold, God is great, beyond our knowledge; the number of His years is unsearchable.

jps.text: Behold, God is great, beyond our knowledge; the number of His years is unsearchable.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י יְגָרַ֣ע נִטְפֵי־מָ֑יִם יָזֹ֖קּוּ מָטָ֣ר לְאֵדֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For He draweth away the drops of water, which distil rain from His vapour;

jps.text: For He draweth away the drops of water, which distil rain from His vapour;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶֽׁר־יִזְּל֥וּ שְׁחָקִ֑ים יִ֝רְעֲפ֗וּ עֲלֵ֤י ׀ אָדָ֬ם רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Which the skies pour down and drop upon the multitudes of men.

jps.text: Which the skies pour down and drop upon the multitudes of men.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֣ף אִם־יָ֭בִין מִפְרְשֵׂי־עָ֑ב תְּ֝שֻׁאֹ֗ות סֻכָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Yea, can any understand the spreadings of the clouds, the crashings of His pavilion?

jps.text: Yea, can any understand the spreadings of the clouds, the crashings of His pavilion?

verses.hebrewText: הֵן־פָּרַ֣שׂ עָלָ֣יו אֹורֹ֑ו וְשָׁרְשֵׁ֖י הַיָּ֣ם כִּסָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He spreadeth His light upon it; and He covereth the depths of the sea.

jps.text: Behold, He spreadeth His light upon it; and He covereth the depths of the sea.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־בָ֭ם יָדִ֣ין עַמִּ֑ים יִֽתֶּן־אֹ֥כֶל לְמַכְבִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: For by these He judgeth the peoples; He giveth food in abundance.

jps.text: For by these He judgeth the peoples; He giveth food in abundance.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כַּפַּ֥יִם כִּסָּה־אֹ֑ור וַיְצַ֖ו עָלֶ֣יהָ בְמַפְגִּֽיעַ׃
verses.englishText: He covereth His hands with the lightning, and giveth it a charge that it strike the mark.

jps.text: He covereth His hands with the lightning, and giveth it a charge that it strike the mark.

verses.hebrewText: יַגִּ֣יד עָלָ֣יו רֵעֹ֑ו מִ֝קְנֶ֗ה אַ֣ף עַל־עֹולֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: The noise thereof telleth concerning it, the cattle also concerning the storm that cometh up.

jps.text: The noise thereof telleth concerning it, the cattle also concerning the storm that cometh up.

verses.hebrewText: אַף־לְ֭זֹאת יֶחֱרַ֣ד לִבִּ֑י וְ֝יִתַּ֗ר מִמְּקֹומֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: At this also my heart trembleth, and is moved out of its place.

jps.text: At this also my heart trembleth, and is moved out of its place.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְע֤וּ שָׁמֹ֣ועַ בְּרֹ֣גֶז קֹלֹ֑ו וְ֝הֶ֗גֶה מִפִּ֥יו יֵצֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: Hear attentively the noise of His voice, and the sound that goeth out of His mouth.

jps.text: Hear attentively the noise of His voice, and the sound that goeth out of His mouth.

verses.hebrewText: תַּֽחַת־כָּל־הַשָּׁמַ֥יִם יִשְׁרֵ֑הוּ וְ֝אֹורֹ֗ו עַל־כַּנְפֹ֥ות הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: He sendeth it forth under the whole heaven, and His lightning unto the ends of the earth.

jps.text: He sendeth it forth under the whole heaven, and His lightning unto the ends of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: אַחֲרָ֤יו ׀ יִשְׁאַג־קֹ֗ול יַ֭רְעֵם בְּקֹ֣ול גְּאֹונֹ֑ו וְלֹ֥א יְ֝עַקְּבֵ֗ם כִּֽי־יִשָּׁמַ֥ע קֹולֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: After it a voice roareth; He thundereth with the voice of His majesty; and He stayeth them not when His voice is heard.

jps.text: After it a voice roareth; He thundereth with the voice of His majesty; and He stayeth them not when His voice is heard.

verses.hebrewText: יַרְעֵ֤ם אֵ֣ל בְּ֭קֹולֹו נִפְלָאֹ֑ות עֹשֶׂ֥ה גְ֝דֹלֹ֗ות וְלֹ֣א נֵדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: God thundereth marvellously with His voice; great things doeth He, which we cannot comprehend.

jps.text: God thundereth marvellously with His voice; great things doeth He, which we cannot comprehend.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לַשֶּׁ֨לַג ׀ יֹאמַ֗ר הֱוֵ֫א אָ֥רֶץ וְגֶ֥שֶׁם מָטָ֑ר וְ֝גֶ֗שֶׁם מִטְרֹ֥ות עֻזֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: For He saith to the snow: 'Fall thou on the earth'; likewise to the shower of rain, and to the showers of His mighty rain.

jps.text: For He saith to the snow: 'Fall thou on the earth'; likewise to the shower of rain, and to the showers of His mighty rain.

verses.hebrewText: בְּיַד־כָּל־אָדָ֥ם יַחְתֹּ֑ום לָ֝דַ֗עַת כָּל־אַנְשֵׁ֥י מַעֲשֵֽׂהוּ׃
verses.englishText: He sealeth up the hand of every man, that all men whom He hath made may know it.

jps.text: He sealeth up the hand of every man, that all men whom He hath made may know it.

verses.hebrewText: וַתָּבֹ֣א חַיָּ֣ה בְמֹו־אָ֑רֶב וּבִמְעֹ֖ונֹתֶ֣יהָ תִשְׁכֹּֽן׃
verses.englishText: Then the beasts go into coverts, and remain in their dens.

jps.text: Then the beasts go into coverts, and remain in their dens.

verses.hebrewText: מִן־הַ֭חֶדֶר תָּבֹ֣וא סוּפָ֑ה וּֽמִמְּזָרִ֥ים קָרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Out of the Chamber cometh the storm; and cold out of the north.

jps.text: Out of the Chamber cometh the storm; and cold out of the north.

verses.hebrewText: מִנִּשְׁמַת־אֵ֥ל יִתֶּן־קָ֑רַח וְרֹ֖חַב מַ֣יִם בְּמוּצָֽק׃
verses.englishText: By the breath of God ice is given, and the breadth of the waters is straitened.

jps.text: By the breath of God ice is given, and the breadth of the waters is straitened.

verses.hebrewText: אַף־בְּ֭רִי יַטְרִ֣יחַ עָ֑ב יָ֝פִ֗יץ עֲנַ֣ן אֹורֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Yea, He ladeth the thick cloud with moister, He spreadeth abroad the cloud of His lightning;

jps.text: Yea, He ladeth the thick cloud with moister, He spreadeth abroad the cloud of His lightning;

verses.hebrewText: וְה֤וּא מְסִבֹּ֨ות ׀ מִתְהַפֵּ֣ךְ *בְּתַחְבּוּלָתֹו (בְּתַחְבּוּלֹתָ֣יו) לְפָעֳלָ֑ם כֹּ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר יְצַוֵּ֓ם ׀ עַל־פְּנֵ֖י תֵבֵ֣ל אָֽרְצָה׃
verses.englishText: And they are turned round about by His guidance, that they may do whatsoever He commandeth them upon the face of the habitable world:

jps.text: And they are turned round about by His guidance, that they may do whatsoever He commandeth them upon the face of the habitable world:

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לְשֵׁ֥בֶט אִם־לְאַרְצֹ֑ו אִם־לְ֝חֶ֗סֶד יַמְצִאֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Whether it be for correction, or for His earth, or for mercy, that He cause it to come.

jps.text: Whether it be for correction, or for His earth, or for mercy, that He cause it to come.

verses.hebrewText: הַאֲזִ֣ינָה זֹּ֣את אִיֹּ֑וב עֲ֝מֹ֗ד וְהִתְבֹּונֵ֤ן ׀ נִפְלְאֹ֬ות אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Hearken unto this, O Job; stand still, and consider the wondrous works of God.

jps.text: Hearken unto this, O Job; stand still, and consider the wondrous works of God.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭תֵדַע בְּשׂוּם־אֱלֹ֣והַּ עֲלֵיהֶ֑ם וְ֝הֹופִ֗יעַ אֹ֣ור עֲנָנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Dost thou know how God enjoineth them, and causeth the lightning of His cloud to shine?

jps.text: Dost thou know how God enjoineth them, and causeth the lightning of His cloud to shine?

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭תֵדַע עַל־מִפְלְשֵׂי־עָ֑ב מִ֝פְלְאֹ֗ות תְּמִ֣ים דֵּעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Dost thou know the balancings of the clouds, the wondrous works of Him who is perfect in knowledge?

jps.text: Dost thou know the balancings of the clouds, the wondrous works of Him who is perfect in knowledge?

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־בְּגָדֶ֥יךָ חַמִּ֑ים בְּהַשְׁקִ֥ט אֶ֝֗רֶץ מִדָּרֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: Thou whose garments are warm, when the earth is still by reason of the south wind;

jps.text: Thou whose garments are warm, when the earth is still by reason of the south wind;

verses.hebrewText: תַּרְקִ֣יעַ עִ֭מֹּו לִשְׁחָקִ֑ים חֲ֝זָקִ֗ים כִּרְאִ֥י מוּצָֽק׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou with Him spread out the sky, which is strong as a molten mirror?

jps.text: Canst thou with Him spread out the sky, which is strong as a molten mirror?

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֖ודִיעֵנוּ מַה־נֹּ֣אמַר לֹ֑ו לֹ֥א־נַ֝עֲרֹ֗ךְ מִפְּנֵי־חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: Teach us what we shall say unto Him; for we cannot order our speech by reason of darkness.

jps.text: Teach us what we shall say unto Him; for we cannot order our speech by reason of darkness.

verses.hebrewText: הֽ͏ַיְסֻפַּר־לֹ֖ו כִּ֣י אֲדַבֵּ֑ר אִֽם־אָ֥מַר אִ֝֗ישׁ כִּ֣י יְבֻלָּֽע׃
verses.englishText: Shall it be told Him that I would speak? Or should a man wish that he were swallowed up?

jps.text: Shall it be told Him that I would speak? Or should a man wish that he were swallowed up?

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֤ה ׀ לֹ֘א רָ֤אוּ אֹ֗ור בָּהִ֣יר ה֭וּא בַּשְּׁחָקִ֑ים וְר֥וּחַ עָ֝בְרָ֗ה וַֽתְּטַהֲרֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: And now men see not the light which is bright in the skies; but the wind passeth, and cleanseth them.

jps.text: And now men see not the light which is bright in the skies; but the wind passeth, and cleanseth them.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭צָּפֹון זָהָ֣ב יֶֽאֱתֶ֑ה עַל־אֱ֝לֹ֗והַּ נֹ֣ורָא הֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: Out of the north cometh golden splendour, about God is terrible majesty.

jps.text: Out of the north cometh golden splendour, about God is terrible majesty.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁדַּ֣י לֹֽא־מְ֭צָאנֻהוּ שַׂגִּיא־כֹ֑חַ וּמִשְׁפָּ֥ט וְרֹב־צְ֝דָקָ֗ה לֹ֣א יְעַנֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: The Almighty, whom we cannot find out, is excellent in power, yet to judgment and plenteous justice He doeth no violence.

jps.text: The Almighty, whom we cannot find out, is excellent in power, yet to judgment and plenteous justice He doeth no violence.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭כֵן יְרֵא֣וּהוּ אֲנָשִׁ֑ים לֹֽא־יִ֝רְאֶ֗ה כָּל־חַכְמֵי־לֵֽב׃ פ
verses.englishText: Men do therefore fear Him; He regardeth not any that are wise of heart.

jps.text: Men do therefore fear Him; He regardeth not any that are wise of heart.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּֽעַן־יְהוָ֣ה אֶת־אִ֭יֹּוב *מִנ *הַסְּעָרָה (מִ֥ן ׀ הַסְּעָרָ֗ה) וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind, and said:

jps.text: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind, and said:

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י זֶ֨ה ׀ מַחְשִׁ֖יךְ עֵצָ֥ה בְמִלִּ֗ין בְּֽלִי־דָֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: Who is this that darkeneth counsel by words without knowledge?

jps.text: Who is this that darkeneth counsel by words without knowledge?

verses.hebrewText: אֱזָר־נָ֣א כְגֶ֣בֶר חֲלָצֶ֑יךָ וְ֝אֶשְׁאָלְךָ֗ וְהֹודִיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Gird up now thy loins like a man; for I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto Me.

jps.text: Gird up now thy loins like a man; for I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto Me.

verses.hebrewText: אֵיפֹ֣ה הָ֭יִיתָ בְּיָסְדִי־אָ֑רֶץ הַ֝גֵּ֗ד אִם־יָדַ֥עְתָּ בִינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Where wast thou when I laid the foundations of the earth? Declare, if thou hast the understanding.

jps.text: Where wast thou when I laid the foundations of the earth? Declare, if thou hast the understanding.

verses.hebrewText: מִי־שָׂ֣ם מְ֭מַדֶּיהָ כִּ֣י תֵדָ֑ע אֹ֤ו מִֽי־נָטָ֖ה עָלֶ֣יהָ קָּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Who determined the measures thereof, if thou knowest? Or who stretched the line upon it?

jps.text: Who determined the measures thereof, if thou knowest? Or who stretched the line upon it?

verses.hebrewText: עַל־מָ֭ה אֲדָנֶ֣יהָ הָטְבָּ֑עוּ אֹ֥ו מִֽי־יָ֝רָ֗ה אֶ֣בֶן פִּנָּתָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Whereupon were the foundations thereof fastened? Or who laid the corner-stone thereof,

jps.text: Whereupon were the foundations thereof fastened? Or who laid the corner-stone thereof,

verses.hebrewText: בְּרָן־יַ֭חַד כֹּ֣וכְבֵי בֹ֑קֶר וַ֝יָּרִ֗יעוּ כָּל־בְּנֵ֥י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: When the morning stars sang together, and all the sons of God shouted for joy?

jps.text: When the morning stars sang together, and all the sons of God shouted for joy?

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֣סֶךְ בִּדְלָתַ֣יִם יָ֑ם בְּ֝גִיחֹ֗ו מֵרֶ֥חֶם יֵצֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: Or who shut up the sea with doors, when it broke forth, and issued out of the womb;

jps.text: Or who shut up the sea with doors, when it broke forth, and issued out of the womb;

verses.hebrewText: בְּשׂוּמִ֣י עָנָ֣ן לְבֻשֹׁ֑ו וַ֝עֲרָפֶ֗ל חֲתֻלָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: When I made the cloud the garment thereof, and thick darkness a swaddlingband for it,

jps.text: When I made the cloud the garment thereof, and thick darkness a swaddlingband for it,

verses.hebrewText: וָאֶשְׁבֹּ֣ר עָלָ֣יו חֻקִּ֑י וָֽ֝אָשִׂ֗ים בְּרִ֣יחַ וּדְלָתָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: And prescribed for it My decree, and set bars and doors,

jps.text: And prescribed for it My decree, and set bars and doors,

verses.hebrewText: וָאֹמַ֗ר עַד־פֹּ֣ה תָ֭בֹוא וְלֹ֣א תֹסִ֑יף וּפֹ֥א־יָ֝שִׁ֗ית בִּגְאֹ֥ון גַּלֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: And said: 'Thus far shalt thou come, but no further; and here shall thy proud waves be stayed'?

jps.text: And said: 'Thus far shalt thou come, but no further; and here shall thy proud waves be stayed'?

verses.hebrewText: הְֽ֭מִיָּמֶיךָ צִוִּ֣יתָ בֹּ֑קֶר *יִדַּעְתָּה *שַׁחַר (יִדַּ֖עְתָּ הַשַּׁ֣חַר) מְקֹמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Hast thou commanded the morning since thy days began, and caused the dayspring to know its place;

jps.text: Hast thou commanded the morning since thy days began, and caused the dayspring to know its place;

verses.hebrewText: לֶ֭אֱחֹז בְּכַנְפֹ֣ות הָאָ֑רֶץ וְיִנָּעֲר֖וּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים מִמֶּֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: That it might take hold of the ends of the earth, and the wicked be shaken out of it?

jps.text: That it might take hold of the ends of the earth, and the wicked be shaken out of it?

verses.hebrewText: תִּ֭תְהַפֵּךְ כְּחֹ֣מֶר חֹותָ֑ם וְ֝יִֽתְיַצְּב֗וּ כְּמֹ֣ו לְבֽוּשׁ׃
verses.englishText: It is changed as clay under the seal; and they stand as a garment.

jps.text: It is changed as clay under the seal; and they stand as a garment.

verses.hebrewText: וְיִמָּנַ֣ע מֵרְשָׁעִ֣ים אֹורָ֑ם וּזְרֹ֥ועַ רָ֝מָ֗ה תִּשָּׁבֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: But from the wicked their light is withholden, and the high arm is broken.

jps.text: But from the wicked their light is withholden, and the high arm is broken.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭בָאתָ עַד־נִבְכֵי־יָ֑ם וּבְחֵ֥קֶר תְּ֝הֹ֗ום הִתְהַלָּֽכְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: Hast thou entered into the springs of the sea? Or hast thou walked in the recesses of the deep?

jps.text: Hast thou entered into the springs of the sea? Or hast thou walked in the recesses of the deep?

verses.hebrewText: הֲנִגְל֣וּ לְ֭ךָ שַׁעֲרֵי־מָ֑וֶת וְשַׁעֲרֵ֖י צַלְמָ֣וֶת תִּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Have the gates of death been revealed unto thee? Or hast thou seen the gates of the shadow of death?

jps.text: Have the gates of death been revealed unto thee? Or hast thou seen the gates of the shadow of death?

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭תְבֹּנַנְתָּ עַד־רַחֲבֵי־אָ֑רֶץ הַ֝גֵּ֗ד אִם־יָדַ֥עְתָּ כֻלָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Hast thou surveyed unto the breadths of the earth? Declare, if thou knowest it all.

jps.text: Hast thou surveyed unto the breadths of the earth? Declare, if thou knowest it all.

verses.hebrewText: אֵי־זֶ֣ה הַ֭דֶּרֶךְ יִשְׁכָּן־אֹ֑ור וְ֝חֹ֗שֶׁךְ אֵי־זֶ֥ה מְקֹמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Where is the way to the dwelling of light, and as for darkness, where is the place thereof;

jps.text: Where is the way to the dwelling of light, and as for darkness, where is the place thereof;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י תִ֭קָּחֶנּוּ אֶל־גְּבוּלֹ֑ו וְכִֽי־תָ֝בִ֗ין נְתִיבֹ֥ות בֵּיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: That thou shouldest take it to the bound thereof, and that thou shouldest know the paths to the house thereof?

jps.text: That thou shouldest take it to the bound thereof, and that thou shouldest know the paths to the house thereof?

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭דַעְתָּ כִּי־אָ֣ז תִּוָּלֵ֑ד וּמִסְפַּ֖ר יָמֶ֣יךָ רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Thou knowest it, for thou wast then born, and the number of thy days is great!

jps.text: Thou knowest it, for thou wast then born, and the number of thy days is great!

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭בָאתָ אֶל־אֹצְרֹ֣ות שָׁ֑לֶג וְאֹצְרֹ֖ות בָּרָ֣ד תִּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hast thou entered the treasuries of the snow, or hast thou seen the treasuries of the hail,

jps.text: Hast thou entered the treasuries of the snow, or hast thou seen the treasuries of the hail,

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־חָשַׂ֥כְתִּי לְעֶת־צָ֑ר לְיֹ֥ום קְ֝רָ֗ב וּמִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Which I have reserved against the time of trouble, against the day of battle and war?

jps.text: Which I have reserved against the time of trouble, against the day of battle and war?

verses.hebrewText: אֵי־זֶ֣ה הַ֭דֶּרֶךְ יֵחָ֣לֶק אֹ֑ור יָפֵ֖ץ קָדִ֣ים עֲלֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: By what way is the light parted, or the east wind scattered upon the earth?

jps.text: By what way is the light parted, or the east wind scattered upon the earth?

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־פִלַּ֣ג לַשֶּׁ֣טֶף תְּעָלָ֑ה וְ֝דֶ֗רֶךְ לַחֲזִ֥יז קֹלֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Who hath cleft a channel for the waterflood, or a way for the lightning of the thunder;

jps.text: Who hath cleft a channel for the waterflood, or a way for the lightning of the thunder;

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭הַמְטִיר עַל־אֶ֣רֶץ לֹא־אִ֑ישׁ מִ֝דְבָּ֗ר לֹא־אָדָ֥ם בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To cause it to rain on a land where no man is, on the wilderness, wherein there is no man;

jps.text: To cause it to rain on a land where no man is, on the wilderness, wherein there is no man;

verses.hebrewText: לְהַשְׂבִּ֣יעַ שֹׁ֖אָה וּמְשֹׁאָ֑ה וּ֝לְהַצְמִ֗יחַ מֹ֣צָא דֶֽשֶׁא׃
verses.englishText: To satisfy the desolate and waste ground, and to cause the bud of the tender herb to spring forth?

jps.text: To satisfy the desolate and waste ground, and to cause the bud of the tender herb to spring forth?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיֵשׁ־לַמָּטָ֥ר אָ֑ב אֹ֥ו מִי־הֹ֝ולִ֗יד אֶגְלֵי־טָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Hath the rain a father? Or who hath begotten the drops of dew?

jps.text: Hath the rain a father? Or who hath begotten the drops of dew?

verses.hebrewText: מִבֶּ֣טֶן מִ֭י יָצָ֣א הַקָּ֑רַח וּכְפֹ֥ר שָׁ֝מַיִם מִ֣י יְלָדֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Out of whose womb came the ice? And the hoar-frost of heaven, who hath gendered it?

jps.text: Out of whose womb came the ice? And the hoar-frost of heaven, who hath gendered it?

verses.hebrewText: כָּ֭אֶבֶן מַ֣יִם יִתְחַבָּ֑אוּ וּפְנֵ֥י תְ֝הֹ֗ום יִתְלַכָּֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: The waters are congealed like stone, and the face of the deep is frozen.

jps.text: The waters are congealed like stone, and the face of the deep is frozen.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭תְקַשֵּׁר מַעֲדַנֹּ֣ות כִּימָ֑ה אֹֽו־מֹשְׁכֹ֖ות כְּסִ֣יל תְּפַתֵּֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou bind the chains of the Pleiades, or loose the bands of Orion?

jps.text: Canst thou bind the chains of the Pleiades, or loose the bands of Orion?

verses.hebrewText: הֲתֹצִ֣יא מַזָּרֹ֣ות בְּעִתֹּ֑ו וְ֝עַ֗יִשׁ עַל־בָּנֶ֥יהָ תַנְחֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou lead forth the Mazzaroth in their season? Or canst thou guide the Bear with her sons?

jps.text: Canst thou lead forth the Mazzaroth in their season? Or canst thou guide the Bear with her sons?

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭יָדַעְתָּ חֻקֹּ֣ות שָׁמָ֑יִם אִם־תָּשִׂ֖ים מִשְׁטָרֹ֣ו בָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Knowest thou the ordinances of the heavens? Canst thou establish the dominion thereof in the earth?

jps.text: Knowest thou the ordinances of the heavens? Canst thou establish the dominion thereof in the earth?

verses.hebrewText: הֲתָרִ֣ים לָעָ֣ב קֹולֶ֑ךָ וְֽשִׁפְעַת־מַ֥יִם תְּכַסֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou lift up thy voice to the clouds, that abundance of waters may cover thee?

jps.text: Canst thou lift up thy voice to the clouds, that abundance of waters may cover thee?

verses.hebrewText: הֽ͏ַתְשַׁלַּ֣ח בְּרָקִ֣ים וְיֵלֵ֑כוּ וְיֹאמְר֖וּ לְךָ֣ הִנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou send forth lightnings, that they may go, and say unto thee: 'Here we are'?

jps.text: Canst thou send forth lightnings, that they may go, and say unto thee: 'Here we are'?

verses.hebrewText: מִי־שָׁ֭ת בַּטֻּחֹ֣ות חָכְמָ֑ה אֹ֤ו מִֽי־נָתַ֖ן לַשֶּׂ֣כְוִי בִינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who hath put wisdom in the inward parts? Or who hath given understanding to the mind?

jps.text: Who hath put wisdom in the inward parts? Or who hath given understanding to the mind?

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יְסַפֵּ֣ר שְׁחָקִ֣ים בְּחָכְמָ֑ה וְנִבְלֵ֥י שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם מִ֣י יַשְׁכִּֽיב׃
verses.englishText: Who can number the clouds by wisdom? Or who can pour out the bottles of heaven,

jps.text: Who can number the clouds by wisdom? Or who can pour out the bottles of heaven,

verses.hebrewText: בְּצֶ֣קֶת עָ֭פָר לַמּוּצָ֑ק וּרְגָבִ֥ים יְדֻבָּֽקוּ׃
verses.englishText: When the dust runneth into a mass, and the clods cleave fast together?

jps.text: When the dust runneth into a mass, and the clods cleave fast together?

verses.hebrewText: הֲתָצ֣וּד לְלָבִ֣יא טָ֑רֶף וְחַיַּ֖ת כְּפִירִ֣ים תְּמַלֵּֽא׃
verses.englishText: Wilt thou hunt the prey for the lioness? Or satisfy the appetite of the young lions,

jps.text: Wilt thou hunt the prey for the lioness? Or satisfy the appetite of the young lions,

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־יָשֹׁ֥חוּ בַמְּעֹונֹ֑ות יֵשְׁב֖וּ בַסֻּכָּ֣ה לְמֹו־אָֽרֶב׃
verses.englishText: When they couch in their dens, and abide in the covert to lie in wait?

jps.text: When they couch in their dens, and abide in the covert to lie in wait?

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י יָכִ֥ין לָעֹרֵ֗ב צֵ֫ידֹ֥ו כִּֽי־*יְלָדֹו (יְ֭לָדָיו) אֶל־אֵ֣ל יְשַׁוֵּ֑עוּ יִ֝תְע֗וּ לִבְלִי־אֹֽכֶל׃
verses.englishText: Who provideth for the raven his prey, when his young ones cry unto God, and wander for lack of food?

jps.text: Who provideth for the raven his prey, when his young ones cry unto God, and wander for lack of food?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיָדַ֗עְתָּ עֵ֭ת לֶ֣דֶת יַעֲלֵי־סָ֑לַע חֹלֵ֖ל אַיָּלֹ֣ות תִּשְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: Knowest thou the time when the wild goats of the rock bring forth? Or canst thou mark when the hinds do calve?

jps.text: Knowest thou the time when the wild goats of the rock bring forth? Or canst thou mark when the hinds do calve?

verses.hebrewText: תִּסְפֹּ֣ר יְרָחִ֣ים תְּמַלֶּ֑אנָה וְ֝יָדַ֗עְתָּ עֵ֣ת לִדְתָּֽנָה׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou number the months that they fulfil? Or knowest thou the time when they bring forth?

jps.text: Canst thou number the months that they fulfil? Or knowest thou the time when they bring forth?

verses.hebrewText: תִּ֭כְרַעְנָה יַלְדֵיהֶ֣ן תְּפַלַּ֑חְנָה חֶבְלֵיהֶ֥ם תְּשַׁלַּֽחְנָה׃
verses.englishText: They bow themselves, they bring forth their young, they cast out their fruit.

jps.text: They bow themselves, they bring forth their young, they cast out their fruit.

verses.hebrewText: יַחְלְמ֣וּ בְ֭נֵיהֶם יִרְבּ֣וּ בַבָּ֑ר יָ֝צְא֗וּ וְלֹא־שָׁ֥בוּ לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Their young ones wax strong, they grow up in the open field; they go forth, and return not again.

jps.text: Their young ones wax strong, they grow up in the open field; they go forth, and return not again.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־שִׁלַּ֣ח פֶּ֣רֶא חָפְשִׁ֑י וּמֹסְרֹ֥ות עָ֝רֹ֗וד מִ֣י פִתֵּֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: Who hath sent out the wild ass free? Or who hath loosed the bands of the wild ass?

jps.text: Who hath sent out the wild ass free? Or who hath loosed the bands of the wild ass?

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־שַׂ֣מְתִּי עֲרָבָ֣ה בֵיתֹ֑ו וּֽמִשְׁכְּנֹותָ֥יו מְלֵֽחָה׃
verses.englishText: Whose house I have made the wilderness, and the salt land his dwelling-place.

jps.text: Whose house I have made the wilderness, and the salt land his dwelling-place.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭שְׂחַק לַהֲמֹ֣ון קִרְיָ֑ה תְּשֻׁאֹ֥ות נֹ֝וגֵ֗שׂ לֹ֣א יִשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.englishText: He scorneth the tumult of the city, neither heareth he the shoutings of the driver.

jps.text: He scorneth the tumult of the city, neither heareth he the shoutings of the driver.

verses.hebrewText: יְת֣וּר הָרִ֣ים מִרְעֵ֑הוּ וְאַחַ֖ר כָּל־יָרֹ֣וק יִדְרֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: The range of the mountains is his pasture, and he searcheth after every green thing.

jps.text: The range of the mountains is his pasture, and he searcheth after every green thing.

verses.hebrewText: הֲיֹ֣אבֶה רֵּ֣ים עָבְדֶ֑ךָ אִם־יָ֝לִ֗ין עַל־אֲבוּסֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Will the wild-ox be willing to serve thee? Or will he abide by thy crib?

jps.text: Will the wild-ox be willing to serve thee? Or will he abide by thy crib?

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‍ֽתִקְשָׁר־רֵ֭ים בְּתֶ֣לֶם עֲבֹתֹ֑ו אִם־יְשַׂדֵּ֖ד עֲמָקִ֣ים אַחֲרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou bind the wild-ox with his band in the furrow? Or will he harrow the valleys after thee?

jps.text: Canst thou bind the wild-ox with his band in the furrow? Or will he harrow the valleys after thee?

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‌ֽתִבְטַח־בֹּ֖ו כִּי־רַ֣ב כֹּחֹ֑ו וְתַעֲזֹ֖ב אֵלָ֣יו יְגִיעֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Wilt thou trust him, because his strength is great? Or wilt thou leave thy labour to him?

jps.text: Wilt thou trust him, because his strength is great? Or wilt thou leave thy labour to him?

verses.hebrewText: הֲתַאֲמִ֣ין בֹּ֖ו כִּי־*יָשׁוּב (יָשִׁ֣יב) זַרְעֶ֑ךָ וְֽגָרְנְךָ֥ יֶאֱסֹֽף׃
verses.englishText: Wilt thou rely on him, that he will bring home thy seed, and gather the corn of thy threshing-floor?

jps.text: Wilt thou rely on him, that he will bring home thy seed, and gather the corn of thy threshing-floor?

verses.hebrewText: כְּנַף־רְנָנִ֥ים נֶעֱלָ֑סָה אִם־אֶ֝בְרָ֗ה חֲסִידָ֥ה וְנֹצָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The wing of the ostrich beateth joyously; but are her pinions and feathers the kindly stork's?

jps.text: The wing of the ostrich beateth joyously; but are her pinions and feathers the kindly stork's?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תַעֲזֹ֣ב לָאָ֣רֶץ בֵּצֶ֑יהָ וְֽעַל־עָפָ֥ר תְּחַמֵּֽם׃
verses.englishText: For she leaveth her eggs on the earth, and warmeth them in dust,

jps.text: For she leaveth her eggs on the earth, and warmeth them in dust,

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭תִּשְׁכַּח כִּי־רֶ֣גֶל תְּזוּרֶ֑הָ וְחַיַּ֖ת הַשָּׂדֶ֣ה תְּדוּשֶֽׁהָ׃
verses.englishText: And forgetteth that the foot may crush them, or that the wild beast may trample them.

jps.text: And forgetteth that the foot may crush them, or that the wild beast may trample them.

verses.hebrewText: הִקְשִׁ֣יחַ בָּנֶ֣יהָ לְּלֹא־לָ֑הּ לְרִ֖יק יְגִיעָ֣הּ בְּלִי־פָֽחַד׃
verses.englishText: She is hardened against her young ones, as if they were not hers; though her labour be in vain, she is without fear;

jps.text: She is hardened against her young ones, as if they were not hers; though her labour be in vain, she is without fear;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִשָּׁ֣הּ אֱלֹ֣והַּ חָכְמָ֑ה וְלֹא־חָ֥לַק לָ֝֗הּ בַּבִּינָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Because God hath deprived her of wisdom, neither hath He imparted to her understanding.

jps.text: Because God hath deprived her of wisdom, neither hath He imparted to her understanding.

verses.hebrewText: כָּ֭עֵת בַּמָּרֹ֣ום תַּמְרִ֑יא תִּֽשְׂחַ֥ק לַ֝סּ֗וּס וּלְרֹֽכְבֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: When the time cometh, she raiseth her wings on high, and scorneth the horse and his rider.

jps.text: When the time cometh, she raiseth her wings on high, and scorneth the horse and his rider.

verses.hebrewText: הֲתִתֵּ֣ן לַסּ֣וּס גְּבוּרָ֑ה הֲתַלְבִּ֖ישׁ צַוָּארֹ֣ו רַעְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hast thou given the horse his strength? Hast thou clothed his neck with fierceness?

jps.text: Hast thou given the horse his strength? Hast thou clothed his neck with fierceness?

verses.hebrewText: הְֽ֭תַרְעִישֶׁנּוּ כָּאַרְבֶּ֑ה הֹ֖וד נַחְרֹ֣ו אֵימָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hast thou made him to leap as a locust? The glory of his snorting is terrible.

jps.text: Hast thou made him to leap as a locust? The glory of his snorting is terrible.

verses.hebrewText: יַחְפְּר֣וּ בָ֭עֵמֶק וְיָשִׂ֣ישׂ בְּכֹ֑חַ יֵ֝צֵ֗א לִקְרַאת־נָֽשֶׁק׃
verses.englishText: He paweth in the valley, and rejoiceth in his strength; he goeth out to meet the clash of arms.

jps.text: He paweth in the valley, and rejoiceth in his strength; he goeth out to meet the clash of arms.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂחַ֣ק לְ֭פַחַד וְלֹ֣א יֵחָ֑ת וְלֹֽא־יָ֝שׁ֗וּב מִפְּנֵי־חָֽרֶב׃
verses.englishText: He mocketh at fear, and is not affrighted; neither turneth he back from the sword.

jps.text: He mocketh at fear, and is not affrighted; neither turneth he back from the sword.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֭לָיו תִּרְנֶ֣ה אַשְׁפָּ֑ה לַ֖הַב חֲנִ֣ית וְכִידֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: The quiver rattleth upon him, the glittering spear and the javelin.

jps.text: The quiver rattleth upon him, the glittering spear and the javelin.

verses.hebrewText: בְּרַ֣עַשׁ וְ֭רֹגֶז יְגַמֶּא־אָ֑רֶץ וְלֹֽא־יַ֝אֲמִ֗ין כִּי־קֹ֥ול שֹׁופָֽר׃
verses.englishText: He swalloweth the ground with storm and rage; neither believeth he that it is the voice of the horn.

jps.text: He swalloweth the ground with storm and rage; neither believeth he that it is the voice of the horn.

verses.hebrewText: בְּדֵ֤י שֹׁפָ֨ר ׀ יֹ֘אמַ֤ר הֶאָ֗ח וּֽ֭מֵרָחֹוק יָרִ֣יחַ מִלְחָמָ֑ה רַ֥עַם שָׂ֝רִים וּתְרוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: As oft as he heareth the horn he saith: 'Ha, ha!' and he smelleth the battle afar off, the thunder of the captains, and the shouting.

jps.text: As oft as he heareth the horn he saith: 'Ha, ha!' and he smelleth the battle afar off, the thunder of the captains, and the shouting.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ‍ֽ֭מִבִּינָ֣תְךָ יַֽאֲבֶר־נֵ֑ץ יִפְרֹ֖שׂ *כְּנָפֹו (כְּנָפָ֣יו) לְתֵימָֽן׃
verses.englishText: Doth the hawk soar by thy wisdom, and stretch her wings toward the south?

jps.text: Doth the hawk soar by thy wisdom, and stretch her wings toward the south?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־עַל־פִּ֭יךָ יַגְבִּ֣יהַּ נָ֑שֶׁר וְ֝כִ֗י יָרִ֥ים קִנֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Doth the vulture mount up at thy command, and make her nest on high?

jps.text: Doth the vulture mount up at thy command, and make her nest on high?

verses.hebrewText: סֶ֣לַע יִ֭שְׁכֹּן וְיִתְלֹנָ֑ן עַֽל־שֶׁן־סֶ֝֗לַע וּמְצוּדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: She dwelleth and abideth on the rock, upon the crag of the rock, and the stronghold.

jps.text: She dwelleth and abideth on the rock, upon the crag of the rock, and the stronghold.

verses.hebrewText: מִשָּׁ֥ם חָֽפַר־אֹ֑כֶל לְ֝מֵרָחֹ֗וק עֵינָ֥יו יַבִּֽיטוּ׃
verses.englishText: From thence she spieth out the prey; her eyes behold it afar off.

jps.text: From thence she spieth out the prey; her eyes behold it afar off.

verses.hebrewText: *וְאֶפְרֹחֹו (וְאֶפְרֹחָ֥יו) יְעַלְעוּ־דָ֑ם וּבַאֲשֶׁ֥ר חֲ֝לָלִ֗ים שָׁ֣ם הֽוּא׃ פ
verses.englishText: Her young ones also suck up blood; and where the slain are, there is she.

jps.text: Her young ones also suck up blood; and where the slain are, there is she.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֖עַן יְהוָ֥ה אֶת־אִיֹּ֗וב וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Moreover the LORD answered Job, and said:

jps.text: Moreover the LORD answered Job, and said:

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭רֹב עִם־שַׁדַּ֣י יִסֹּ֑ור מֹוכִ֖יחַ אֱלֹ֣והַּ יַעֲנֶֽנָּה׃ פ
verses.englishText: Shall he that reproveth contend with the Almighty? He that argueth with God, let him answer it.

jps.text: Shall he that reproveth contend with the Almighty? He that argueth with God, let him answer it.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֖עַן אִיֹּ֥וב אֶת־יְהוָ֗ה וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered the LORD, and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered the LORD, and said:

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣ן קַ֭לֹּתִי מָ֣ה אֲשִׁיבֶ֑ךָּ יָ֝דִ֗י שַׂ֣מְתִּי לְמֹו־פִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I am of small account; what shall I answer Thee? I lay my hand upon my mouth.

jps.text: Behold, I am of small account; what shall I answer Thee? I lay my hand upon my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: אַחַ֣ת דִּ֭בַּרְתִּי וְלֹ֣א אֶֽעֱנֶ֑ה וּ֝שְׁתַּ֗יִם וְלֹ֣א אֹוסִֽיף׃ פ
verses.englishText: Once have I spoken, but I will not answer again; yea, twice, but I will proceed no further.

jps.text: Once have I spoken, but I will not answer again; yea, twice, but I will proceed no further.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּֽעַן־יְהוָ֣ה אֶת־אִ֭יֹּוב *מִנ *סְעָרָה (מִ֥ן ׀ סְעָרָ֗ה) וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind, and said:

jps.text: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind, and said:

verses.hebrewText: אֱזָר־נָ֣א כְגֶ֣בֶר חֲלָצֶ֑יךָ אֶ֝שְׁאָלְךָ֗ וְהֹודִיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Gird up thy loins now like a man; I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto Me.

jps.text: Gird up thy loins now like a man; I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto Me.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭אַף תָּפֵ֣ר מִשְׁפָּטִ֑י תַּ֝רְשִׁיעֵ֗נִי לְמַ֣עַן תִּצְדָּֽק׃
verses.englishText: Wilt thou even make void My judgment? Wilt thou condemn Me, that thou mayest be justified?

jps.text: Wilt thou even make void My judgment? Wilt thou condemn Me, that thou mayest be justified?

verses.hebrewText: וְאִם־זְרֹ֖ועַ כָּאֵ֥ל ׀ לָ֑ךְ וּ֝בְקֹ֗ול כָּמֹ֥הוּ תַרְעֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Or hast thou an arm like God? And canst thou thunder with a voice like Him?

jps.text: Or hast thou an arm like God? And canst thou thunder with a voice like Him?

verses.hebrewText: עֲדֵ֥ה נָ֣א גָֽאֹ֣ון וָגֹ֑בַהּ וְהֹ֖וד וְהָדָ֣ר תִּלְבָּֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Deck thyself now with majesty and excellency, and array thyself with glory and beauty.

jps.text: Deck thyself now with majesty and excellency, and array thyself with glory and beauty.

verses.hebrewText: הָ֭פֵץ עֶבְרֹ֣ות אַפֶּ֑ךָ וּרְאֵ֥ה כָל־גֵּ֝אֶ֗ה וְהַשְׁפִּילֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Cast abroad the rage of thy wrath; and look upon every one that is proud, and abase him.

jps.text: Cast abroad the rage of thy wrath; and look upon every one that is proud, and abase him.

verses.hebrewText: רְאֵ֣ה כָל־גֵּ֭אֶה הַכְנִיעֵ֑הוּ וַהֲדֹ֖ךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים תַּחְתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Look on every one that is proud, and bring him low; and tread down the wicked in their place.

jps.text: Look on every one that is proud, and bring him low; and tread down the wicked in their place.

verses.hebrewText: טָמְנֵ֣ם בֶּעָפָ֣ר יָ֑חַד פְּ֝נֵיהֶ֗ם חֲבֹ֣שׁ בַּטָּמֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: Hide them in the dust together; bind their faces in the hidden place.

jps.text: Hide them in the dust together; bind their faces in the hidden place.

verses.hebrewText: וְגַם־אֲנִ֥י אֹודֶ֑ךָּ כִּֽי־תֹושִׁ֖עַ לְךָ֣ יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Then will I also confess unto thee that thine own right hand can save thee.

jps.text: Then will I also confess unto thee that thine own right hand can save thee.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּה־נָ֣א בְ֭הֵמֹות אֲשֶׁר־עָשִׂ֣יתִי עִמָּ֑ךְ חָ֝צִ֗יר כַּבָּקָ֥ר יֹאכֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Behold now behemoth, which I made with thee; he eateth grass as an ox.

jps.text: Behold now behemoth, which I made with thee; he eateth grass as an ox.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּה־נָ֣א כֹחֹ֣ו בְמָתְנָ֑יו וְ֝אֹנֹ֗ו בִּשְׁרִירֵ֥י בִטְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Lo now, his strength is in his loins, and his force is in the stays of his body.

jps.text: Lo now, his strength is in his loins, and his force is in the stays of his body.

verses.hebrewText: יַחְפֹּ֣ץ זְנָבֹ֣ו כְמֹו־אָ֑רֶז גִּידֵ֖י *פַחֲדֹו (פַחֲדָ֣יו) יְשֹׂרָֽגוּ׃
verses.englishText: He straineth his tail like a cedar; the sinews of his thighs are knit together.

jps.text: He straineth his tail like a cedar; the sinews of his thighs are knit together.

verses.hebrewText: עֲ֭צָמָיו אֲפִיקֵ֣י נְחוּשָׁ֑ה גְּ֝רָמָ֗יו כִּמְטִ֥יל בַּרְזֶֽל׃
verses.englishText: His bones are as pipes of brass; his gristles are like bars of iron.

jps.text: His bones are as pipes of brass; his gristles are like bars of iron.

verses.hebrewText: ה֖וּא רֵאשִׁ֣ית דַּרְכֵי־אֵ֑ל הָ֝עֹשֹׂו יַגֵּ֥שׁ חַרְבֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He is the beginning of the ways of God; He only that made him can make His sword to approach unto him.

jps.text: He is the beginning of the ways of God; He only that made him can make His sword to approach unto him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־ב֭וּל הָרִ֣ים יִשְׂאוּ־לֹ֑ו וְֽכָל־חַיַּ֥ת הַ֝שָּׂדֶ֗ה יְשַֽׂחֲקוּ־שָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: Surely the mountains bring him forth food, and all the beasts of the field play there.

jps.text: Surely the mountains bring him forth food, and all the beasts of the field play there.

verses.hebrewText: תַּֽחַת־צֶאֱלִ֥ים יִשְׁכָּ֑ב בְּסֵ֖תֶר קָנֶ֣ה וּבִצָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He lieth under the lotus-trees, in the covert of the reed, and fens.

jps.text: He lieth under the lotus-trees, in the covert of the reed, and fens.

verses.hebrewText: יְסֻכֻּ֣הוּ צֶאֱלִ֣ים צִֽלֲלֹ֑ו יְ֝סֻבּ֗וּהוּ עַרְבֵי־נָֽחַל׃
verses.englishText: The lotus-trees cover him with their shadow; the willows of the brook compass him about.

jps.text: The lotus-trees cover him with their shadow; the willows of the brook compass him about.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן יַעֲשֹׁ֣ק נָ֭הָר לֹ֣א יַחְפֹּ֑וז יִבְטַ֓ח ׀ כִּֽי־יָגִ֖יחַ יַרְדֵּ֣ן אֶל־פִּֽיהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, if a river overflow, he trembleth not; he is confident, though the Jordan rush forth to his mouth.

jps.text: Behold, if a river overflow, he trembleth not; he is confident, though the Jordan rush forth to his mouth.

verses.hebrewText: בְּעֵינָ֥יו יִקָּחֶ֑נּוּ בְּ֝מֹֽוקְשִׁ֗ים יִנְקָב־אָֽף׃
verses.englishText: Shall any take him by his eyes, or pierce through his nose with a snare?

jps.text: Shall any take him by his eyes, or pierce through his nose with a snare?

verses.hebrewText: תִּמְשֹׁ֣ךְ לִוְיָתָ֣ן בְּחַכָּ֑ה וּ֝בְחֶ֗בֶל תַּשְׁקִ֥יעַ לְשֹׁנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou draw out leviathan with a fish-hook? or press down his tongue with a cord?

jps.text: Canst thou draw out leviathan with a fish-hook? or press down his tongue with a cord?

verses.hebrewText: הֲתָשִׂ֣ים אַגְמֹ֣ון בְּאַפֹּ֑ו וּ֝בְחֹ֗וחַ תִּקֹּ֥וב לֶֽחֱיֹו׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou put a ring into his nose? or bore his jaw through with a hook?

jps.text: Canst thou put a ring into his nose? or bore his jaw through with a hook?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיַרְבֶּ֣ה אֵ֭לֶיךָ תַּחֲנוּנִ֑ים אִם־יְדַבֵּ֖ר אֵלֶ֣יךָ רַכֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: Will he make many supplications unto thee? or will he speak soft words unto thee?

jps.text: Will he make many supplications unto thee? or will he speak soft words unto thee?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיִכְרֹ֣ת בְּרִ֣ית עִמָּ֑ךְ תִּ֝קָּחֶ֗נּוּ לְעֶ֣בֶד עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Will he make a covenant with thee, that thou shouldest take him for a servant for ever?

jps.text: Will he make a covenant with thee, that thou shouldest take him for a servant for ever?

verses.hebrewText: הֽ͏ַתְשַׂחֶק־בֹּ֖ו כַּצִּפֹּ֑ור וְ֝תִקְשְׁרֶ֗נּוּ לְנַעֲרֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Wilt thou play with him as with a bird? Or wilt thou bind him for thy maidens?

jps.text: Wilt thou play with him as with a bird? Or wilt thou bind him for thy maidens?

verses.hebrewText: יִכְר֣וּ עָ֭לָיו חַבָּרִ֑ים יֶ֝חֱצ֗וּהוּ בֵּ֣ין כְּֽנַעֲנִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Will the bands of fishermen make a banquet of him? Will they part him among the merchants?

jps.text: Will the bands of fishermen make a banquet of him? Will they part him among the merchants?

verses.hebrewText: הַֽתְמַלֵּ֣א בְשֻׂכֹּ֣ות עֹורֹ֑ו וּבְצִלְצַ֖ל דָּגִ֣ים רֹאשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Canst thou fill his skin with barbed irons? or his head with fish-spears?

jps.text: Canst thou fill his skin with barbed irons? or his head with fish-spears?

verses.hebrewText: שִׂים־עָלָ֥יו כַּפֶּ֑ךָ זְכֹ֥ר מִ֝לְחָמָ֗ה אַל־תֹּוסַֽף׃
verses.englishText: Lay thy hand upon him; think upon the battle, thou wilt do so no more.

jps.text: Lay thy hand upon him; think upon the battle, thou wilt do so no more.

verses.hebrewText: הֵן־תֹּחַלְתֹּ֥ו נִכְזָ֑בָה הֲגַ֖ם אֶל־מַרְאָ֣יו יֻטָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Behold, the hope of him is in vain; shall not one be cast down even at the sight of him?

jps.text: Behold, the hope of him is in vain; shall not one be cast down even at the sight of him?

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־אַ֭כְזָר כִּ֣י יְעוּרֶ֑נּוּ וּמִ֥י ה֝֗וּא לְפָנַ֥י יִתְיַצָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: None is so fierce that dare stir him up; who then is able to stand before Me?

jps.text: None is so fierce that dare stir him up; who then is able to stand before Me?

verses.hebrewText: מִ֣י הִ֭קְדִּימַנִי וַאֲשַׁלֵּ֑ם תַּ֖חַת כָּל־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם לִי־הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: Who hath given Me anything beforehand, that I should repay him? Whatsoever is under the whole heaven is Mine.

jps.text: Who hath given Me anything beforehand, that I should repay him? Whatsoever is under the whole heaven is Mine.

verses.hebrewText: *לֹא־ (לֹֽו)־אַחֲרִ֥ישׁ בַּדָּ֑יו וּדְבַר־גְּ֝בוּרֹ֗ות וְחִ֣ין עֶרְכֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Would I keep silence concerning his boastings, or his proud talk, or his fair array of words?

jps.text: Would I keep silence concerning his boastings, or his proud talk, or his fair array of words?

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־גִ֭לָּה פְּנֵ֣י לְבוּשֹׁ֑ו בְּכֶ֥פֶל רִ֝סְנֹ֗ו מִ֣י יָבֹֽוא׃
verses.englishText: Who can uncover the face of his garment? Who shall come within his double bridle?

jps.text: Who can uncover the face of his garment? Who shall come within his double bridle?

verses.hebrewText: דַּלְתֵ֣י פָ֭נָיו מִ֣י פִתֵּ֑חַ סְבִיבֹ֖ות שִׁנָּ֣יו אֵימָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who can open the doors of his face? Round about his teeth is terror.

jps.text: Who can open the doors of his face? Round about his teeth is terror.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֭אֲוָה אֲפִיקֵ֣י מָֽגִנִּ֑ים סָ֝ג֗וּר חֹותָ֥ם צָֽר׃
verses.englishText: His scales are his pride, shut up together as with a close seal.

jps.text: His scales are his pride, shut up together as with a close seal.

verses.hebrewText: אֶחָ֣ד בְּאֶחָ֣ד יִגַּ֑שׁוּ וְ֝ר֗וּחַ לֹא־יָבֹ֥וא בֵֽינֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: One is so near to another, that no air can come between them.

jps.text: One is so near to another, that no air can come between them.

verses.hebrewText: אִישׁ־בְּאָחִ֥יהוּ יְדֻבָּ֑קוּ יִ֝תְלַכְּד֗וּ וְלֹ֣א יִתְפָּרָֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: They are joined one to another; they stick together, that they cannot be sundered.

jps.text: They are joined one to another; they stick together, that they cannot be sundered.

verses.hebrewText: עֲ‍ֽ֭טִישֹׁתָיו תָּ֣הֶל אֹ֑ור וְ֝עֵינָ֗יו כְּעַפְעַפֵּי־שָֽׁחַר׃
verses.englishText: His sneezings flash forth light, and his eyes are like the eyelids of the morning.

jps.text: His sneezings flash forth light, and his eyes are like the eyelids of the morning.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭פִּיו לַפִּידִ֣ים יַהֲלֹ֑כוּ כִּידֹ֥ודֵי אֵ֝֗שׁ יִתְמַלָּֽטוּ׃
verses.englishText: Out of his mouth go burning torches, and sparks of fire leap forth.

jps.text: Out of his mouth go burning torches, and sparks of fire leap forth.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭נְּחִירָיו יֵצֵ֣א עָשָׁ֑ן כְּד֖וּד נָפ֣וּחַ וְאַגְמֹֽן׃
verses.englishText: Out of his nostrils goeth smoke, as out of a seething pot and burning rushes.

jps.text: Out of his nostrils goeth smoke, as out of a seething pot and burning rushes.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֭פְשֹׁו גֶּחָלִ֣ים תְּלַהֵ֑ט וְ֝לַ֗הַב מִפִּ֥יו יֵצֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: His breath kindleth coals, and a flame goeth out of his mouth.

jps.text: His breath kindleth coals, and a flame goeth out of his mouth.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽ֭צַוָּארֹו יָלִ֣ין עֹ֑ז וּ֝לְפָנָ֗יו תָּד֥וּץ דְּאָבָֽה׃
verses.englishText: In his neck abideth strength, and dismay danceth before him.

jps.text: In his neck abideth strength, and dismay danceth before him.

verses.hebrewText: מַפְּלֵ֣י בְשָׂרֹ֣ו דָבֵ֑קוּ יָצ֥וּק עָ֝לָ֗יו בַּל־יִמֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: The flakes of his flesh are joined together; they are firm upon him; they cannot be moved.

jps.text: The flakes of his flesh are joined together; they are firm upon him; they cannot be moved.

verses.hebrewText: לִ֭בֹּו יָצ֣וּק כְּמֹו־אָ֑בֶן וְ֝יָצ֗וּק כְּפֶ֣לַח תַּחְתִּֽית׃
verses.englishText: His heart is as firm as a stone; yea, firm as the nether millstone.

jps.text: His heart is as firm as a stone; yea, firm as the nether millstone.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭שֵּׂתֹו יָג֣וּרוּ אֵלִ֑ים מִ֝שְּׁבָרִ֗ים יִתְחַטָּֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: When he raiseth himself up, the mighty are afraid; by reason of despair they are beside themselves.

jps.text: When he raiseth himself up, the mighty are afraid; by reason of despair they are beside themselves.

verses.hebrewText: מַשִּׂיגֵ֣הוּ חֶ֭רֶב בְּלִ֣י תָק֑וּם חֲנִ֖ית מַסָּ֣ע וְשִׁרְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: If one lay at him with the sword, it will not hold; nor the spear, the dart, nor the pointed shaft.

jps.text: If one lay at him with the sword, it will not hold; nor the spear, the dart, nor the pointed shaft.

verses.hebrewText: יַחְשֹׁ֣ב לְתֶ֣בֶן בַּרְזֶ֑ל לְעֵ֖ץ רִקָּבֹ֣ון נְחוּשָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: He esteemeth iron as straw, and brass as rotten wood.

jps.text: He esteemeth iron as straw, and brass as rotten wood.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יַבְרִיחֶ֥נּוּ בֶן־קָ֑שֶׁת לְ֝קַ֗שׁ נֶהְפְּכוּ־לֹ֥ו אַבְנֵי־קָֽלַע׃
verses.englishText: The arrow cannot make him flee; slingstones are turned with him into stubble.

jps.text: The arrow cannot make him flee; slingstones are turned with him into stubble.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭קַשׁ נֶחְשְׁב֣וּ תֹותָ֑ח וְ֝יִשְׂחַ֗ק לְרַ֣עַשׁ כִּידֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Clubs are accounted as stubble; he laugheth at the rattling of the javelin.

jps.text: Clubs are accounted as stubble; he laugheth at the rattling of the javelin.

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֭חְתָּיו חַדּ֣וּדֵי חָ֑רֶשׂ יִרְפַּ֖ד חָר֣וּץ עֲלֵי־טִֽיט׃
verses.englishText: Sharpest potsherds are under him; he spreadeth a threshing-sledge upon the mire.

jps.text: Sharpest potsherds are under him; he spreadeth a threshing-sledge upon the mire.

verses.hebrewText: יַרְתִּ֣יחַ כַּסִּ֣יר מְצוּלָ֑ה יָ֝֗ם יָשִׂ֥ים כַּמֶּרְקָחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He maketh the deep to boil like a pot; he maketh the sea like a seething mixture.

jps.text: He maketh the deep to boil like a pot; he maketh the sea like a seething mixture.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭חֲרָיו יָאִ֣יר נָתִ֑יב יַחְשֹׁ֖ב תְּהֹ֣ום לְשֵׂיבָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He maketh a path to shine after him; one would think the deep to be hoary.

jps.text: He maketh a path to shine after him; one would think the deep to be hoary.

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽין־עַל־עָפָ֥ר מָשְׁלֹ֑ו הֶ֝עָשׂ֗וּ לִבְלִי־חָֽת׃
verses.englishText: Upon earth there is not his like, who is made to be fearless.

jps.text: Upon earth there is not his like, who is made to be fearless.

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽת־כָּל־גָּבֹ֥הַּ יִרְאֶ֑ה ה֝֗וּא מֶ֣לֶךְ עַל־כָּל־בְּנֵי־שָֽׁחַץ׃ ס
verses.englishText: He looketh at all high things; he is king over all the proud beasts.

jps.text: He looketh at all high things; he is king over all the proud beasts.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֖עַן אִיֹּ֥וב אֶת־יְהוָ֗ה וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.englishText: Then Job answered the LORD, and said:

jps.text: Then Job answered the LORD, and said:

verses.hebrewText: *יָדַעְתָּ (יָ֭דַעְתִּי) כִּי־כֹ֣ל תּוּכָ֑ל וְלֹא־יִבָּצֵ֖ר מִמְּךָ֣ מְזִמָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: I know that Thou canst do every thing, and that no purpose can be withholden from Thee.

jps.text: I know that Thou canst do every thing, and that no purpose can be withholden from Thee.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י זֶ֨ה ׀ מַעְלִ֥ים עֵצָ֗ה בְּֽלִ֫י דָ֥עַת לָכֵ֣ן הִ֭גַּדְתִּי וְלֹ֣א אָבִ֑ין נִפְלָאֹ֥ות מִ֝מֶּ֗נִּי וְלֹ֣א אֵדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Who is this that hideth counsel without knowledge? Therefore have I uttered that which I understood not, things too wonderful for me, which I knew not.

jps.text: Who is this that hideth counsel without knowledge? Therefore have I uttered that which I understood not, things too wonderful for me, which I knew not.

verses.hebrewText: שְֽׁמַֽע־נָ֭א וְאָנֹכִ֣י אֲדַבֵּ֑ר אֶ֝שְׁאָלְךָ֗ וְהֹודִיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Hear, I beseech Thee, and I will speak; I will demand of Thee, and declare Thou unto me.

jps.text: Hear, I beseech Thee, and I will speak; I will demand of Thee, and declare Thou unto me.

verses.hebrewText: לְשֵֽׁמַע־אֹ֥זֶן שְׁמַעְתִּ֑יךָ וְ֝עַתָּ֗ה עֵינִ֥י רָאָֽתְךָ׃
verses.englishText: I had heard of Thee by the hearing of the ear; but now mine eye seeth Thee;

jps.text: I had heard of Thee by the hearing of the ear; but now mine eye seeth Thee;

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֭ן אֶמְאַ֣ס וְנִחַ֑מְתִּי עַל־עָפָ֥ר וָאֵֽפֶר׃ פ
verses.englishText: Wherefore I abhor my words, and repent, seeing I am dust and ashes.

jps.text: Wherefore I abhor my words, and repent, seeing I am dust and ashes.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֗י אַחַ֨ר דִּבֶּ֧ר יְהוָ֛ה אֶת־הַדְּבָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה אֶל־אִיֹּ֑וב וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהוָ֜ה אֶל־אֱלִיפַ֣ז הַתֵּֽימָנִ֗י חָרָ֨ה אַפִּ֤י בְךָ֙ וּבִשְׁנֵ֣י רֵעֶ֔יךָ כִּ֠י לֹ֣א דִבַּרְתֶּ֥ם אֵלַ֛י נְכֹונָ֖ה כְּעַבְדִּ֥י אִיֹּֽוב׃
verses.englishText: And it was so, that after the LORD had spoken these words unto Job, the LORD said to Eliphaz the Temanite: 'My wrath is kindled against thee, and against thy two friends; for ye have not spoken of Me the thing that is right, as My servant Job hath.

jps.text: And it was so, that after the LORD had spoken these words unto Job, the LORD said to Eliphaz the Temanite: 'My wrath is kindled against thee, and against thy two friends; for ye have not spoken of Me the thing that is right, as My servant Job hath.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֡ה קְחֽוּ־לָכֶ֣ם שִׁבְעָֽה־פָרִים֩ וְשִׁבְעָ֨ה אֵילִ֜ים וּלְכ֣וּ ׀ אֶל־עַבְדִּ֣י אִיֹּ֗וב וְהַעֲלִיתֶ֤ם עֹולָה֙ בּֽ͏ַעַדְכֶ֔ם וְאִיֹּ֣וב עַבְדִּ֔י יִתְפַּלֵּ֖ל עֲלֵיכֶ֑ם כִּ֧י אִם־פָּנָ֣יו אֶשָּׂ֗א לְבִלְתִּ֞י עֲשֹׂ֤ות עִמָּכֶם֙ נְבָלָ֔ה כִּ֠י לֹ֣א דִבַּרְתֶּ֥ם אֵלַ֛י נְכֹונָ֖ה כְּעַבְדִּ֥י אִיֹּֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Now therefore, take unto you seven bullocks and seven rams, and go to My servant Job, and offer up for yourselves a burnt-offering; and My servant Job shall pray for you; for him will I accept, that I do not unto you aught unseemly; for ye have not spoken of Me the thing that is right, as my servant Job hath.'

jps.text: Now therefore, take unto you seven bullocks and seven rams, and go to My servant Job, and offer up for yourselves a burnt-offering; and My servant Job shall pray for you; for him will I accept, that I do not unto you aught unseemly; for ye have not spoken of Me the thing that is right, as my servant Job hath.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּלְכוּ֩ אֱלִיפַ֨ז הַתֵּֽימָנִ֜י וּבִלְדַּ֣ד הַשּׁוּחִ֗י צֹפַר֙ הַנַּ֣עֲמָתִ֔י וַֽיַּעֲשׂ֔וּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר דִּבֶּ֥ר אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם יְהוָ֑ה וַיִּשָּׂ֥א יְהוָ֖ה אֶת־פְּנֵ֥י אִיֹּֽוב׃
verses.englishText: So Eliphaz the Temanite and Bildad the Shuhite and Zophar the Naamathite went, and did according as the LORD commanded them; and the LORD accepted Job.

jps.text: So Eliphaz the Temanite and Bildad the Shuhite and Zophar the Naamathite went, and did according as the LORD commanded them; and the LORD accepted Job.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיהוָ֗ה שָׁ֚ב אֶת־*שְׁבִית (שְׁב֣וּת) אִיֹּ֔וב בְּהִֽתְפַּֽלְלֹ֖ו בְּעַ֣ד רֵעֵ֑הוּ וַ֧יֹּסֶף יְהוָ֛ה אֶת־כָּל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר לְאִיֹּ֖וב לְמִשְׁנֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD changed the fortune of Job, when he prayed for his friends; and the LORD gave Job twice as much as he had before.

jps.text: And the LORD changed the fortune of Job, when he prayed for his friends; and the LORD gave Job twice as much as he had before.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּבֹ֣אוּ אֵ֠לָיו כָּל־אֶחָ֨יו וְכָל־*אַחְיֹתָיו (אַחְיֹותָ֜יו) וְכָל־יֹדְעָ֣יו לְפָנִ֗ים וַיֹּאכְל֨וּ עִמֹּ֣ו לֶחֶם֮ בְּבֵיתֹו֒ וַיָּנֻ֤דוּ לֹו֙ וַיְנַחֲמ֣וּ אֹתֹ֔ו עַ֚ל כָּל־הָ֣רָעָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־הֵבִ֥יא יְהוָ֖ה עָלָ֑יו וַיִּתְּנוּ־לֹ֗ו אִ֚ישׁ קְשִׂיטָ֣ה אֶחָ֔ת וְאִ֕ישׁ נֶ֥זֶם זָהָ֖ב אֶחָֽד׃ ס
verses.englishText: Then came there unto him all his brethren, and all his sisters, and all they that had been of his acquaintance before, and did eat bread with him in his house; and they bemoaned him, and comforted him concerning all the evil that the LORD had brought upon him; every man also gave him a piece of money, and every one a ring of gold.

jps.text: Then came there unto him all his brethren, and all his sisters, and all they that had been of his acquaintance before, and did eat bread with him in his house; and they bemoaned him, and comforted him concerning all the evil that the LORD had brought upon him; every man also gave him a piece of money, and every one a ring of gold.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיהוָ֗ה בֵּרַ֛ךְ אֶת־אַחֲרִ֥ית אִיֹּ֖וב מֵרֵאשִׁתֹ֑ו וַֽיְהִי־לֹ֡ו אַרְבָּעָה֩ עָשָׂ֨ר אֶ֜לֶף צֹ֗אן וְשֵׁ֤שֶׁת אֲלָפִים֙ גְּמַלִּ֔ים וְאֶֽלֶף־צֶ֥מֶד בָּקָ֖ר וְאֶ֥לֶף אֲתֹונֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: So the LORD blessed the latter end of Job more than his beginning; and he had fourteen thousand sheep, and six thousand camels, and a thousand yoke of oxen, and a thousand she-asses.

jps.text: So the LORD blessed the latter end of Job more than his beginning; and he had fourteen thousand sheep, and six thousand camels, and a thousand yoke of oxen, and a thousand she-asses.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיְהִי־לֹ֛ו שִׁבְעָ֥נָה בָנִ֖ים וְשָׁלֹ֥ושׁ בָּנֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: He had also seven sons and three daughters.

jps.text: He had also seven sons and three daughters.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּקְרָ֤א שֵׁם־הָֽאַחַת֙ יְמִימָ֔ה וְשֵׁ֥ם הַשֵּׁנִ֖ית קְצִיעָ֑ה וְשֵׁ֥ם הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֖ית קֶ֥רֶן הַפּֽוּךְ׃
verses.englishText: And he called the name of the first, Jemimah; and the name of the second, Keziah; and the name of the third, Keren-happuch.

jps.text: And he called the name of the first, Jemimah; and the name of the second, Keziah; and the name of the third, Keren-happuch.

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹ֨א נִמְצָ֜א נָשִׁ֥ים יָפֹ֛ות כִּבְנֹ֥ות אִיֹּ֖וב בְּכָל־הָאָ֑רֶץ וַיִּתֵּ֨ן לָהֶ֧ם אֲבִיהֶ֛ם נַחֲלָ֖ה בְּתֹ֥וךְ אֲחֵיהֶֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: And in all the land were no women found so fair as the daughters of Job; and their father gave them inheritance among their brethren.

jps.text: And in all the land were no women found so fair as the daughters of Job; and their father gave them inheritance among their brethren.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְחִ֤י אִיֹּוב֙ אַֽחֲרֵי־זֹ֔את מֵאָ֥ה וְאַרְבָּעִ֖ים שָׁנָ֑ה *וַיַּרְא (וַיִּרְאֶ֗ה) אֶת־בָּנָיו֙ וְאֶת־בְּנֵ֣י בָנָ֔יו אַרְבָּעָ֖ה דֹּרֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: And after this Job lived a hundred and forty years, and saw his sons, and his sons' sons, even four generations.

jps.text: And after this Job lived a hundred and forty years, and saw his sons, and his sons' sons, even four generations.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֣מָת אִיֹּ֔וב זָקֵ֖ן וּשְׂבַ֥ע יָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: So Job died, being old and full of days.

jps.text: So Job died, being old and full of days.
